060101.english: Paul, a servant of Jesus Christ, called to be an apostle, separated unto the gospel of God,
060101.cherokee: ᏉᎳ, ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎠᎩᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ, ᎥᎩᏅᏏᏛ ᎢᏴᏋᏁᎸᎯ, ᎥᏆᏓᏓᎴᏔᏅᎯ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎠᏆᎵᏥᏙᏗᏱ,
060101.phonetic: Quo-la, Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv a-gi-nv-si-da-s-di, v-gi-nv-si-dv i-yv-quv-ne-lv-hi, v-qua-da-da-le-ta-nv-hi o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li a-qua-li-tsi-do-di-yi,

060102.english: (Which he had promised afore by his prophets in the holy scriptures,)
060102.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏚᎢᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᏥᏂᎨᏎ ᎠᎾᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ ᏕᎬᏗᏍᎬ ᎾᎿᎭᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎪᏪᎵᎯ,
060102.phonetic: Na-s-gi u-du-i-s-ta-nv-hi tsi-ni-ge-se a-na-do-le-ho-s-gi de-gv-di-s-gv na-hna ga-lv-quo-di-yu go-we-li-hi,

060103.english: Concerning his Son Jesus Christ our Lord, which was made of the seed of David according to the flesh;
060103.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏕᏫ ᎤᏁᏢᏔᏅᏛ ᎨᏒ ᏧᏕᏁᎢ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᎨᏒᎢ;
060103.phonetic: Na-s-gi U-we-tsi U-gv-wa-li, na-s-gi De-wi u-ne-tlv-ta-nv-dv ge-sv tsu-de-ne-i na-s-gi u-que-da-li ge-sv-i;

060104.english: And declared to be the Son of God with power, according to the spirit of holiness, by the resurrection from the dead:
060104.cherokee: ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏓᏅᏙ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏛ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏥᎾᎬᏁᎴ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᎿᎭᎤᏲᎱᏒ ᏚᎴᎯᏌᏅᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎢᎦᏤᎵᎦ,
060104.phonetic: Ga-lv-quo-di-yu-s-gi-ni U-da-nv-do ge-sv u-tsa-ti u-li-ni-gi-dv gv-ni-ge-sv tsi-na-gv-ne-le U-ne-la-nv-hi U-we-tsi ge-sv-i, na-s-gi na-hna u-yo-hu-sv du-le-hi-sa-nv-i; na-s-gi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv U-gv-wi-yu-hi i-ga-tse-li-ga,

060105.english: By whom we have received grace and apostleship, for obedience to the faith among all nations, for his name:
060105.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎣᎩᏁᎸᎯ ᏥᎩ ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎣᎩᏅᏏᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᎾᏓᏂᎸᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏂᎥ ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏚᏙᎥ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎬᎢ;
060105.phonetic: Na-s-gi o-gi-ne-lv-hi tsi-gi gv-wa-ga-ti-ya u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv a-le o-gi-nv-si-dv ge-sv-i, na-s-gi tsu-na-da-ni-lv-i-s-di-yi go-hi-yu-di ge-sv na-ni-v tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv yv-wi, na-s-gi du-do-v nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-gv-i;

060106.english: Among whom are ye also the called of Jesus Christ:
060106.cherokee: ᎾᎿᎭᎾᏍᏉ ᎢᏣᏓᏑᏯ ᏂᎯ, ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎢᏥᏯᏅᏛ ᏥᎩ;
060106.phonetic: Na-hna na-s-quo i-tsa-da-su-ya ni-hi, Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv i-tsi-ya-nv-dv tsi-gi;

060107.english: To all that be in Rome, beloved of God, called to be saints: Grace to you and peace from God our Father, and the Lord Jesus Christ.
060107.cherokee: ᏂᏥᎥ ᎶᎻ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎢᏥᎨᏳᎯ, ᎡᏥᏯᏅᏛ ᎢᏣᏓᏅᏘ; ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᏅᏩᏙᎯᏯᏛ ᎨᏤᎳᏗᏙᎮᏍᏗ, ᏅᏓᏳᎾᎵᏍᎪᎸᏔᏅᎯ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎢᎩᏙᏓ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ.
060107.phonetic: Ni-tsi-v Lo-mi, U-ne-la-nv-hi i-tsi-ge-yu-hi, e-tsi-ya-nv-dv i-tsa-da-nv-ti; Gv-wa-ga-ti-ya u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv a-le nv-wa-do-hi-ya-dv ge-tse-la-di-do-he-s-di, nv-da-yu-na-li-s-go-lv-ta-nv-hi U-ne-la-nv-hi I-gi-do-da, a-le U-gv-wi-yu-hi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv.

060108.english: First, I thank my God through Jesus Christ for you all, that your faith is spoken of throughout the whole world.
060108.cherokee: ᎢᎬᏱᏱ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏥᏯᎵᎡᎵᏤᎭ ᎠᏆᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎬᏗᎭ ᏚᏙᎥ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ, ᏂᏥᎥ ᏂᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ, ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎢᏦᎯᏳᏒ ᏂᎬᎾᏛ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎠᏂᏃᎮᏍᎬᎢ.
060108.phonetic: I-gv-yi-yi ge-sv-i, tsi-ya-li-e-li-tse-ha A-qua-ne-la-nv-hi gv-di-ha du-do-v Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv, ni-tsi-v ni-hi ge-sv i-yu-s-di, nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha i-tso-hi-yu-sv ni-gv-na-dv e-lo-hi a-ni-no-he-s-gv-i.

060109.english: For God is my witness, whom I serve with my spirit in the gospel of his Son, that without ceasing I make mention of you always in my prayers;
060109.cherokee: ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏰᏃ ᎠᏉᎯᏳᏓᏁᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏥᏥᏯᏛᏁᎭ ᎠᏆᏓᏅᏙ ᏥᎬᏗᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏂᎬᏁᎲᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᏥᏲᎯᏍᏗᏍᎬᎾ ᎢᏨᏁᎢᏍᏗᏍᎬᎢ, ᏂᎪᎯᎸ ᎦᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗᏍᎬ.
060109.phonetic: U-ne-la-nv-hi-ye-no a-quo-hi-yu-da-ne-hi, na-s-gi go-hu-s-di tsi-tsi-ya-dv-ne-ha a-qua-da-nv-do tsi-gv-di-ha na-s-gi o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv U-we-tsi u-tse-li-ga gv-ni-ge-sv ni-gv-ne-hv-i, na-s-gi ni-tsi-yo-hi-s-di-s-gv-na i-tsv-ne-i-s-di-s-gv-i, ni-go-hi-lv ga-da-do-li-s-di-s-gv.

060110.english: Making request, if by any means now at length I might have a prosperous journey by the will of God to come unto you.
060110.cherokee: ᏥᏔᏲᎯᎲᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏃ ᏰᎵ ᏱᎩ ᎪᎯ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎢᏯᏆᎵᏍᏓᏁᎸᏍᏗᏱ ᎦᎢᏒ ᏫᏨᎷᏤᏗᏱ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎠᏰᎸᏍᎬ ᏅᏓᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ.
060110.phonetic: Tsi-ta-yo-hi-hv-i, na-s-gi i-yu-no ye-li yi-gi go-hi hna-quo o-s-dv i-ya-qua-li-s-da-ne-lv-s-di-yi ga-i-sv wi-tsv-lu-tse-di-yi, U-ne-la-nv-hi o-si-yu a-ye-lv-s-gv nv-da-yu-li-s-do-di-yi.

060111.english: For I long to see you, that I may impart unto you some spiritual gift, to the end ye may be established;
060111.cherokee: ᎤᏣᏘᏰᏃ ᎠᏆᏚᎵ ᎢᏨᎪᏩᏛᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᏨᏲᎯᏎᏗᏱ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎤᏍᏗ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎤᎵᏍᏕᎸᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᏣᎵᏂᎪᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᏭᎵᏱᎶᎯᏍᏗᏱ;
060111.phonetic: U-tsa-ti-ye-no a-qua-du-li i-tsv-go-wa-dv-di-yi, na-s-gi di-tsv-yo-hi-se-di-yi go-hu-s-di u-s-di a-da-nv-do u-li-s-de-lv-do-di ge-sv-i, na-s-gi di-tsa-li-ni-go-hi-s-di-yi wu-li-yi-lo-hi-s-di-yi;

060112.english: That is, that I may be comforted together with you by the mutual faith both of you and me.
060112.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏴ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᎢᎩᎧᎵᏍᏙᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᎬᏔᏅᎯ ᎠᏴ ᏂᎯᏃ ᎤᏠᏱ ᎢᎪᎯᏳᏒᎢ.
060112.phonetic: Na-s-gi hi-a nu-s-di, na-s-gi a-yv i-tsu-la-ha i-gi-ka-li-s-do-hi-s-di-yi gv-ta-nv-hi a-yv ni-hi-no u-tlo-yi i-go-hi-yu-sv-i.

060113.english: Now I would not have you ignorant, brethren, that oftentimes I purposed to come unto you, (but was let hitherto,) that I might have some fruit among you also, even as among other Gentiles.
060113.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎢᏓᎵᏅᏟ ᎥᏝ ᎾᏂᎦᏔᎲᎾᏉ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏱᏨᏰᎵᏎᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎢᏳᏩᎫᏗ ᏓᏇᎪᏔᏅ ᏫᏨᎷᏤᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎤᎦᏔᏔᏅᎯ ᏂᎯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎢᏤᎲ ᎠᎩᎪᏩᏛᏗᏱ ᎠᎩᏰᎸᏒᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎠᏂᏐᎢ ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ ᏓᏁᏩᏗᏒᎢ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᎪᎯ ᎢᏯᏍᏗ ᎠᏆᏓᏄᎴᎭ.
060113.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no i-da-li-nv-tli v-tla na-ni-ga-ta-hv-na-quo ge-se-s-di yi-tsv-ye-li-se-ha, na-s-gi u-tsa-ti i-yu-wa-gu-di da-que-go-ta-nv wi-tsv-lu-tse-di-yi, na-s-gi go-hu-s-di u-ga-ta-ta-nv-hi ni-hi na-s-quo i-tse-hv a-gi-go-wa-dv-di-yi a-gi-ye-lv-sv-gi, na-s-gi-ya nu-s-dv a-ni-so-i tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv yv-wi da-ne-wa-di-sv-i; a-se-no go-hi i-ya-s-di a-qua-da-nu-le-ha.

060114.english: I am debtor both to the Greeks, and to the Barbarians; both to the wise, and to the unwise.
060114.cherokee: ᎬᎩᏚᎦ ᎢᏧᎳ ᎠᏂᎪᎢ ᎠᎴ ᏅᏩᎾᏓᎴ ᏴᏫ, ᎠᏂᎦᏔᎾᎢ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᎦᏔᎾᎢ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ.
060114.phonetic: Gv-gi-du-ga i-tsu-la A-ni-go-i a-le nv-wa-na-da-le yv-wi, a-ni-ga-ta-na-i a-le a-ni-ga-ta-na-i ni-ge-sv-na.

060115.english: So, as much as in me is, I am ready to preach the gospel to you that are at Rome also.
060115.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎢᎬᏆᏛᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎢᎦᎢ, ᎠᏆᏛᏅᎢᏍᏗᏉ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎢᏨᏯᎵᏥᏙᏁᏗᏱ ᎶᎻ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎢᏤᎯ ᏂᎯ.
060115.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di i-gv-qua-dv-ne-di ge-sv i-ga-i, a-qua-dv-nv-i-s-di-quo o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv i-tsv-ya-li-tsi-do-ne-di-yi Lo-mi na-s-quo i-tse-hi ni-hi.

060116.english: For I am not ashamed of the gospel of Christ: for it is the power of God unto salvation to every one that believeth; to the Jew first, and also to the Greek.
060116.cherokee: ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᏱᎦᏕᎣᏍᎦ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ; ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᎬᏁᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᎿ ᎭᎠᎾᎵᏍᏕᎸᏙᏗᏍᎬ ᎾᏂᎥ ᎠᏃᎯᏳᎲᏍᎩ; ᎠᏂᏧᏏ ᎢᎬᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᏂᎪᎢ.
060116.phonetic: V-tla-ye-no yi-ga-de-o-s-ga o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv Ga-lo-ne-dv u-tse-li-ga; na-s-gi-ye-no U-ne-la-nv-hi u-li-ni-gi-di-yu ge-sv gv-ni-ge-sv i-gv-ne-hi, na-s-gi na-hna a-na-li-s-de-lv-do-di-s-gv na-ni-v a-no-hi-yu-hv-s-gi; A-ni-tsu-si i-gv-yi, a-le na-s-quo A-ni-go-i.

060117.english: For therein is the righteousness of God revealed from faith to faith: as it is written, The just shall live by faith.
060117.cherokee: ᎾᎿᎭᏰᏃ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᎬᏁᎸᎯ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎤᏓᏚᏓᎴᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ, ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏅᏛᏓᎴᎲᏍᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏩᏍᏆᏗᏍᏗᏍᎩ; ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏂᎬᏅ ᎪᏪᎸᎢ, ᏚᏳᎪᏛᏍᎩᏂ ᎢᏯᏛᏁᎯ ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏛᏂᏗᏍᏕᏍᏗ.
060117.phonetic: Na-hna-ye-no gv-ni-ge-sv i-gv-ne-lv-hi nu-s-dv u-da-du-da-le-s-do-di ge-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi, go-hi-yu-di ge-sv nv-dv-da-le-hv-s-gi, a-le go-hi-yu-di ge-sv wa-s-qua-di-s-di-s-gi; na-s-gi-ya ni-gv-nv-go-we-lv-i, Du-yu-go-dv-s-gi-ni i-ya-dv-ne-hi go-hi-yu-di ge-sv u-dv-ni-di-s-de-s-di.

060118.english: For the wrath of God is revealed from heaven against all ungodliness and unrighteousness of men, who hold the truth in unrighteousness;
060118.cherokee: ᎤᎾᎳᏅᎯᏰᏃ ᎤᏔᎳᏬᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᎬᏁᎸᎯ ᎦᎸᎶᎢ ᏨᏗᏓᎴᎲᏍᎦ ᏥᏓᎦᏘᎴᎦ ᏄᏓᎴᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏄᏂᎸᏉᏛᎾ ᎨᏒ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᏚᏳᎪᏛᎾ ᎢᏳᎾᏛᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏴᏫ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᏣᏂᎾᎯᏍᏗᎭ ᎤᏲ ᏚᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲᎢ;
060118.phonetic: U-na-la-nv-hi-ye-no u-ta-la-wo-hi-s-di ge-sv gv-ni-ge-sv i-gv-ne-lv-hi ga-lv-lo-i tsv-di-da-le-hv-s-ga tsi-da-ga-ti-le-ga nu-da-le-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi nu-ni-lv-quo-dv-na ge-sv, a-le ni-du-yu-go-dv-na i-yu-na-dv-ne-di ge-sv yv-wi, na-s-gi du-yu-go-dv tsa-ni-na-hi-s-di-ha u-yo du-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv-i;

060119.english: Because that which may be known of God is manifest in them; for God hath shewed it unto them.
060119.cherokee: ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏰᎵ ᎬᎦᏙᎥᎯᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᎬᏁᎸᎯ ᎠᏁᎲᎢ; ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏰᏃ ᏚᎾᏄᎪᏫᏎᎸ.
060119.phonetic: Nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha na-s-gi na U-ne-la-nv-hi ye-li gv-ga-do-v-hi-s-do-di ge-sv gv-ni-ge-sv i-gv-ne-lv-hi a-ne-hv-i; U-ne-la-nv-hi-ye-no du-na-nu-go-wi-se-lv.

060120.english: For the invisible things of him from the creation of the world are clearly seen, being understood by the things that are made, even his eternal power and Godhead; so that they are without excuse:
060120.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᏗᎬᎪᏩᏛᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒ ᏧᏤᎵᎦ ᎬᏂᎨᏒᎢᏳ ᏗᎬᎪᏩᏛᏗ ᎢᎩ ᎡᎶᎯ ᏧᏙᏢᏅ ᏅᏓᎬᏩᏓᎴᏅᏛ, ᏗᎦᎪᎵᏍᏙᏗ ᎢᎩ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏗᎪᏢᏅᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏅᏧᏓᎴᏅᎲᎾ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏗᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎥᏝ ᏳᏂᎭ ᏧᎾᏢᏫᏍᏙᏗ;
060120.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ye-no di-gv-go-wa-dv-di ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv tsu-tse-li-ga gv-ni-ge-sv-i-yu di-gv-go-wa-dv-di i-gi e-lo-hi tsu-do-tlv-nv nv-da-gv-wa-da-le-nv-dv, di-ga-go-li-s-do-di i-gi tsu-da-le-nv-dv di-go-tlv-nv-hi ge-sv-i, na-s-gi nv-tsu-da-le-nv-hv-na u-li-ni-gi-di-yu ge-sv-i, a-le U-ne-la-nv-hi ge-sv-i; na-s-gi i-yu-s-di v-tla yu-ni-ha tsu-na-tlv-wi-s-do-di;

060121.english: Because that, when they knew God, they glorified him not as God, neither were thankful; but became vain in their imaginations, and their foolish heart was darkened.
060121.cherokee: ᎤᏂᎦᏙᎥᏒᏰᏃ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ, ᎥᏝ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎦᎸᏉᏙᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏳᏂᎸᏉᏙᏔᏁᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᏯᎾᎵᎮᎵᎨᎢ, ᎠᎾᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᏎᏉᏉ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏁᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏧᏁᎫ ᏧᏂᎾᏫ ᏚᎵᏏᎲᏎᎢ;
060121.phonetic: U-ni-ga-do-v-sv-ye-no U-ne-la-nv-hi, v-tla U-ne-la-nv-hi ga-lv-quo-do-di ge-sv yu-ni-lv-quo-do-ta-ne-i, v-tla a-le ya-na-li-he-li-ge-i, a-na-da-nv-te-s-gv-s-gi-ni a-se-quo-quo nu-li-s-ta-ne-i, a-le tsu-ne-gu tsu-ni-na-wi du-li-si-hv-se-i;

060122.english: Professing themselves to be wise, they became fools,

060123.english: And changed the glory of the uncorruptible God into an image made like to corruptible man, and to birds, and fourfooted beasts, and creeping things.
060123.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᏁᏟᏴᏎ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᏲᎱᏍᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ, ᎠᏲᎱᏍᎩ ᏴᏫ ᏗᏟᎶᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏄᏅᏁᎴᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏥᏍᏆ, ᎠᎴ ᏅᎩ ᏗᏂᏅᏌᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎾᏓᎾᏏᏂᏙᎯ.
060123.phonetic: A-le u-ni-ne-tli-yv-se ga-lv-quo-di-yu ge-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi a-yo-hu-s-gi ni-ge-sv-na u-tse-li-ga, a-yo-hu-s-gi yv-wi di-tli-lo-s-ta-nv-hi na-s-gi-ya nu-nv-ne-le-i, a-le tsi-s-qua, a-le nv-gi di-ni-nv-sa-di, a-le a-na-da-na-si-ni-do-hi.

060124.english: Wherefore God also gave them up to uncleanness through the lusts of their own hearts, to dishonour their own bodies between themselves:
060124.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏕᎤᏲᏎ ᎦᏓᎭ ᏧᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗᏱ ᎤᏅᏙᏗᏱ ᎤᏅᏒ ᏧᏂᎾᏫᏱ ᎤᎾᏑᎸᏅᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏧᏂᏐᏢᎢᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᏗᏂᏰᎸ ᎤᏅᏒᏉ ᏂᏓᎾᏓᏛᏁᎲᎢ;
060124.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di U-ne-la-nv-hi na-s-quo de-u-yo-se ga-da-ha tsu-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di-yi u-nv-do-di-yi u-nv-sv tsu-ni-na-wi-yi u-na-su-lv-nv-di ge-sv-i, tsu-ni-so-tlv-i-s-do-di-yi di-ni-ye-lv u-nv-sv-quo ni-da-na-da-dv-ne-hv-i;

060125.english: Who changed the truth of God into a lie, and worshipped and served the creature more than the Creator, who is blessed for ever. Amen.
060125.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏃᎮᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᏁᏟᏴᏍᏔᏁ ᎦᏰᎪᎩ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏟ ᎢᎦᎢ ᎤᎾᏓᏙᎵᏍᏓᏁᎴ ᎠᎴ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎤᎾᏛᏁᎴ ᎠᎪᏢᏅᎯᏉ ᎨᏒ ᎡᏍᎦᏉ ᎢᎦᎢ ᎤᏬᏢᏅᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎸᏉᏙᏗ ᏥᎩ ᏂᎪᎯᎸᎢ.  ᎡᎺᏅ.
060125.phonetic: Na-s-gi u-do-hi-yu-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi u-no-he-s-gi u-ni-ne-tli-yv-s-ta-ne ga-ye-go-gi ge-sv-i, a-le u-tli i-ga-i u-na-da-do-li-s-da-ne-le a-le go-hu-s-di u-na-dv-ne-le a-go-tlv-nv-hi-quo ge-sv e-s-ga-quo i-ga-i u-wo-tlv-nv-hi, na-s-gi ga-lv-quo-do-di tsi-gi ni-go-hi-lv-i.  E-me-nv.

060126.english: For this cause God gave them up unto vile affections: for even their women did change the natural use into that which is against nature:
060126.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏕᎤᏲᏒᎩ ᎤᏕᎰᎯᏍᏗ ᎤᎾᏚᎸᏅᏗᏱ; ᎾᏍᏉᏰᏃ ᎠᏂᎨᏴ ᏧᎾᏤᎵᎦ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎲ ᎢᏳᎾᏛᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏂᏁᏟᏴᏍᏔᏁ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎲ ᎢᏳᎾᏛᏁᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ.
060126.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di U-ne-la-nv-hi de-u-yo-sv-gi u-de-ho-hi-s-di u-na-du-lv-nv-di-yi; na-s-quo-ye-no a-ni-ge-yv tsu-na-tse-li-ga na-s-gi a-hv i-yu-na-dv-ne-di ge-sv u-ni-ne-tli-yv-s-ta-ne na-s-gi a-hv i-yu-na-dv-ne-di ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv-i.

060127.english: And likewise also the men, leaving the natural use of the woman, burned in their lust one toward another; men with men working that which is unseemly, and receiving in themselves that recompence of their error which was meet.
060127.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᏂᏍᎦᏯ ᏚᏂᏲᏍᎨ ᎢᏳᎾᏛᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏂᎨᏴ ᎨᎦᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎤᏣᏘ ᏓᎾᏓᏕᎳᏲᏍᎨ ᎤᏅᏒᏉ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎠᏂᏍᎦᏯ ᎠᏂᏍᎦᏯᏉ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏓᎾᏓᏛᏗᏍᎨ ᏚᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎮ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏕᎰᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏅᏒ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎾᎵᏩᏛᎡᎮ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎨᎦᎫᏴᎡᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᎵᏓᏍᏗᏍᎬᎢ.
060127.phonetic: A-le na-s-quo a-ni-s-ga-ya du-ni-yo-s-ge i-yu-na-dv-ne-di ge-sv na-s-gi a-ni-ge-yv ge-ga-ne-la-nv-hi u-gv-wa-li ge-sv-i, u-tsa-ti da-na-da-de-la-yo-s-ge u-nv-sv-quo ge-sv-i; a-ni-s-ga-ya a-ni-s-ga-ya-quo go-hu-s-di da-na-da-dv-di-s-ge du-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-he na-s-gi u-de-ho-hi-s-di ge-sv-i, a-le u-nv-sv ge-sv u-na-li-wa-dv-e-he du-yu-go-dv ge-ga-gu-yv-e-di ge-sv na-s-gi u-ni-li-da-s-di-s-gv-i.

060128.english: And even as they did not like to retain God in their knowledge, God gave them over to a reprobate mind, to do those things which are not convenient;
060128.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎣᏏ ᏄᏂᏰᎸᏒᎾ ᏥᎨᏎ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏂᎦᏙᎥᏒ ᎤᏂᏍᏆᏂᎪᏙᏗᏱ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏕᎤᏲᏎ ᎨᏥᏐᏅᎢᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᎢᏳᎾᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᏚᎾᏓᏅᏛᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎬᏛᏁᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᎾᏛᏁᏗᏱ;
060128.phonetic: A-le na-s-gi O-si nu-ni-ye-lv-sv-na tsi-ge-se nu-s-dv U-ne-la-nv-hi u-ni-ga-do-v-sv u-ni-s-qua-ni-go-do-di-yi, U-ne-la-nv-hi de-u-yo-se ge-tsi-so-nv-i-s-ta-nv-hi i-yu-na-li-s-do-di-yi du-na-da-nv-dv-i, na-s-gi i-gv-dv-ne-di ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv i-yu-na-dv-ne-di-yi;

060129.english: Being filled with all unrighteousness, fornication, wickedness, covetousness, maliciousness; full of envy, murder, debate, deceit, malignity; whisperers,
060129.cherokee: ᎤᏂᎧᎵᏨᎯ ᎨᏒ ᏄᏓᎴᏒ ᏂᏚᏳᎪᏛᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎤᏕᎵᏛ ᏗᏂᏏᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎤᏲ ᎢᏯᏓᏛᏁᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏧᎬᏩᎶᏗ ᎠᎬᎥᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎤᏂᏲ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎤᏂᎧᎵᏨᎯ ᎠᏛᏳᎨᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏗᏓᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏗᏘᏲᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᏠᏄᎮᏛ, ᎤᏲ ᏗᎦᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎠᎾᏙᏅᎢᎯ,
060129.phonetic: U-ni-ka-li-tsv-hi ge-sv nu-da-le-sv ni-du-yu-go-dv-na ge-sv-i, u-de-li-dv di-ni-si-di ge-sv-i, u-yo i-ya-da-dv-ne-di ge-sv-i, tsu-gv-wa-lo-di a-gv-v-hi-s-di ge-sv-i, u-ni-yo ge-sv-i; u-ni-ka-li-tsv-hi a-dv-yu-ge-di ge-sv-i, di-da-hi-s-di ge-sv-i, di-ti-yo-s-di ge-sv-i, a-tlo-nu-he-dv, u-yo di-ga-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di ge-sv-i; a-na-do-nv-i-hi,

060130.english: Backbiters, haters of God, despiteful, proud, boasters, inventors of evil things, disobedient to parents,
060130.cherokee: ᎤᏲ ᏗᎾᏓᏃᎮᎵᏙᎯ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᏂᏂᏆᏘᎯ, ᎬᏩᎾᏓᏐᏢᏗ; ᎤᎾᏢᏉᏗ, ᎤᎾᏢᏆᏌᏗ, ᎠᏃᎷᏩᏘᏍᎩ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎤᏲᎢ, ᏂᏚᏃᎯᏳᏒᎾ ᏧᏂᎦᏴᎵᎨᎢ,
060130.phonetic: U-yo di-na-da-no-he-li-do-hi, U-ne-la-nv-hi a-ni-ni-qua-ti-hi, gv-wa-na-da-so-tlv-di; u-na-tlv-quo-di, u-na-tlv-qua-sa-di, a-no-lu-wa-ti-s-gi tsu-da-le-nv-dv u-yo-i, ni-du-no-hi-yu-sv-na tsu-ni-ga-yv-li-ge-i,

060131.english: Without understanding, covenantbreakers, without natural affection, implacable, unmerciful:
060131.cherokee: ᏄᏃᎵᏣᏛᎾ, ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᏚᎾᏠᎯᏍᏛ ᎠᏂᏲᏍᏗᏍᎩ, ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏧᏅᎾ ᏂᏚᏂᎨᏳᏒᎾ, ᎬᏩᏃᎯᏍᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ, ᏄᎾᏓᏙᎵᏣᏛᎾ;
060131.phonetic: Nu-no-li-tsa-dv-na, ka-no-he-dv du-na-tlo-hi-s-dv a-ni-yo-s-di-s-gi, go-hu-s-di tsu-nv-na ni-du-ni-ge-yu-sv-na, gv-wa-no-hi-s-di ni-ge-sv-na, nu-na-da-do-li-tsa-dv-na;

060132.english: Who knowing the judgment of God, that they which commit such things are worthy of death, not only do the same, but have pleasure in them that do them.
060132.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏣᏂᎦᏔᎭ ᏄᏍᏛ ᏕᎫᎪᏗᏍᎬ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎩᎶ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏧᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯ ᏰᎵᏉ ᏗᎬᏩᏂᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᎾᏍᎩᏉ ᎾᎾᏛᏁᎲ ᎤᏩᏒ ᏱᎩ, ᎣᏏᏳᏍᎩᏂ ᏚᏂᏰᎸᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏯᎾᏛᏁᎯ.
060132.phonetic: Na-s-gi tsa-ni-ga-ta-ha nu-s-dv de-gu-go-di-s-gv U-ne-la-nv-hi, na-s-gi gi-lo na-s-gi i-yu-s-di tsu-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi ye-li-quo di-gv-wa-ni-yo-hu-hi-s-di ge-sv-i, v-tla na-s-gi-quo na-na-dv-ne-hv u-wa-sv yi-gi, o-si-yu-s-gi-ni du-ni-ye-lv-ha na-s-gi i-ya-na-dv-ne-hi.

060201.english: Therefore thou art inexcusable, O man, whosoever thou art that judgest: for wherein thou judgest another, thou condemnest thyself; for thou that judgest doest the same things.
060201.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎥᏝ ᏗᏣᏢᏫᏍᏙᏗ ᏱᏣᎭ, ᏂᎯ ᏴᏫ ᏂᏥᎥᏉ ᏗᏧᎪᏗᏍᎩ; ᎾᎿᎭᏰᏃ ᏅᏩᏓᎴ ᏕᎯᏳᎪᏓᏁᎲ ᏨᏒ ᏕᎭᏓᏚᎪᏓᏁᎭ; ᏂᎯᏰᏃ ᏚᎪᏗᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏂᎭᏛᏁᎭ.
060201.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di v-tla di-tsa-tlv-wi-s-do-di yi-tsa-ha, ni-hi yv-wi ni-tsi-v-quo di-tsu-go-di-s-gi; na-hna-ye-no nv-wa-da-le de-hi-yu-go-da-ne-hv tsv-sv de-ha-da-du-go-da-ne-ha; ni-hi-ye-no du-go-di-s-gi na-s-gi-ya ni-ha-dv-ne-ha.

060202.english: But we are sure that the judgment of God is according to truth against them which commit such things.
060202.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎢᏗᎦᏔᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏕᎫᎪᏗᏍᎬ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏕᎫᎪᏓᏁᎲ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏯᎾᏛᏁᎯ.
060202.phonetic: A-se-no i-di-ga-ta-ha na-s-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi de-gu-go-di-s-gv du-yu-go-dv ge-sv-i, na-s-gi de-gu-go-da-ne-hv na-s-gi i-ya-na-dv-ne-hi.

060203.english: And thinkest thou this, O man, that judgest them which do such things, and doest the same, that thou shalt escape the judgment of God?
060203.cherokee: ᏥᎪᏃ ᎭᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬ ᏂᎯ ᏴᏫ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏚᎪᏓᏁᎯ ᏥᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏯᎾᏛᏁᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎢᎭᏛᏁᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᏔᏚᏓᎳᎡᎵ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏧᏭᎪᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ?
060203.phonetic: Tsi-go-no ha-da-nv-te-s-gv ni-hi yv-wi, na-s-gi du-go-da-ne-hi tsi-gi na-s-gi i-ya-na-dv-ne-hi, a-le na-s-gi-ya i-ha-dv-ne-hi tsi-gi, ta-du-da-la-e-li U-ne-la-nv-hi tsu-wu-go-do-di ge-sv-i?

060204.english: Or despisest thou the riches of his goodness and forbearance and longsuffering; not knowing that the goodness of God leadeth thee to repentance?
060204.cherokee: ᏥᎪᎨ ᏅᎵᏌᎵᏉ ᎯᏰᎸᏍᎦ ᏄᏧᏈᏍᏛ ᎤᏓᏅᏘᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎬᏂᏗᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎪᎯᏗᏳ ᎤᏁᎳᎩ ᏒᎵᏍᎬᎢ, ᏂᎦᏔᎲᎾᏉ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏓᏅᏘᏳ ᎨᏒ ᏣᏘᏁᎬ ᏣᏁᏟᏴᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏣᏓᏅᏛᎢ?
060204.phonetic: Tsi-go-ge nv-li-sa-li-quo hi-ye-lv-s-ga nu-tsu-qui-s-dv u-da-nv-ti-yu ge-sv a-le gv-ni-di-yu ge-sv-i, a-le go-hi-di-yu u-ne-la-gi sv-li-s-gv-i, ni-ga-ta-hv-na-quo ge-sv na-s-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi u-da-nv-ti-yu ge-sv tsa-ti-ne-gv tsa-ne-tli-yv-s-di ge-sv tsa-da-nv-dv-i?

060205.english: But after thy hardness and impenitent heart treasurest up unto thyself wrath against the day of wrath and revelation of the righteous judgment of God;
060205.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏯᏍᎩᏂ ᎯᏍᏓᏱᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᏣᏁᏟᏴᏛ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏣᎾᏫ ᎯᏟᏏᎭ ᎤᏔᎳᏬᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏣᏤᎵ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎢᎦ ᎠᎵᏱᎶᎸᎭ ᎤᏓᎳᏬᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᏧᏭᎪᏙᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎦᎾᏄᎪᏫᏒᎭ;
060205.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ya-s-gi-ni hi-s-da-yi-yu ge-sv a-le tsa-ne-tli-yv-dv ni-ge-sv-na tsa-na-wi hi-tli-si-ha u-ta-la-wo-hi-s-di ge-sv tsa-tse-li i-yu-li-s-do-di na-hi-yu i-ga a-li-yi-lo-lv-ha u-da-la-wo-hi-s-di ge-sv a-le U-ne-la-nv-hi du-yu-go-dv tsu-wu-go-do-di ge-sv ga-na-nu-go-wi-sv-ha;

060206.english: Who will render to every man according to his deeds:
060206.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏂᎥ ᏧᎫᏴᎡᏗ ᏥᎩ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏄᏍᏛ ᏚᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎸᎢ;
060206.phonetic: Na-s-gi na-ni-v tsu-gu-yv-e-di tsi-gi na-s-gi-ya nu-s-dv du-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-lv-i;

060207.english: To them who by patient continuance in well doing seek for glory and honour and immortality, eternal life:
060207.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎣᏍᏛ ᏚᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲ ᏗᏅᏂᏗᏳ ᎬᎾᎢᏒ ᏧᏂᏯᏍᏗᎭ ᏗᎬᏩᎸᏌᏛ ᎠᎴ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎵᏍᏆᏗᏍᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎬᏂᏛ ᏧᎫᏴᏓᏁᏗ ᏥᎩ;
060207.phonetic: Na-s-gi o-s-dv du-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv di-nv-ni-di-yu gv-na-i-sv tsu-ni-ya-s-di-ha di-gv-wa-lv-sa-dv a-le ga-lv-quo-di-yu ge-sv a-le a-yo-hu-hi-s-di ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv-i, a-li-s-qua-di-s-gi ni-ge-sv-na gv-ni-dv tsu-gu-yv-da-ne-di tsi-gi;

060208.english: But unto them that are contentious, and do not obey the truth, but obey unrighteousness, indignation and wrath,
060208.cherokee: Ꮎ-ᏍᎩᏂ [ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ] ᏗᏂᎦᏘᎴᎩ ᏥᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏃᎯᏳᎲᏍᎬᎾ ᏥᎩ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏂᏚᏳᎪᏛᎾᏍᎩᏂ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏃᎯᏳᎲᏍᎩ ᏥᎩ; ᎤᏔᎳᏬᎯᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎤᎿᎭᎸᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏂᎷᏤᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
060208.phonetic: Na--s-gi-ni [U-ne-la-nv-hi] di-ni-ga-ti-le-gi tsi-gi, a-le na-no-hi-yu-hv-s-gv-na tsi-gi du-yu-go-dv ge-sv-i, ni-du-yu-go-dv-na-s-gi-ni ge-sv a-no-hi-yu-hv-s-gi tsi-gi; u-ta-la-wo-hi-s-di a-le u-hna-lv-hi ge-sv u-ni-lu-tse-di ge-se-s-di.

060209.english: Tribulation and anguish, upon every soul of man that doeth evil, of the Jew first, and also of the Gentile;
060209.cherokee: ᎤᏕᏯᏙᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏪᎵᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏂᎷᏤᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎾᏂᎥ ᎠᏂᏏᏴᏫᎭ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏲ ᎢᏯᎾᏛᏁᎯ, ᎠᏂᏧᏏ ᎢᎬᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᏂᎪᎢ;
060209.phonetic: U-de-ya-do-di ge-sv a-le u-we-li-hi-s-di ge-sv u-ni-lu-tse-di ge-se-s-di na-ni-v a-ni-si-yv-wi-ha ge-sv-i, na-s-gi u-yo i-ya-na-dv-ne-hi, A-ni-tsu-si i-gv-yi, a-le na-s-quo A-ni-go-i;

060210.english: But glory, honour, and peace, to every man that worketh good, to the Jew first, and also to the Gentile:
060210.cherokee: ᏗᎬᏩᎸᏌᏛᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᎴ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ, ᎠᎴ ᏅᏩᏙᎯᏯᏛ ᎤᏂᎷᏤᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎾᏂᎥ ᎠᏂᏏᏴᏫᎭ ᎨᏒ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎢᏯᎾᏛᏁᎯ, ᎠᏂᏧᏏ ᎢᎬᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᏂᎪᎢ;
060210.phonetic: Di-gv-wa-lv-sa-dv-s-gi-ni a-le ga-lv-quo-di-yu ge-sv, a-le nv-wa-do-hi-ya-dv u-ni-lu-tse-di ge-se-s-di na-ni-v a-ni-si-yv-wi-ha ge-sv o-s-dv i-ya-na-dv-ne-hi, A-ni-tsu-si i-gv-yi, a-le na-s-quo A-ni-go-i;

060211.english: For there is no respect of persons with God.

060212.english: For as many as have sinned without law shall also perish without law: and as many as have sinned in the law shall be judged by the law;
060212.cherokee: ᎾᏂᎥᏰᏃ ᎩᎶ ᎤᏂᏍᎦᏅᏨᎯ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᏄᏂᎲᎾ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᏂᎬᏔᏅᎾ ᎤᏂᎩᎵᏲᎢᏍᏗ; ᎠᎴ ᎾᏂᎥ ᎩᎶ ᎤᏂᏍᎦᏅᏨᎯ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎤᏂᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎨᎬᏓᏁᏗ ᏗᎨᎫᎪᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ,
060212.phonetic: Na-ni-v-ye-no gi-lo u-ni-s-ga-nv-tsv-hi di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di nu-ni-hv-na na-s-quo di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di ni-gv-ta-nv-na u-ni-gi-li-yo-i-s-di; a-le na-ni-v gi-lo u-ni-s-ga-nv-tsv-hi di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di u-ni-hi, na-s-gi di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di ge-gv-da-ne-di di-ge-gu-go-da-ne-di ge-se-s-di,

060213.english: (For not the hearers of the law are just before God, but the doers of the law shall be justified.
060213.cherokee: ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎠᎾᏛᎩᏍᎩ ᎾᏂᏍᎦᏅᎾ ᏱᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏓᎧᏅᎢ, ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗᏍᎩᏂ ᏂᎦᏪᏍᎬ ᎢᏯᎾᏛᏁᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎾᏚᏓᎴᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
060213.phonetic: V-tla-ye-no di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di a-na-dv-gi-s-gi na-ni-s-ga-nv-na yi-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi da-ka-nv-i, di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di-s-gi-ni ni-ga-we-s-gv i-ya-na-dv-ne-hi na-s-gi u-na-du-da-le-s-di ge-se-s-di.

060214.english: For when the Gentiles, which have not the law, do by nature the things contained in the law, these, having not the law, are a law unto themselves:
060214.cherokee: ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛᏰᏃ ᏴᏫ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᏄᏂᎲᎾ ᏥᎩ, ᎤᏅᏒ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏖᏛ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᏂᎦᏪᏍᎬ ᏱᎾᎾᏛᏁᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ, ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᏄᏂᎲᎾ ᏥᎩ, ᎤᏅᏒᏉ ᎨᏒ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎾᎾᎵᏍᏗᎭ;
060214.phonetic: Tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv-ye-no yv-wi di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di nu-ni-hv-na tsi-gi, u-nv-sv u-na-da-nv-te-dv di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di ni-ga-we-s-gv yi-na-na-dv-ne-ha, na-s-gi hi-a, di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di nu-ni-hv-na tsi-gi, u-nv-sv-quo ge-sv di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di na-na-li-s-di-ha;

060215.english: Which shew the work of the law written in their hearts, their conscience also bearing witness, and their thoughts the mean while accusing or else excusing one another;)
060215.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎾᏅᏁᎭ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᏂᎦᏪᏍᎬ ᎢᏯᏛᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏧᏂᎾᏫᏱ ᎪᏪᎸᎢ, ᏚᎾᏓᏅᏛ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎪᎯᏳᏙᏗᏍᎬᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎾᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬ ᏓᎾᏓᏚᎯᏍᏗᏍᎬ, ᎠᎴ ᏓᎾᏓᏚᏓᎴᏍᎬᎢ.
060215.phonetic: Na-s-gi gv-ni-ge-sv na-nv-ne-ha di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di ni-ga-we-s-gv i-ya-dv-ne-di ge-sv tsu-ni-na-wi-yi go-we-lv-i, du-na-da-nv-dv na-s-quo go-hi-yu-do-di-s-gv-i, a-le a-na-da-nv-te-s-gv da-na-da-du-hi-s-di-s-gv, a-le da-na-da-du-da-le-s-gv-i.

060216.english: In the day when God shall judge the secrets of men by Jesus Christ according to my gospel.
060216.cherokee: ᎾᎯᏳ ᎢᎦ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏕᎵᏛ ᎨᏒ ᏴᏫ ᎤᎾᏤᎵᎦ ᏕᎫᎪᏓᏁᎸᎭ, ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎠᎬᏗᏍᎬᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏂᎦᏪᏍᎬ ᎠᏆᏤᎵ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ.
060216.phonetic: Na-hi-yu i-ga U-ne-la-nv-hi u-de-li-dv ge-sv yv-wi u-na-tse-li-ga de-gu-go-da-ne-lv-ha, Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv a-gv-di-s-gv-i, na-s-gi-ya ni-ga-we-s-gv a-qua-tse-li o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv.

060217.english: Behold, thou art called a Jew, and restest in the law, and makest thy boast of God,
060217.cherokee: ᎬᏂᏳᏉ, ᎠᏧᏏ ᏕᏣᏙᎥ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᏣᎵᏍᎦᏍᏙᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎯᏯᏢᏆᏍᏙᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ,
060217.phonetic: Gv-ni-yu-quo, A-tsu-si de-tsa-do-v, a-le di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di tsa-li-s-ga-s-do-di, a-le hi-ya-tlv-qua-s-do-di U-ne-la-nv-hi,

060218.english: And knowest his will, and approvest the things that are more excellent, being instructed out of the law;
060218.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎯᎦᏔᎭ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎤᏰᎸᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎯᎪᏩᏘᎭ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏧᏓᎴᎿᎭᎢ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎡᏤᏲᏅᎯ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗᏱ;
060218.phonetic: A-le hi-ga-ta-ha nu-s-dv o-si-yu u-ye-lv-di ge-sv-i, a-le hi-go-wa-ti-ha tsu-da-le-nv-dv tsu-da-le-hna-i ge-sv-i, e-tse-yo-nv-hi di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di-yi;

060219.english: And art confident that thou thyself art a guide of the blind, a light of them which are in darkness,
060219.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎥᏝ ᏱᏣᏜᏓᏏᏛᎡᎭ ᏨᏒ ᏔᏘᏂᏙᎯ ᎨᏒ ᏗᏂᎨᏫ, ᎢᎦ ᏔᏘᏍᏓᏁᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎵᏏᎬ ᎠᏂᏂ,
060219.phonetic: A-le v-tla yi-tsa-dla-si-dv-e-ha tsv-sv ta-ti-ni-do-hi ge-sv di-ni-ge-wi, i-ga ta-ti-s-da-ne-hi ge-sv u-li-si-gv a-ni-ni,

060220.english: An instructor of the foolish, a teacher of babes, which hast the form of knowledge and of the truth in the law.
060220.cherokee: ᏖᏲᎲᏍᎩ ᎨᏒ ᏄᎾᏓᏅᏛᎾ, ᏗᏂᏲᎵ ᏖᏲᎲᏍᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏣᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗ ᎠᎦᏙᎥᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎨᏒ ᏗᏟᎶᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗᏱ ᎪᏪᎸᎢ.
060220.phonetic: Te-yo-hv-s-gi ge-sv nu-na-da-nv-dv-na, di-ni-yo-li te-yo-hv-s-gi, na-s-gi tsa-s-qua-ni-go-di a-ga-do-v-hi-s-di ge-sv a-le du-yu-go-dv ge-sv di-tli-lo-s-ta-nv-hi di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di-yi go-we-lv-i.

060221.english: Thou therefore which teachest another, teachest thou not thyself? thou that preachest a man should not steal, dost thou steal?
060221.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏂᎯ ᏅᏩᏓᎴ ᎯᏰᏲᎲᏍᎩ ᏥᎩ, ᏝᏍᎪ ᏨᏒ ᏯᏓᏕᏲᎲᏍᎦ?  ᏂᎯ ᎭᎵᏥᏙᎲᏍᎬ ᏞᏍᏗ ᏣᏃᏍᎩᏒᎩ ᏣᏗᎭ, ᏥᎪ ᎢᎯᏃᏍᎩᎭ?
060221.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no ni-hi nv-wa-da-le hi-ye-yo-hv-s-gi tsi-gi, tla-s-go tsv-sv ya-da-de-yo-hv-s-ga?  Ni-hi ha-li-tsi-do-hv-s-gv tle-s-di tsa-no-s-gi-sv-gi tsa-di-ha, tsi-go i-hi-no-s-gi-ha?

060222.english: Thou that sayest a man should not commit adultery, dost thou commit adultery? thou that abhorrest idols, dost thou commit sacrilege?
060222.cherokee: ᏂᎯ, ᏞᏍᏗ ᏣᏓᏲᏁᎸᎩ ᏣᏗᎭ, ᏥᎪ ᎢᎭᏓᏲᏁᎭ?  ᏂᎯ, ᎤᏁᎴᏅᎯ ᏗᏰᎸᎯ ᏥᏕᎯᏂᏆᏘᎭ, ᏥᎪ ᏂᎯ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎦᎸᏉᏗ ᎯᏐᏢᏗᎭ?
060222.phonetic: Ni-hi, tle-s-di tsa-da-yo-ne-lv-gi tsa-di-ha, tsi-go i-ha-da-yo-ne-ha?  ni-hi, U-ne-le-nv-hi di-ye-lv-hi tsi-de-hi-ni-qua-ti-ha, tsi-go ni-hi go-hu-s-di ga-lv-quo-di hi-so-tlv-di-ha?

060223.english: Thou that makest thy boast of the law, through breaking the law dishonourest thou God?
060223.cherokee: ᏂᎯ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᏣᏢᏆᏙᏗᎭ, ᎯᏲᏍᏗᏍᎬᏍᎪ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎠᏐᏢᎯ ᏂᏴᏁ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ?
060223.phonetic: Ni-hi di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di tsa-tlv-qua-do-di-ha, hi-yo-s-di-s-gv-s-go di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di a-so-tlv-hi ni-yv-ne U-ne-la-nv-hi?

060224.english: For the name of God is blasphemed among the Gentiles through you, as it is written.
060224.cherokee: ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏰᏃ ᏚᏙᎥ ᎬᏩᏂᏐᏢᏗ ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ ᎠᏁᎲᎢ ᏂᎯ ᎢᏨᏂᏌᏛ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏂᎬᏅ ᎪᏪᎸᎢ.
060224.phonetic: U-ne-la-nv-hi-ye-no du-do-v gv-wa-ni-so-tlv-di tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv yv-wi a-ne-hv-i ni-hi i-tsv-ni-sa-dv, na-s-gi-ya ni-gv-nv go-we-lv-i.

060225.english: For circumcision verily profiteth, if thou keep the law: but if thou be a breaker of the law, thy circumcision is made uncircumcision.
060225.cherokee: ᎠᎱᏍᏕᏍᏗᏰᏃ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯ ᏣᏍᏕᎵᎭ ᎢᏳᏃ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᏂᎦᏪᏍᎬ ᏱᎿᎭᏛᏁᎭ; ᎢᏳᏍᎩᏂ ᎯᏲᏍᏗᏍᎩ ᏱᎩ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ, ᎡᏣᎱᏍᏕᏎᎸᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎡᏣᎱᏍᏕᏎᎸᎯᏉ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏗᎭ.
060225.phonetic: A-hu-s-de-s-di-ye-no ge-sv u-do-hi-yu-hi tsa-s-de-li-ha i-yu-no di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di ni-ga-we-s-gv yi-hna-dv-ne-ha; i-yu-s-gi-ni hi-yo-s-di-s-gi yi-gi di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di, e-tsa-hu-s-de-se-lv-hi ge-sv e-tsa-hu-s-de-se-lv-hi-quo ni-ge-sv-na ni-ga-li-s-di-ha.

060226.english: Therefore if the uncircumcision keep the righteousness of the law, shall not his uncircumcision be counted for circumcision?
060226.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎢᏳᏃ ᎠᏥᎤᏍᏕᏎᎸᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏯᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗᎭ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏂᎬᏅᎢ, ᏝᏍᎪ ᎾᏥᎤᏍᏕᏎᎸᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏥᎤᏍᏕᏎᎸᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏥᏰᎸᎾᏁᏗ ᏱᎦᎩ?
060226.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di i-yu-no a-tsi-u-s-de-se-lv-hi ni-ge-sv-na ya-s-qua-ni-go-di-ha di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di na-s-gi-ya ni-gv-nv-i, tla-s-go na-tsi-u-s-de-se-lv-na ge-sv a-tsi-u-s-de-se-lv-hi ge-sv a-tsi-ye-lv-na-ne-di yi-ga-gi?

060227.english: And shall not uncircumcision which is by nature, if it fulfill the law, judge thee, who by the letter and circumcision dost transgress the law?
060227.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏝᏍᎪ ᎠᏥᎤᏍᏕᏎᎸᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏕᏅᏉ ᏄᏍᏛ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎠᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗᏍᎩ ᏱᏙᎨᏧᎪᏓᏏ ᏂᎯ, ᎪᏪᎵ ᎠᎴ ᎠᎱᏍᏕᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏗᎬᏗ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎯᏲᏍᏗᏍᎩ?
060227.phonetic: A-le tla-s-go a-tsi-u-s-de-se-lv-hi ni-ge-sv-na, na-s-gi u-de-nv-quo nu-s-dv di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di a-s-qua-ni-go-di-s-gi yi-do-ge-tsu-go-da-si ni-hi, go-we-li a-le a-hu-s-de-s-di ge-sv di-gv-di di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di hi-yo-s-di-s-gi?

060228.english: For he is not a Jew, which is one outwardly; neither is that circumcision, which is outward in the flesh:
060228.cherokee: ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎠᏧᏏ ᏱᎩ, ᎦᏚᏉ ᎢᏗᏢ ᎠᏧᏏ ᏱᎩ; ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎠᎱᏍᏕᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏱᎩ, ᎦᏚᏉ ᎢᏗᏢ ᎤᏇᏓᎸᏉ ᏱᎩ;
060228.phonetic: V-tla-ye-no na-s-gi na A-tsu-si yi-gi, ga-du-quo i-di-tlv A-tsu-si yi-gi; v-tla a-le na-s-gi na a-hu-s-de-s-di ge-sv yi-gi, ga-du-quo i-di-tlv u-que-da-lv-quo yi-gi;

060229.english: But he is a Jew, which is one inwardly; and circumcision is that of the heart, in the spirit, and not in the letter; whose praise is not of men, but of God.
060229.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏍᎩᏂ Ꮎ ᎠᏧᏏ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎭᏫᏂᏗᏢ ᎠᏧᏏ ᏥᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎠᎱᏍᏕᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎾᏫᏱ ᎡᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᎤᏓᏅᏙᎩᎯ ᎡᎯ, ᎥᏝᏃ ᎪᏪᎵᏉ ᏂᎦᏪᏍᎬ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏕᎩ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎥᏝ ᏴᏫᏉ ᎬᏩᎸᏉᏙᏗ ᏱᎩ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏍᎩᏂ.
060229.phonetic: Na-s-gi-s-gi-ni na A-tsu-si, na-s-gi ha-wi-ni-di-tlv A-tsu-si tsi-gi, a-le na-s-gi na a-hu-s-de-s-di ge-sv u-na-wi-yi e-hi tsi-gi, u-da-nv-do-gi-hi e-hi, v-tla-no go-we-li-quo ni-ga-we-s-gv di-ka-hna-wa-de-gi; na-s-gi v-tla yv-wi-quo gv-wa-lv-quo-do-di yi-gi, U-ne-la-nv-hi-s-gi-ni.

060301.english: What advantage then hath the Jew? or what profit is there of circumcision?
060301.cherokee: ᎦᏙᎨᏃ ᎤᏍᏛ ᎤᏟ ᏄᏛᏅ ᎠᏧᏏ?  ᎠᎴ ᎦᏙ ᎤᏍᏛ ᎬᏩᏓᏍᏕᎸᏗ ᎠᎱᏍᏕᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ?
060301.phonetic: Ga-do-ge-no u-s-dv u-tli nu-dv-nv A-tsu-si?  a-le ga-do u-s-dv gv-wa-da-s-de-lv-di a-hu-s-de-s-di ge-sv-i?

060302.english: Much every way: chiefly, because that unto them were committed the oracles of God.
060302.cherokee: ᎤᏣᏘ ᏂᎦᎥ ᏄᏓᎴᏒᎢ; ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏗᎾ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎨᎦᎨᏅᏴ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏁᏨᎢ.
060302.phonetic: U-tsa-ti ni-ga-v nu-da-le-sv-i; nu-gv-wi-yu-sv a-di-na nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di na-s-gi ge-ga-ge-nv-yv U-ne-la-nv-hi u-ne-tsv-i.

060303.english: For what if some did not believe? shall their unbelief make the faith of God without effect?
060303.cherokee: ᎦᏙᏃ ᎢᏳ ᎢᎦᏛ ᏄᏃᎯᏳᏅᎾ ᏱᎩ?  ᏥᎪ ᏄᏃᎯᏳᏅᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏎᏉᏉ ᏱᏂᎬᎦ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎦᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ?
060303.phonetic: Ga-do-no i-yu i-ga-dv nu-no-hi-yu-nv-na yi-gi?  Tsi-go nu-no-hi-yu-nv-na ge-sv a-se-quo-quo yi-ni-gv-ga U-ne-la-nv-hi ga-go-hi-yu-di ge-sv-i?

060304.english: God forbid: yea, let God be true, but every man a liar; as it is written, That thou mightest be justified in thy sayings, and mightest overcome when thou art judged.
060304.cherokee: ᎬᏩᏟᏍᏗ; ᎥᎥ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎧᏁᎩ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎾᏂᎥᏃ ᏴᏫ ᎠᏂᏰᎪᎩ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ; ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎬᏅ ᎪᏪᎸᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᏍᎦᏅᎾ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎯᏁᎬᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏣᏓᏎᎪᎩᏍᏗᏱ ᎿᎭᏉ ᏕᎱᎪᏔᏅᎭ.
060304.phonetic: Gv-wa-tli-s-di; V-v, U-ne-la-nv-hi du-yu-go-dv ka-ne-gi ge-se-s-di, na-ni-v-no yv-wi a-ni-ye-go-gi ge-se-s-di; Na-s-gi-ya hi-a ni-gv-nv go-we-lv-i, na-s-gi ni-s-ga-nv-na i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi hi-ne-gv-i, a-le tsa-da-se-go-gi-s-di-yi hna-quo de-hu-go-ta-nv-ha.

060305.english: But if our unrighteousness commend the righteousness of God, what shall we say? Is God unrighteous who taketh vengeance? (I speak as a man)
060305.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎢᏳᏃ ᏂᏚᏳᎪᏛᎾ ᏃᎦᏛᏁᎸ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏱᏂᎬᏁᎭ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎢᏯᏛᏁᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ, ᎦᏙ ᏓᏓᏛᏂ?  ᎠᏍᎦᏅᎦᏍᎪ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏓᏍᏛᏗᏍᏙᏗᎭ?  (ᏴᏫᏉ ᎢᏳᏪᏍᏗ ᏂᏥᏪᎭ).
060305.phonetic: A-se-no i-yu-no ni-du-yu-go-dv-na no-ga-dv-ne-lv gv-ni-ge-sv yi-ni-gv-ne-ha du-yu-go-dv i-ya-dv-ne-hi ge-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi, ga-do da-da-dv-ni?  a-s-ga-nv-ga-s-go U-ne-la-nv-hi na-s-gi tsi-da-s-dv-di-s-do-di-ha?  (yv-wi-quo i-yu-we-s-di ni-tsi-we-ha).

060306.english: God forbid: for then how shall God judge the world?
060306.cherokee: ᎬᏩᏟᏍᏗ; ᎢᏳᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏱᏄᏍᏗ ᎦᏙ ᏱᎦᎵᏍᏙᏓ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎡᎶᎯ ᏱᏕᎫᎪᏓᏏ?
060306.phonetic: Gv-wa-tli-s-di; i-yu-ye-no na-s-gi yi-nu-s-di ga-do yi-ga-li-s-do-da U-ne-la-nv-hi e-lo-hi yi-de-gu-go-da-si?

060307.english: For if the truth of God hath more abounded through my lie unto his glory; why yet am I also judged as a sinner?
060307.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏰᏃ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎧᏁᎩ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏟ ᎢᎦᎢ ᎤᏁᏉᏨᎯ ᏱᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᏄᏩᏁᎲᎢ ᎠᏴ ᎦᏥᎪᎲᏍᎬ ᏱᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ, ᎦᏙᏃ ᎠᏴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᏏᏉ ᏛᏊᎪᏓᏁᎭ ᏥᏍᎦᎾ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ?
060307.phonetic: I-yu-ye-no du-yu-go-dv ka-ne-gi ge-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tli i-ga-i u-ne-quo-tsv-hi yi-gi na-s-gi ga-lv-quo-di-yu nu-wa-ne-hv-i a-yv ga-tsi-go-hv-s-gv yi-nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha, ga-do-no a-yv na-s-quo a-si-quo dv-quu-go-da-ne-ha tsi-s-ga-na na-s-gi-ya-i?

060308.english: And not rather, (as we be slanderously reported, and as some affirm that we say,) Let us do evil, that good may come? whose damnation is just.
060308.cherokee: ᎠᎴᏍᎪ ᎥᏝ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏳᎬᏫᏳᎭ, (ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᏲᎩᏐᏢᏛ ᏥᎪᎩᏃᎮᎭ, ᎠᎴ ᎩᎶ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏂᏪ ᏥᎪᎪᏎᎭ,) ᎤᏲ ᏕᎩᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎮᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎵᏰᎢᎸᏍᏗᏱ?  ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᏍᎦᏅᏨ ᏧᎾᏚᎪᏓᏁᏗᏱ ᏚᏳᎪᏗ.
060308.phonetic: A-le-s-go v-tla na-s-gi hi-a yu-gv-wi-yu-ha, (na-s-gi ga-yo-gi-so-tlv-dv tsi-go-gi-no-he-ha, a-le gi-lo na-s-gi na-ni-we tsi-go-go-se-ha,) U-yo de-gi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-he-s-di na-s-gi o-s-dv ge-sv u-li-ye-i-lv-s-di-yi?  na-s-gi u-ni-s-ga-nv-tsv tsu-na-du-go-da-ne-di-yi du-yu-go-di.

060309.english: What then? are we better than they? No, in no wise: for we have before proved both Jews and Gentiles, that they are all under sin;
060309.cherokee: ᎦᏙᎨ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎭ?  ᎤᏟᏍᎪ ᏂᏙᎯ?  ᎥᏝ ᎤᏍᏗᎩᏛ ᎤᏅ; ᎦᏳᎳᏰᏃ ᏕᎫᎪᏔᏅ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏧᎳ ᎠᏂᏧᏏ ᎠᎴ ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ, ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᎠᏍᎦᏅᎢᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎾᏓᏄᏴᏛᎢ.
060309.phonetic: Ga-do-ge u-gv-wi-yu-ha?  u-tli-s-go ni-do-hi?  V-tla u-s-di-gi-dv u-nv; ga-yu-la-ye-no de-gu-go-ta-nv na-s-gi i-tsu-la A-ni-tsu-si a-le tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv yv-wi, ni-ga-di-yu a-s-ga-nv-i-s-di ge-sv u-na-da-nu-yv-dv-i.

060310.english: As it is written, There is none righteous, no, not one:
060310.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏂᎬᏅ ᏥᎪᏪᎳ, ᎥᏝ ᎩᎶ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎢᏯᏛᏁᎯ ᏱᎩ, ᎥᏝ, ᏌᏉ ᎤᏅ.
060310.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ya hi-a tsi-ni-gv-nv tsi-go-we-la, V-tla gi-lo o-si-yu i-ya-dv-ne-hi yi-gi, v-tla, sa-quo u-nv.

060311.english: There is none that understandeth, there is none that seeketh after God.
060311.cherokee: ᎥᏝ ᎩᎶ ᎪᎵᎩ ᏱᎩ; ᎥᏝ ᎩᎶ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏲᎯ ᏱᎩ.
060311.phonetic: V-tla gi-lo go-li-gi yi-gi; v-tla gi-lo U-ne-la-nv-hi u-yo-hi yi-gi.

060312.english: They are all gone out of the way, they are together become unprofitable; there is none that doeth good, no, not one.
060312.cherokee: ᎾᏂᎥᏉ ᎤᎾᏞᏒ ᎦᏅᏅᎢ, ᎢᏳᎾᏍᏗᎭᏉ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏗᎬᏙᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏄᎾᎵᏍᏔᏅ; ᎥᏝ ᎩᎶ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎢᏯᏛᏁᎯ ᏱᎩ, ᎥᏝ ᏌᏉ ᎤᏅ.
060312.phonetic: Na-ni-v-quo u-na-tle-sv ga-nv-nv-i, i-yu-na-s-di-ha-quo go-hu-s-di di-gv-do-di ni-ge-sv-na nu-na-li-s-ta-nv; v-tla gi-lo o-si-yu i-ya-dv-ne-hi yi-gi, v-tla sa-quo u-nv.

060313.english: Their throat is an open sepulchre; with their tongues they have used deceit; the poison of asps is under their lips:
060313.cherokee: ᎤᏂᎩᏍᏗᏱ ᏗᏓᏂᏐᏗᏱ ᎤᎵᏍᏚᎢᏛ ᏥᎨᏐ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ; ᏗᏂᏃᎪᎢ ᎠᎾᏓᎶᏄᎮᏗᏍᎪᎢ, ᎢᎾᏛ ᏚᏂᏁᎲ ᎠᏓᎯᎯ ᏚᏂᎭᏁᎦᎸ ᎭᏫᏂᏗᏢ ᏚᏂᏁᎭ.
060313.phonetic: U-ni-gi-s-di-yi di-da-ni-so-di-yi u-li-s-du-i-dv tsi-ge-so na-s-gi-ya-i; di-ni-no-go-i a-na-da-lo-nu-he-di-s-go-i, i-na-dv du-ni-ne-hv a-da-hi-hi du-ni-ha-ne-ga-lv ha-wi-ni-di-tlv du-ni-ne-ha.

060314.english: Whose mouth is full of cursing and bitterness:
060314.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᏂᎰᎵ ᏗᎧᎵᏬᎯ ᎠᏓᏍᎩᏅᏗᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏴᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
060314.phonetic: Na-s-gi di-ni-ho-li di-ka-li-wo-hi a-da-s-gi-nv-di-s-di ge-sv a-le u-yv-s-di ge-sv-i.

060315.english: Their feet are swift to shed blood:

060316.english: Destruction and misery are in their ways:
060316.cherokee: ᎠᏛᏗᏍᎩ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏲ ᎠᏓᏅᏓᏗᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏔᎵ ᎤᏛᏗᏕᎪ ᎠᏁᏙᎲᎢ.
060316.phonetic: A-dv-di-s-gi ge-sv a-le u-yo a-da-nv-da-di-s-di ge-sv ta-li u-dv-di-de-go a-ne-do-hv-i.

060317.english: And the way of peace have they not known:

060318.english: There is no fear of God before their eyes.
060318.cherokee: ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎦᎾᏰᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎥᏝ ᎢᎬᏱᏗᏢ ᏱᏄᏍᏗ ᏗᏂᎧᏅᎢ.
060318.phonetic: U-ne-la-nv-hi ga-na-ye-hi-s-di ge-sv v-tla i-gv-yi-di-tlv yi-nu-s-di di-ni-ka-nv-i.

060319.english: Now we know that what things soever the law saith, it saith to them who are under the law: that every mouth may be stopped, and all the world may become guilty before God.
060319.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎢᏗᎦᏔᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎦᎥ ᏂᎦᏪᏍᎬ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎤᏂᏁᏤᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎨᏥᏁᏄᎯ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏂᎥ ᏗᏂᎰᎵ ᏗᎨᏥᏍᏚᏁᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᎡᎳᏂᎬ ᎠᏁᎯ ᎤᏂᏍᎦᏅᏨᎯ ᏧᏚᎪᏔᏅᎯ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎦᏔᎲᎢ.
060319.phonetic: A-le i-di-ga-ta-ha na-s-gi ni-ga-v ni-ga-we-s-gv di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di u-ni-ne-tse-ha na-s-gi di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di ge-tsi-ne-nu-hi; na-s-gi na-ni-v di-ni-ho-li di-ge-tsi-s-du-ne-di-yi, a-le e-la-ni-gv a-ne-hi u-ni-s-ga-nv-tsv-hi tsu-du-go-ta-nv-hi i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi U-ne-la-nv-hi a-ga-ta-hv-i.

060320.english: Therefore by the deeds of the law there shall no flesh be justified in his sight: for by the law is the knowledge of sin.
060320.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᏂᎦᏪᏍᎬ ᏄᏛᏁᎲ ᎥᏝ ᎩᎶ ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᏴᎬᏚᏓᎴᏍᏓ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎦᏔᎲᎢ; ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗᏰᏃ ᎠᏍᎦᏅᎢᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎦᏙᎥᎯᏍᏙᏗ.
060320.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di ni-ga-we-s-gv nu-dv-ne-hv v-tla gi-lo u-que-da-li yv-gv-du-da-le-s-da na-s-gi a-ga-ta-hv-i; di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di-ye-no a-s-ga-nv-i-s-di ge-sv a-ga-do-v-hi-s-do-di.

060321.english: But now the righteousness of God without the law is manifested, being witnessed by the law and the prophets;
060321.cherokee: ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏓᏚᏓᎴᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏒ, ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎬᏙᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ, ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᎬᏁᎸᎯ, ᎪᎯᏳᏙᏔᏅᎯ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎠᎾᏙᎴᎰᏍᎬ ᏚᏃᏪᎸᎢ;
060321.phonetic: U-ne-la-nv-hi-s-gi-ni u-da-du-da-le-s-do-di ge-sv, di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di gv-do-di ni-ge-sv-na, gv-ni-ge-sv i-gv-ne-lv-hi, go-hi-yu-do-ta-nv-hi di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di a-le a-na-do-le-ho-s-gv du-no-we-lv-i;

060322.english: Even the righteousness of God which is by faith of Jesus Christ unto all and upon all them that believe: for there is no difference:
060322.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏓᎦᏓᎴᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᏨᏗᏓᎴᎲᏍᎦ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏂᎥ ᎠᏃᎯᏳᎲᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᎷᏤᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏂᎥ ᎤᎾᏤᎵ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗ ᏥᎩ; ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᏧᎾᏓᎴᎿᎭᎢ ᏱᎩ;
060322.phonetic: Na-s-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi u-da-ga-da-le-s-di ge-sv-i, na-s-gi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv go-hi-yu-di tsv-di-da-le-hv-s-ga, a-le na-s-gi na-ni-v a-no-hi-yu-hv-s-gi u-ni-lu-tse-di a-le na-s-gi na-ni-v u-na-tse-li i-yu-li-s-do-di tsi-gi; v-tla-ye-no tsu-na-da-le-hna-i yi-gi;

060323.english: For all have sinned, and come short of the glory of God;
060323.cherokee: ᏂᎦᏗᏳᏰᏃ ᎤᏂᏍᎦᏅᏨᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎡᏍᎦ ᎤᏃᎭᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏓᎸᏉᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ;
060323.phonetic: Ni-ga-di-yu-ye-no u-ni-s-ga-nv-tsv-hi, a-le e-s-ga u-no-ha-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi u-da-lv-quo-do-di ge-sv-i;

060324.english: Being justified freely by his grace through the redemption that is in Christ Jesus:
060324.cherokee: ᎨᎫᏓᎴᏛ ᏂᏗᎨᏥᎬᏩᎶᏓᏁᎸᎾ ᎬᏔᏅᎯ ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏅᏓᏳᏓᎴᏅᎯ ᎠᎫᏴᏙᎢ ᎨᏒ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏥᏌ ᎤᏪᎲᎢ;
060324.phonetic: Ge-gu-da-le-dv ni-di-ge-tsi-gv-wa-lo-da-ne-lv-na gv-ta-nv-hi gv-wa-ga-ti-ya u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv nv-da-yu-da-le-nv-hi a-gu-yv-do-i ge-sv Ga-lo-ne-dv Tsi-sa u-we-hv-i;

060325.english: Whom God hath set forth to be a propitiation through faith in his blood, to declare his righteousness for the remission of sins that are past, through the forbearance of God;
060325.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ [ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ] ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏥᏄᏩᏁᎸ ᎠᎵᏍᎪᎸᏔᏅᎯ ᎪᎯᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎪᎯᏳᏗᏱ ᎤᎩᎬ; ᏧᎾᏄᎪᏫᏎᏗᏱ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎢᏯᏛᏁᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᏳᎳ ᎠᏍᎦᏅᏨᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎦᎬᏩᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎬᏂᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏅᎯ;
060325.phonetic: Na-s-gi [Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv] U-ne-la-nv-hi gv-ni-ge-sv tsi-nu-wa-ne-lv a-li-s-go-lv-ta-nv-hi go-hi-s-do-di ge-sv-i, na-s-gi go-hi-yu-di-yi u-gi-gv; tsu-na-nu-go-wi-se-di-yi na-s-gi du-yu-go-dv i-ya-dv-ne-hi ge-sv-i, na-s-gi ga-yu-la a-s-ga-nv-tsv-hi ge-sv ga-gv-wa-da-ne-di ge-sv-i, na-s-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi gv-ni-di-yu ge-sv i-yu-wa-ni-sa-nv-hi;

060326.english: To declare, I say, at this time his righteousness: that he might be just, and the justifier of him which believeth in Jesus.
060326.cherokee: ᏧᎾᏄᎪᏫᏎᏗᏱ ᎪᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎢᏯᏛᏁᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎢᏯᏛᏁᎯ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᎫᏓᎴᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎪᎯᏳᎲᏍᎩ ᏥᏌ.
060326.phonetic: Tsu-na-nu-go-wi-se-di-yi go-hi ge-sv na-s-gi du-yu-go-dv i-ya-dv-ne-hi ge-sv-i; na-s-gi du-yu-go-dv i-ya-dv-ne-hi i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi, a-le gu-da-le-s-gi na-s-gi na go-hi-yu-hv-s-gi Tsi-sa.

060327.english: Where is boasting then? It is excluded. By what law? of works? Nay: but by the law of faith.
060327.cherokee: ᎭᏢᎨᏃ ᎠᏢᏆᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ?  ᎢᏴᏛ ᎢᎬᏁᎸᎯ.  ᎦᏙ ᎤᏍᏗ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎬᏔᏅᎯ?  ᏗᎦᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗᏱᏍᎪ ᎠᏓᏁᏤᎯ?  ᎥᏝ; ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗᏍᎩᏂ ᎬᏔᏅᎯ ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏓᏁᏤᎯ.
060327.phonetic: Ha-tlv-ge-no a-tlv-qua-s-di ge-sv-i?  I-yv-dv i-gv-ne-lv-hi.  Ga-do u-s-di di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di gv-ta-nv-hi?  di-ga-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di-yi-s-go a-da-ne-tse-hi?  V-tla; di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di-s-gi-ni gv-ta-nv-hi go-hi-yu-di ge-sv a-da-ne-tse-hi.

060328.english: Therefore we conclude that a man is justified by faith without the deeds of the law.
060328.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏕᏚᎪᏗᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏴᏫ ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏚᏓᎴᏍᏗᏍᎬ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᏂᎬᏅ ᏄᏛᏁᎸᎾ.
060328.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di de-du-go-di-ha na-s-gi yv-wi go-hi-yu-di ge-sv a-du-da-le-s-di-s-gv di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di ni-gv-nv nu-dv-ne-lv-na.

060329.english: Is he the God of the Jews only? is he not also of the Gentiles? Yes, of the Gentiles also:
060329.cherokee: ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏍᎪ ᎠᏂᏧᏏᏉ ᎤᏅᏒ ᎤᎾᏤᎵᎦ?  ᏝᏍᎪ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ ᎤᎾᏤᎵᎦ ᏱᎩ?  ᎥᎥ, ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏴᏫ ᎤᎾᏤᎵᎦ.
060329.phonetic: U-ne-la-nv-hi-s-go A-ni-tsu-si-quo u-nv-sv u-na-tse-li-ga?  tla-s-go na-s-quo tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv yv-wi u-na-tse-li-ga yi-gi?  V-v, tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv na-s-quo yv-wi u-na-tse-li-ga.

060330.english: Seeing it is one God, which shall justify the circumcision by faith, and uncircumcision through faith.
060330.cherokee: ᏌᏉᎯᏳᏰᏃ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏥᏕᎫᏓᎴᏍᏗᎭ ᏗᎨᏥᎤᏍᏕᏎᎸᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᏗᎨᏥᎤᏍᏕᏎᎸᎾ ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏥᏕᎫᏓᎴᏍᏗᎭ.
060330.phonetic: Sa-quo-hi-yu-ye-no U-ne-la-nv-hi na-s-gi go-hi-yu-di ge-sv tsi-de-gu-da-le-s-di-ha di-ge-tsi-u-s-de-se-lv-hi, a-le ni-di-ge-tsi-u-s-de-se-lv-na go-hi-yu-di ge-sv tsi-de-gu-da-le-s-di-ha.

060331.english: Do we then make void the law through faith? God forbid: yea, we establish the law.
060331.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏍᎪᏃ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎠᏎᏉᏉ ᏂᏛᏁᎭ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏛᏗᎭ?  ᎬᏩᏟᏍᏗ; ᎢᏗᏍᏓᏱᏗᏍᎩᏂ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ.
060331.phonetic: Na-s-gi-s-go-no i-yu-s-di a-se-quo-quo ni-dv-ne-ha di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di go-hi-yu-di ge-sv i-dv-di-ha?  Gv-wa-tli-s-di; i-di-s-da-yi-di-s-gi-ni di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di.

060401.english: What shall we say then that Abraham our father, as pertaining to the flesh, hath found?
060401.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏥᏄᏍᏗ ᎦᏙ ᏓᏓᏛᏂ ᎡᏆᎭᎻ ᎢᎩᏙᏓ ᎤᏩᏛᎲ ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᎨᏒ ᏅᏓᏳᏓᎴᏅᏛ?
060401.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no tsi-nu-s-di ga-do da-da-dv-ni E-qua-ha-mi i-gi-do-da u-wa-dv-hv u-que-da-li ge-sv nv-da-yu-da-le-nv-dv?

060402.english: For if Abraham were justified by works, he hath whereof to glory; but not before God.
060402.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏰᏃ ᎡᏆᎭᎻ ᏚᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲ ᎤᏚᏓᎴᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᏱᎩ, ᎤᎭ ᎤᏢᏈᏍᏙᏗ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᎥᏝ [ᏳᎭ,] ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎦᏔᎲᎢ.
060402.phonetic: I-yu-ye-no E-qua-ha-mi du-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv u-du-da-le-s-ta-nv-hi yi-gi, u-ha u-tlv-qui-s-do-di; a-se-no v-tla [yu-ha,] U-ne-la-nv-hi a-ga-ta-hv-i.

060403.english: For what saith the scripture? Abraham believed God, and it was counted unto him for righteousness.
060403.cherokee: ᎦᏙᏰᏃ ᎠᏗᎭ ᎦᎸᏉᏗ ᎪᏪᎵ?  ᎡᏆᎭᎻ ᎤᏬᎯᏳᏁ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎢᏯᏛᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏥᏰᎸᎾᏁᎴᎢ.
060403.phonetic: Ga-do-ye-no a-di-ha ga-lv-quo-di go-we-li?  E-qua-ha-mi u-wo-hi-yu-ne U-ne-la-nv-hi, na-s-gi-no du-yu-go-dv i-ya-dv-ne-di ge-sv a-tsi-ye-lv-na-ne-le-i.

060404.english: Now to him that worketh is the reward not reckoned of grace, but of debt.
060404.cherokee: ᎩᎶᏰᏃ ᏧᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯ ᎠᎦᎫᏴᎡᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎥᏝ ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏱᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎪ ᎤᏤᎵ ᏯᏥᏰᎸᎾᏁᎰᎢ, ᎤᏓᏚᎬᏍᎩᏂ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎪ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎠᏥᏰᎸᎾᏁᎰᎢ.
060404.phonetic: Gi-lo-ye-no tsu-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi a-ga-gu-yv-e-di ge-sv v-tla gv-wa-ga-ti-ya u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv yi-nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-go u-tse-li ya-tsi-ye-lv-na-ne-ho-i, u-da-du-gv-s-gi-ni nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-go u-tse-li a-tsi-ye-lv-na-ne-ho-i.

060405.english: But to him that worketh not, but believeth on him that justifieth the ungodly, his faith is counted for righteousness.
060405.cherokee: Ꮎ-ᏍᎩᏂ ᏂᏚᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲᎾ, ᎪᎯᏳᎲᏍᎩᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎫᏓᎴᏍᎩ ᎠᏍᎦᎾᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏬᎯᏳᏒ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎢᏯᏛᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏥᏰᎸᎾᏁᎰᎢ.
060405.phonetic: Na--s-gi-ni ni-du-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv-na, go-hi-yu-hv-s-gi-quo-s-gi-ni na-s-gi na gu-da-le-s-gi a-s-ga-na-i, na-s-gi u-wo-hi-yu-sv du-yu-go-dv i-ya-dv-ne-di ge-sv a-tsi-ye-lv-na-ne-ho-i.

060406.english: Even as David also describeth the blessedness of the man, unto whom God imputeth righteousness without works,
060406.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏕᏫ ᏥᎧᏁᎢᏍᏗᎭ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏴᏫ, ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎢᏯᏛᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎤᏰᎸᎾᏁᎭ ᏂᏚᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎸᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ,
060406.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ya na-s-quo De-wi tsi-ka-ne-i-s-di-ha o-s-dv i-yu-li-s-da-ne-di ge-sv yv-wi, na-s-gi na U-ne-la-nv-hi du-yu-go-dv i-ya-dv-ne-di ge-sv na-s-gi-ya u-ye-lv-na-ne-ha ni-du-lv-wi-s-da-ne-lv-na ge-sv-i,

060407.english: Saying, Blessed are they whose iniquities are forgiven, and whose sins are covered.
060407.cherokee: [ᎯᎠ ᏥᏂᎦᏪᎭ,] ᎣᏏᏳ ᎢᏳᎾᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎤᏂᏍᎦᏅᏨ ᎦᎨᏥᏁᎸᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏲ ᏄᎾᏛᏁᎸ ᎨᎫᏢᎾᏁᎸᎯ;
060407.phonetic: [Hi-a tsi-ni-ga-we-ha,] O-si-yu i-yu-na-li-s-da-ne-di u-ni-s-ga-nv-tsv ga-ge-tsi-ne-lv-hi, a-le u-yo nu-na-dv-ne-lv ge-gu-tlv-na-ne-lv-hi;

060408.english: Blessed is the man to whom the Lord will not impute sin.
060408.cherokee: ᎣᏏ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᏴᏫ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎤᏍᎦᏅᏨ ᏄᏭᎪᏍᏗᏍᎬᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ.
060408.phonetic: O-si i-yu-li-s-da-ne-di yv-wi na-s-gi na U-gv-wi-yu-hi u-s-ga-nv-tsv nu-wu-go-s-di-s-gv-na ge-sv-i.

060409.english: Cometh this blessedness then upon the circumcision only, or upon the uncircumcision also? for we say that faith was reckoned to Abraham for righteousness.
060409.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎢᏳᏓᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏗᎨᏥᎤᏍᏕᏎᎸᎯᏉᏍᎪ ᎤᏂᎷᏤᎭ, ᏥᎪᎨ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏗᎨᏥᎤᏍᏕᏎᎸᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ?  ᎪᎯᏳᏗᏰᏃ ᎨᏒ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎢᏯᏛᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏥᏰᎸᎾᏁᎴ ᎡᏆᎭᎻ ᎢᏓᏗᎭ.
060409.phonetic: Hi-a-no na-s-gi o-si-yu i-yu-da-li-s-da-ne-di ge-sv di-ge-tsi-u-s-de-se-lv-hi-quo-s-go u-ni-lu-tse-ha, tsi-go-ge na-s-quo di-ge-tsi-u-s-de-se-lv-hi ni-ge-sv-na?  Go-hi-yu-di-ye-no ge-sv du-yu-go-dv i-ya-dv-ne-di ge-sv a-tsi-ye-lv-na-ne-le E-qua-ha-mi i-da-di-ha.

060410.english: How was it then reckoned? when he was in circumcision, or in uncircumcision? Not in circumcision, but in uncircumcision.
060410.cherokee: ᎢᎳᎩᏳᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᏍᏕ ᎠᏥᏰᎸᎾᏁᎴᎢ?  ᏥᎪ ᎠᏥᎤᏍᏕᏎᎸᎯ ᏥᎨᏎᎢ?  ᏥᎪᎨ ᎠᏥᎤᏍᏕᏎᎸᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏥᎨᏎᎢ?  ᎥᏝ ᎠᏥᎤᏍᏕᏎᎸᎯ ᏥᎨᏎᎢ, ᎠᏥᎤᏍᏕᏎᎸᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏥᎨᏎᎢ.
060410.phonetic: I-la-gi-yu-no na-s-gi nu-s-de a-tsi-ye-lv-na-ne-le-i?  tsi-go a-tsi-u-s-de-se-lv-hi tsi-ge-se-i?  tsi-go-ge a-tsi-u-s-de-se-lv-hi ni-ge-sv-na tsi-ge-se-i?  V-tla a-tsi-u-s-de-se-lv-hi tsi-ge-se-i, a-tsi-u-s-de-se-lv-hi-s-gi-ni ni-ge-sv-na tsi-ge-se-i.

060411.english: And he received the sign of circumcision, a seal of the righteousness of the faith which he had yet being uncircumcised: that he might be the father of all them that believe, though they be not circumcised; that righteousness might be imputed unto them also:
060411.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎠᏥᏁᎴ ᎠᎱᏍᏕᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏰᎸᏛᎢ, ᎠᏍᏓᏱᏗᏍᎩ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎢᏯᏛᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏥᏰᎸᎾᏁᎲᎢ ᏅᏓᏳᏓᎴᏅᎯ ᎤᏬᎯᏳᏒ ᎠᏏ ᎾᏥᎤᏍᏕᏎᎸᎾ ᏥᎨᏎᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᏙᏓ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎾᏂᎥ ᎠᏃᎯᏳᎲᏍᎩ, ᏂᏗᎨᏥᎤᏍᏕᏎᎸᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎢᏯᏛᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎨᏥᏰᎸᎾᏁᏗᏱ;
060411.phonetic: A-le a-tsi-ne-le a-hu-s-de-s-di ge-sv u-ye-lv-dv-i, a-s-da-yi-di-s-gi du-yu-go-dv i-ya-dv-ne-di ge-sv a-tsi-ye-lv-na-ne-hv-i nv-da-yu-da-le-nv-hi u-wo-hi-yu-sv a-si na-tsi-u-s-de-se-lv-na tsi-ge-se-i; na-s-gi u-ni-do-da i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi na-ni-v a-no-hi-yu-hv-s-gi, ni-di-ge-tsi-u-s-de-se-lv-na ge-sv-i; na-s-gi du-yu-go-dv i-ya-dv-ne-di ge-sv na-s-gi na-s-quo ge-tsi-ye-lv-na-ne-di-yi;

060412.english: And the father of circumcision to them who are not of the circumcision only, but who also walk in the steps of that faith of our father Abraham, which he had being yet uncircumcised.
060412.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏗᎨᏥᎤᏍᏕᏎᎸᎯ ᎤᏂᏙᏓ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᎨᏥᎤᏍᏕᏎᎸᎯ ᎤᏩᏒ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏥᎩ, ᎾᏍᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᏂᏍᏓᏩᏕᎩ ᏥᎩ ᏚᎳᏏᏅᏒ ᎢᎩᏙᏓ ᎡᏆᎭᎻ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏬᎯᏳᏎ ᎠᏥᎤᏍᏕᏎᎸᎯ ᎠᏏ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏥᎨᏎᎢ.
060412.phonetic: A-le na-s-quo di-ge-tsi-u-s-de-se-lv-hi u-ni-do-da i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi, na-s-gi di-ge-tsi-u-s-de-se-lv-hi u-wa-sv ni-ge-sv-na tsi-gi, na-s-quo-s-gi-ni a-ni-s-da-wa-de-gi tsi-gi du-la-si-nv-sv i-gi-do-da E-qua-ha-mi, na-s-gi tsu-wo-hi-yu-se a-tsi-u-s-de-se-lv-hi a-si ni-ge-sv-na tsi-ge-se-i.

060413.english: For the promise, that he should be the heir of the world, was not to Abraham, or to his seed, through the law, but through the righteousness of faith.
060413.cherokee: ᏣᏥᏚᎢᏍᏓᏁᎴᏰᏃ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎡᎶᎯ, ᎥᏝ ᎡᏆᎭᎻ ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᏢᏔᏅᏛ ᎨᏒ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᏅᏓᏳᏓᎴᏅᎯ ᏱᎨᏎᎢ, ᎪᎯᏳᏗᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᏚᏓᎴᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏅᏓᏳᏓᎴᏅᎯ ᎨᏎᎢ.
060413.phonetic: Tsa-tsi-du-i-s-da-ne-le-ye-no u-tse-li i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi e-lo-hi, v-tla E-qua-ha-mi a-le na-s-gi u-ne-tlv-ta-nv-dv ge-sv di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di nv-da-yu-da-le-nv-hi yi-ge-se-i, go-hi-yu-di-s-gi-ni a-du-da-le-s-do-di ge-sv nv-da-yu-da-le-nv-hi ge-se-i.

060414.english: For if they which are of the law be heirs, faith is made void, and the promise made of none effect:
060414.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏰᏃ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎠᎾᎵᏍᎦᏍᏙᏗᏍᎩ ᎤᎾᏤᎵ ᏱᏂᎨᎬᏁᎭ, ᎿᎭᏉ ᎠᏎᏉ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏗᎭ ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏚᎢᏍᏛ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎬᎪᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏗᎭ.
060414.phonetic: I-yu-ye-no di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di a-na-li-s-ga-s-do-di-s-gi u-na-tse-li yi-ni-ge-gv-ne-ha, hna-quo a-se-quo ni-ga-li-s-di-ha go-hi-yu-di ge-sv-i, a-le a-du-i-s-dv go-hu-s-di gv-go-di ni-ge-sv-na ni-ga-li-s-di-ha.

060415.english: Because the law worketh wrath: for where no law is, there is no transgression.
060415.cherokee: ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗᏰᏃ ᎤᏔᎳᏬᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏩᎵᏰᎢᎶᎯᎭ; ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗᏰᏃ ᎾᎿᎭᎾᎲᎾ ᎨᏒ, ᎾᎿᎭᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎠᏲᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎥᏝ ᏰᎭ.
060415.phonetic: Di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di-ye-no u-ta-la-wo-hi-s-di ge-sv wa-li-ye-i-lo-hi-ha; di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di-ye-no na-hna na-hv-na ge-sv, na-hna di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di a-yo-s-do-di ge-sv v-tla ye-ha.

060416.english: Therefore it is of faith, that it might be by grace; to the end the promise might be sure to all the seed; not to that only which is of the law, but to that also which is of the faith of Abraham; who is the father of us all,
060416.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎵᏍᎦᏍᏙᏗᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏅᏓᏳᏓᎴᏗᏱ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏚᎢᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏗᏳ ᎢᏳᎾᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗᏱ ᎾᏂᎥ ᎤᏁᏢᏔᏅᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎥᏝ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏅᏒ ᏧᏁᏢᏔᏅᏛ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᏂᎬᏅᎢ, ᎾᏍᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏁᏢᏔᏅᏛ ᎨᏒ ᎡᏆᎭᎻ ᎤᏬᎯᏳᏒ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎤᏃᎯᏳᏅᎯ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎡᏆᎭᎻ ᏂᏗᎥ ᎢᎩᏙᏓ ᏥᎩ,
060416.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di go-hi-yu-di ge-sv a-li-s-ga-s-do-di-ha, na-s-gi gv-wa-ga-ti-ya u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv nv-da-yu-da-le-di-yi; na-s-gi a-du-i-s-ta-nv-hi ge-sv u-li-ni-gi-di-yu i-yu-na-li-s-da-ne-di-yi na-ni-v u-ne-tlv-ta-nv-dv ge-sv-i; v-tla na-s-gi u-nv-sv tsu-ne-tlv-ta-nv-dv ge-sv na-s-gi-ya di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di ni-gv-nv-i, na-s-quo-s-gi-ni na-s-gi tsu-ne-tlv-ta-nv-dv ge-sv E-qua-ha-mi u-wo-hi-yu-sv na-s-gi-ya u-no-hi-yu-nv-hi i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv, na-s-gi E-qua-ha-mi ni-di-v i-gi-do-da tsi-gi,

060417.english: (As it is written, I have made thee a father of many nations,) before him whom he believed, even God, who quickeneth the dead, and calleth those things which be not as though they were.
060417.cherokee: (ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏂᎬᏅ ᏥᎪᏪᎳ, ᎤᏂᏣᏘ ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ ᎤᏂᏙᏓ ᏂᎬᏴᎦ,) ᎠᎦᏔᎲ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᎪᎯᏳᎲᏍᎨᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᎬᏂᏗᏍᎩ ᏥᎩ ᏧᏂᏲᎱᏒᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᏯᏂᏍᎩ ᏥᎩ ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏁᎲᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏣᏁᎰ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ;
060417.phonetic: (Na-s-gi-ya hi-a tsi-ni-gv-nv tsi-go-we-la, u-ni-tsa-ti tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv yv-wi u-ni-do-da ni-gv-yv-ga,) a-ga-ta-hv U-ne-la-nv-hi na-s-gi tsi-go-hi-yu-hv-s-ge-i, na-s-gi di-gv-ni-di-s-gi tsi-gi tsu-ni-yo-hu-sv-hi, a-le di-ya-ni-s-gi tsi-gi tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv na-s-gi na-ne-hv-na ge-sv-i, na-s-gi tsa-ne-ho na-s-gi-ya-i;

060418.english: Who against hope believed in hope, that he might become the father of many nations; according to that which was spoken, So shall thy seed be.
060418.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏚᎩ ᎦᎬᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏥᎨᏎᎢ ᎤᏚᎩ ᎬᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏧᏬᎯᏳᏁᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᏣᏘ ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ ᎤᏂᏙᏓ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎯᎠ ᎢᎦᏪᏛ ᏥᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏄᏂᏧᏈᏍᏕᏍᏗ ᏣᏁᏢᏔᏅᎯ;
060418.phonetic: Na-s-gi u-du-gi ga-gv-di ni-ge-sv-na tsi-ge-se-i u-du-gi gv-di ge-sv tsu-wo-hi-yu-ne-i, na-s-gi u-ni-tsa-ti tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv yv-wi u-ni-do-da i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi, na-s-gi-ya hi-a i-ga-we-dv tsi-gi, Na-s-gi-ya nu-ni-tsu-qui-s-de-s-di tsa-ne-tlv-ta-nv-hi;

060419.english: And being not weak in faith, he considered not his own body now dead, when he was about an hundred years old, neither yet the deadness of Sara's womb:
060419.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏩᎾᎦᎳ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏬᎯᏳᏒᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᏳᏓᏅᏖᎴ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎠᏰᎵ ᎤᎵᏬᏨᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎿᎭᏉ ᎠᏍᎪᎯᏧᏈ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎢᏳᏕᏘᏴᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᏳᏓᏅᏖᎴ ᎤᎶᏒᏍᏓᏁᎸᎯ ᎨᏒ ᏎᎵ ᏧᏓᎾᏄᎪᏫᏍᏗᏱ;
060419.phonetic: A-le wa-na-ga-la ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv u-wo-hi-yu-sv-i, v-tla yu-da-nv-te-le u-wa-sv a-ye-li u-li-wo-tsv-hi ge-sv-i, hna-quo a-s-go-hi-tsu-qui i-yv-dv i-yu-de-ti-yv-dv ge-sv-i, v-tla a-le yu-da-nv-te-le u-lo-sv-s-da-ne-lv-hi ge-sv Se-li tsu-da-na-nu-go-wi-s-di-yi;

060420.english: He staggered not at the promise of God through unbelief; but was strong in faith, giving glory to God;
060420.cherokee: ᎥᏝ ᏳᏜᏓᏏᏛᎡᎮ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏚᎢᏍᏔᏅᎢ ᏄᏬᎯᏳᏒᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ; ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏗᏳᏍᎩᏂ ᎨᏎ ᎤᏬᎯᏳᏒᎢ, ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏍᎨ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ,
060420.phonetic: V-tla yu-dla-si-dv-e-he U-ne-la-nv-hi u-du-i-s-ta-nv-i nu-wo-hi-yu-sv-na ge-sv i-yu-s-di; u-li-ni-gi-di-yu-s-gi-ni ge-se u-wo-hi-yu-sv-i, ga-lv-quo-di-s-ge U-ne-la-nv-hi,

060421.english: And being fully persuaded that, what he had promised, he was able also to perform.
060421.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎤᎧᎵᏨᎯ ᎤᏬᎯᏳᏎᎢ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎤᏚᎢᏍᏔᏅ ᏰᎵᏉ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎢᎬᏩᏛᏁᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
060421.phonetic: A-le u-ka-li-tsv-hi u-wo-hi-yu-se-i na-s-gi nu-s-dv u-du-i-s-ta-nv ye-li-quo na-s-quo i-gv-wa-dv-ne-di ge-sv-i.

060422.english: And therefore it was imputed to him for righteousness.
060422.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎢᏯᏛᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏥᏰᎸᎾᏁᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ.
060422.phonetic: A-le na-s-gi i-yu-s-di du-yu-go-dv i-ya-dv-ne-di ge-sv a-tsi-ye-lv-na-ne-le na-s-gi.

060423.english: Now it was not written for his sake alone, that it was imputed to him;
060423.cherokee: ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏩᏒᏉ ᎨᏒ ᏱᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨ ᎪᏪᎳᏅᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ [ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎢᏯᏛᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ] ᏣᏥᏰᎸᎾᏁᎴᎢ;
060423.phonetic: V-tla a-le u-wa-sv-quo ge-sv yi-nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge go-we-la-nv-hi tsi-gi, na-s-gi [du-yu-go-dv i-ya-dv-ne-di ge-sv] tsa-tsi-ye-lv-na-ne-le-i;

060424.english: But for us also, to whom it shall be imputed, if we believe on him that raised up Jesus our Lord from the dead;
060424.cherokee: ᎠᏴᏍᎩᏂ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ [ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎢᏯᏛᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ] ᎡᎩᏰᎸᎾᏁᏗ ᏥᎩ, ᎡᏙᎯᏳᎲᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᎴᏔᏅᎯ ᎤᏲᎱᏒ ᏥᏌ ᎢᎦᏤᎵ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ;
060424.phonetic: A-yv-s-gi-ni ge-sv na-s-quo nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge-i, na-s-gi [du-yu-go-dv i-ya-dv-ne-di ge-sv] e-gi-ye-lv-na-ne-di tsi-gi, e-do-hi-yu-hv-s-gi na-s-gi tsu-le-ta-nv-hi u-yo-hu-sv Tsi-sa i-ga-tse-li U-gv-wi-yu-hi;

060425.english: Who was delivered for our offences, and was raised again for our justification.
060425.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏓᏥᏲᏎ ᎠᏴ ᎢᎩᏍᎦᏅᏨ ᏥᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏥᏓᎦᎴᏔᏁ ᎠᏴ ᎢᎦᏚᏓᎴᏍᏗᏱ.
060425.phonetic: Na-s-gi tsi-da-tsi-yo-se a-yv i-gi-s-ga-nv-tsv tsi-nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge-i, a-le tsi-da-ga-le-ta-ne a-yv i-ga-du-da-le-s-di-yi.

060501.english: Therefore being justified by faith, we have peace with God through our Lord Jesus Christ:
060501.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎢᎦᏚᏓᎴᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᏅᏩᏙᎯᏯᏛ ᏂᎬᏅ ᎤᏁᎳᎥᎯ ᎢᎦᏤᎵ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ;
060501.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di go-hi-yu-di ge-sv i-ga-du-da-le-s-ta-nv-hi tsi-gi, nv-wa-do-hi-ya-dv ni-gv-nv U-ne-la-v-hi i-ga-tse-li U-gv-wi-yu-hi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv;

060502.english: By whom also we have access by faith into this grace wherein we stand, and rejoice in hope of the glory of God.
060502.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᎢᏛᏗᏍᎬ ᎨᎩᎷᎯᏍᏗ ᏥᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᎿᎭᏥᏕᏗᏙᎦ, ᎠᎴ ᏥᏓᎵᎮᎵᎦ ᎤᏚᎩ ᎢᎬᏒ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎡᎩᏁᏗᏱ.
060502.phonetic: Na-s-gi na-s-quo i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv go-hi-yu-di i-dv-di-s-gv ge-gi-lu-hi-s-di tsi-nu-li-s-ta-nv hi-a na-s-gi gv-wa-ga-ti-ya u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv-i, na-s-gi na-hna tsi-de-di-do-ga, a-le tsi-da-li-he-li-ga u-du-gi i-gv-sv ga-lv-quo-di-yu ge-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li e-gi-ne-di-yi.

060503.english: And not only so, but we glory in tribulations also: knowing that tribulation worketh patience;
060503.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎥᏝ ᎾᏍᎩᏉ ᏱᏂᎦᎥ, ᎾᏍᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᎩᎵᏯ ᎢᎩᎷᏤᎲ ᎢᏓᎵᎮᎵᎪᎢ; ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎪ ᎢᏗᎦᏔᎲ ᎠᎩᎵᏲᎢᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎬᏂᏗᏳ ᎾᏓᏛᏁᎲᎢ;
060503.phonetic: A-le v-tla na-s-gi-quo yi-ni-ga-v, na-s-quo-s-gi-ni a-gi-li-ya i-gi-lu-tse-hv i-da-li-he-li-go-i; nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-go i-di-ga-ta-hv a-gi-li-yo-i-s-di ge-sv a-gv-ni-di-yu na-da-dv-ne-hv-i;

060504.english: And patience, experience; and experience, hope:
060504.cherokee: ᎠᎬᏂᏗᏳᏃ ᎨᏒ ᎣᏩᏒ ᎣᏓᎦᏙᎥᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏓᏛᏁᎲᎢ; ᎣᏩᏒᏃ ᎣᏓᎦᏙᎥᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏚᎩ ᎬᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏓᏩᏛᎡᎲᎢ;
060504.phonetic: A-gv-ni-di-yu-no ge-sv o-wa-sv o-da-ga-do-v-hi-s-di ge-sv na-da-dv-ne-hv-i; o-wa-sv-no o-da-ga-do-v-hi-s-di ge-sv u-du-gi gv-di ge-sv a-da-wa-dv-e-hv-i;

060505.english: And hope maketh not ashamed; because the love of God is shed abroad in our hearts by the Holy Ghost which is given unto us.
060505.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎤᏚᎩ ᎬᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎥᏝ ᎠᏕᎰᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᏴᎬᏓᏩᏛᏏ; ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎨᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎡᎩᏐᏅᏰᎸ ᏗᎩᎾᏫᏱ, ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎡᎩᏁᎸᎯ ᏥᎩ.
060505.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no u-du-gi gv-di ge-sv v-tla a-de-ho-hi-s-di-yi yv-gv-da-wa-dv-si; nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha U-ne-la-nv-hi a-ge-yu-di ge-sv e-gi-so-nv-ye-lv di-gi-na-wi-yi, Ga-lv-quo-di-yu A-da-nv-do i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv, na-s-gi e-gi-ne-lv-hi tsi-gi.

060506.english: For when we were yet without strength, in due time Christ died for the ungodly.
060506.cherokee: ᏂᏗᎦᎵᏂᎬᎬᎾᏰᏃ ᎠᏎ ᏥᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᎯᏳ ᎠᏎᎸᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎢᎩᏲᎱᎯᏎᎴ ᎢᏗᏍᎦᎾᎢ.
060506.phonetic: Ni-di-ga-li-ni-gv-gv-na-ye-no a-se tsi-ge-se-i, na-hi-yu a-se-lv-hi ge-sv Ga-lo-ne-dv i-gi-yo-hu-hi-se-le i-di-s-ga-na-i.

060507.english: For scarcely for a righteous man will one die: yet peradventure for a good man some would even dare to die.
060507.cherokee: ᎤᏎᎦᏨᎯᏰᏃ ᎤᏓᏅᏘ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎩᎶ ᏯᏲᎱᎯᏏ; ᏯᏎᎦᎩᏍᎩᏂᏃᏅ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎩᎶ ᎬᏩᏲᎱᎯᏎᏗ ᏱᏂᎦᎩ.
060507.phonetic: U-se-ga-tsv-hi-ye-no u-da-nv-ti a-s-ga-ya gi-lo ya-yo-hu-hi-si; ya-se-ga-gi-s-gi-ni-no-nv o-s-dv a-s-ga-ya gi-lo gv-wa-yo-hu-hi-se-di yi-ni-ga-gi.

060508.english: But God commendeth his love toward us, in that, while we were yet sinners, Christ died for us.
060508.cherokee: ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎦᎾᏄᎪᏫᏍᎦ ᎢᎩᎨᏳᎯᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏏ ᎢᏗᏍᎦᎾ ᏥᎨᏎᎢ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎢᎩᏲᎱᎯᏎᎴᎢ.
060508.phonetic: U-ne-la-nv-hi-s-gi-ni ga-na-nu-go-wi-s-ga i-gi-ge-yu-hi-yu ge-sv-i, na-s-gi a-si i-di-s-ga-na tsi-ge-se-i Ga-lo-ne-dv i-gi-yo-hu-hi-se-le-i.

060509.english: Much more then, being now justified by his blood, we shall be saved from wrath through him.
060509.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏥᏄᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎩᎬ ᎢᎦᏚᏓᎴᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᎤᏟᎯ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎡᎩᏍᏕᎸᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎡᎫᏓᎴᏍᏗ ᎤᏔᎳᏬᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ.
060509.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no tsi-nu-s-di, na-s-gi u-gi-gv i-ga-du-da-le-s-ta-nv-hi tsi-gi, u-tli-hi u-do-hi-yu-hi-ya e-gi-s-de-lv-di ge-se-s-di e-gu-da-le-s-di u-ta-la-wo-hi-s-di ge-sv na-s-gi i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv.

060510.english: For if, when we were enemies, we were reconciled to God by the death of his Son, much more, being reconciled, we shall be saved by his life.
060510.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏰᏃ, ᎠᏏ ᎡᏗᏍᎦᎩ ᏥᎨᏒᎩ ᎡᏙᎢᏍᏓᏁᎸᎯ ᏱᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎬᏔᏅᎯ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎤᏲᎱᏒᎢ, ᎿᎭᏉ ᎪᎯ ᎡᏙᎢᏍᏓᏁᎸᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᎤᏟᎯ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎡᎩᏍᏕᎸᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᏃᏛ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ.
060510.phonetic: I-yu-ye-no, a-si e-di-s-ga-gi tsi-ge-sv-gi e-do-i-s-da-ne-lv-hi yi-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi gv-ta-nv-hi U-we-tsi u-yo-hu-sv-i, hna-quo go-hi e-do-i-s-da-ne-lv-hi tsi-gi, u-tli-hi u-do-hi-yu-hi-ya e-gi-s-de-lv-di ge-se-s-di na-s-gi gv-no-dv ge-sv i-yu-s-di.

060511.english: And not only so, but we also joy in God through our Lord Jesus Christ, by whom we have now received the atonement.
060511.cherokee: ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩᏉ ᏱᏂᎦᎥ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎡᏓᎵᎡᎵᎦ, ᎢᎦᏤᎵ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ ᎪᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎢᎩᏁᎸᎯ ᏥᎩ ᎪᎯᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
060511.phonetic: V-tla a-le na-s-gi-quo yi-ni-ga-v, U-ne-la-nv-hi-s-gi-ni na-s-quo e-da-li-e-li-ga, i-ga-tse-li U-gv-wi-yu-hi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv, na-s-gi i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv go-hi ge-sv i-gi-ne-lv-hi tsi-gi go-hi-s-do-di ge-sv-i.

060512.english: Wherefore, as by one man sin entered into the world, and death by sin; and so death passed upon all men, for that all have sinned:
060512.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ, ᏌᏉ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ ᎠᏍᎦᏂ ᎡᎶᎯ ᏧᎾᏄᎪᏨ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ [ᏧᎾᏄᎪᏨ;] ᎠᏍᎦᏂ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏂᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎠᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᏴᏫ ᏧᏂᎷᏤᎸ, ᏂᎦᏗᏳᏰᏃ ᎤᏂᏍᎦᏅᏨ^
060512.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no, sa-quo a-s-ga-ya i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv a-s-ga-ni e-lo-hi tsu-na-nu-go-tsv, a-le a-yo-hu-hi-s-di ge-sv [tsu-na-nu-go-tsv;] a-s-ga-ni i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv a-le na-s-gi tsi-ni-ga-li-s-do-di-ha a-yo-hu-hi-s-di ge-sv ni-ga-di-yu yv-wi tsu-ni-lu-tse-lv, ni-ga-di-yu-ye-no u-ni-s-ga-nv-tsv^

060513.english: (For until the law sin was in the world: but sin is not imputed when there is no law.
060513.cherokee: ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗᏰᏃ ᎤᎵᏁᏨ ᎠᏍᎦᏂ ᏁᎰ ᎡᎶᎯ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᎥᏝ ᎤᏂᏍᎦᏅᏨᎯ ᎨᏥᏰᎸᏗ ᏱᎩ ᎾᎿᎭᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎾᎲᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ.
060513.phonetic: Di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di-ye-no u-li-ne-tsv a-s-ga-ni ne-ho e-lo-hi; a-se-no v-tla u-ni-s-ga-nv-tsv-hi ge-tsi-ye-lv-di yi-gi na-hna di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di na-hv-na ge-sv-i.

060514.english: Nevertheless death reigned from Adam to Moses, even over them that had not sinned after the similitude of Adam's transgression, who is the figure of him that was to come.
060514.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏍᎩᏂᏃᏅ ᎠᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎡᎲᎩ ᎠᏓᏫ ᏤᎮ ᏅᏓᎬᏩᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎼᏏᏃ ᏤᎮ ᏫᎬᏍᏘ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᏁᎲ ᏄᏂᏍᎦᏅᏨᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏄᏛᏁᎸ ᎤᏍᎦᏅᏨ ᎠᏓᏫ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎷᎯᏍᏗ ᏥᎨᏒ ᏣᎦᏟᎶᏍᏙᏗ ᏥᎨᏎᎢ.
060514.phonetic: A-se-s-gi-ni-no-nv a-yo-hu-hi-s-di ge-sv e-hv-gi A-da-wi tse-he nv-da-gv-wa-da-le-nv-dv Mo-si-no tse-he wi-gv-s-ti, na-s-gi na-s-quo a-ne-hv nu-ni-s-ga-nv-tsv-na ge-sv na-s-gi-ya nu-dv-ne-lv u-s-ga-nv-tsv A-da-wi, na-s-gi u-lu-hi-s-di tsi-ge-sv tsa-ga-tli-lo-s-do-di tsi-ge-se-i.

060515.english: But not as the offence, so also is the free gift. For if through the offence of one many be dead, much more the grace of God, and the gift by grace, which is by one man, Jesus Christ, hath abounded unto many.
060515.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎥᏝ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏥᏄᏍᏕ ᎠᏍᎦᏅᏨᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏱᏄᏍᏕ ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎠᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.  ᎢᏳᏰᏃ ᎠᏏᏴᏫ ᎤᏍᎦᏅᏨ ᎤᏂᏣᏘ ᏧᏂᏲᎱᎯᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᏱᎩ; ᎤᏟᎯᏳ ᎢᎦᎢ ᎤᏂᏣᏘ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎤᏂᎷᏤᎸ ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏅᏓᏳᏓᎴᏅᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏏᏴᏫ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ.
060515.phonetic: A-se-no v-tla na-s-gi-ya tsi-nu-s-de a-s-ga-nv-tsv-i, na-s-gi na-s-quo yi-nu-s-de gv-wa-ga-ti-ya a-da-ne-di ge-sv-i.  I-yu-ye-no a-si-yv-wi u-s-ga-nv-tsv u-ni-tsa-ti tsu-ni-yo-hu-hi-s-ta-nv-hi yi-gi; u-tli-hi-yu i-ga-i u-ni-tsa-ti u-tsa-ti u-ni-lu-tse-lv gv-wa-ga-ti-ya u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi, a-le u-da-ne-di ge-sv gv-wa-ga-ti-ya u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv nv-da-yu-da-le-nv-hi tsi-gi, na-s-gi a-si-yv-wi a-s-ga-ya i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv, na-s-gi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv.

060516.english: And not as it was by one that sinned, so is the gift: for the judgment was by one to condemnation, but the free gift is of many offences unto justification.
060516.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎥᏝ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎠᏏᏴᏫᏉ ᎤᏍᎦᏅᏨᎯ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ [ᏗᎨᎫᎪᏓᏁᏗ ᏥᏄᎵᏍᏔᏁ] ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏱᏄᏍᏗ ᎤᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎠᏍᎦᏅᏨᏰᏃ ᏗᎫᎪᏙᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏌᏉᏉ ᎢᏯᏍᎦᏅᏨᎯ ᏅᏓᏳᏓᎴᏅᎯ; ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎢᏯᏍᎦᏅᏨᎯ ᎠᏚᏓᎴᏍᏙᏗ ᎤᎬᏩᎳ.
060516.phonetic: A-le v-tla na-s-gi-ya a-si-yv-wi-quo u-s-ga-nv-tsv-hi i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv [di-ge-gu-go-da-ne-di tsi-nu-li-s-ta-ne] na-s-gi-ya yi-nu-s-di u-da-ne-di ge-sv-i; A-s-ga-nv-tsv-ye-no di-gu-go-do-di ge-sv sa-quo-quo i-ya-s-ga-nv-tsv-hi nv-da-yu-da-le-nv-hi; Gv-wa-ga-ti-ya-s-gi-ni u-da-ne-di ge-sv u-tsa-ti i-ya-s-ga-nv-tsv-hi a-du-da-le-s-do-di u-gv-wa-la.

060517.english: For if by one man's offence death reigned by one; much more they which receive abundance of grace and of the gift of righteousness shall reign in life by one, Jesus Christ.)
060517.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏰᏃ ᏌᏉ ᏴᏫ ᎤᏍᎦᏅᏨ ᏱᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎠᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏰᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏏᏴᏫ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ; ᎤᏟᎯᏳ ᏄᏓᎷᎸᎾ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎨᏥᏁᎸᎯ ᏥᎩ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎠᏚᏓᎴᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᏂᏛ ᏗᎨᏒ ᎤᏂᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎠᏏᏴᏫ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ.
060517.phonetic: I-yu-ye-no sa-quo yv-wi u-s-ga-nv-tsv yi-nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha a-yo-hu-hi-s-di ge-sv ye-ha na-s-gi a-si-yv-wi i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv; u-tli-hi-yu nu-da-lu-lv-na na-s-gi u-tsa-ti ge-tsi-ne-lv-hi tsi-gi u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv a-le gv-wa-ga-ti-ya a-du-da-le-s-do-di ge-sv-i, na-s-gi gv-ni-dv di-ge-sv u-ni-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-se-s-di a-si-yv-wi i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv, na-s-gi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv.

060518.english: Therefore as by the offence of one judgment came upon all men to condemnation; even so by the righteousness of one the free gift came upon all men unto justification of life.
060518.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏏᏴᏫ ᎤᏍᎦᏅᏨ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ ᎠᏍᎦᏅᏨ ᏗᎫᎪᏙᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᏴᏫ ᏧᏂᎷᏤᎸ; ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᏏᏴᏫ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᏄᏛᏁᎸ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎤᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏂᎷᏤᎸ ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᏴᏫ ᎨᎫᏓᎴᏍᏗᏱ ᎬᏂᏛ ᎤᏂᏩᏛᏗᏱ ᎤᎬᏩᎳ.
060518.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di na-s-gi a-si-yv-wi u-s-ga-nv-tsv i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv a-s-ga-nv-tsv di-gu-go-do-di ge-sv ni-ga-di-yu yv-wi tsu-ni-lu-tse-lv; na-s-gi-ya na-s-quo a-si-yv-wi du-yu-go-dv nu-dv-ne-lv i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv gv-wa-ga-ti-ya u-da-ne-di ge-sv u-ni-lu-tse-lv ni-ga-di-yu yv-wi ge-gu-da-le-s-di-yi gv-ni-dv u-ni-wa-dv-di-yi u-gv-wa-la.

060519.english: For as by one man's disobedience many were made sinners, so by the obedience of one shall many be made righteous.
060519.cherokee: ᎠᏏᏴᏫᏰᏃ ᏴᏫ ᏄᏬᎯᏳᏅᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ ᎤᏂᏣᏘ ᎠᏂᏍᎦᎾ ᏥᏄᎾᎵᏍᏔᏅ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᏏᏴᏫ ᎤᏬᎯᏳᏅ ᏅᏓᎦᎵᏍᏙᏔᏂ ᎤᏂᏣᏘ ᎠᏂᏍᎦᎾ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏅᏛᎾᎵᏍᏔᏂ.
060519.phonetic: A-si-yv-wi-ye-no yv-wi nu-wo-hi-yu-nv-na ge-sv i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv u-ni-tsa-ti a-ni-s-ga-na tsi-nu-na-li-s-ta-nv, na-s-gi-ya na-s-quo a-si-yv-wi u-wo-hi-yu-nv nv-da-ga-li-s-do-ta-ni u-ni-tsa-ti a-ni-s-ga-na ni-ge-sv-na nv-dv-na-li-s-ta-ni.

060520.english: Moreover the law entered, that the offence might abound. But where sin abounded, grace did much more abound:
060520.cherokee: ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏙᏢᏁ ᎠᏍᎦᏅᎢᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏁᏉᎢᏍᏗᏱ. ᎠᏎᏃ ᎾᎿ ᎭᎠᏍᎦᏅᎢᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏁᏉᏥᏕᎬ ᎾᎿᎭᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏟᎯᏳ ᎤᏁᏉᏥᏕᎬᎩ;
060520.phonetic: Di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di-s-gi-ni u-do-tlv-ne a-s-ga-nv-i-s-di ge-sv u-ne-quo-i-s-di-yi.  A-se-no na-hna a-s-ga-nv-i-s-di ge-sv u-ne-quo-tsi-de-gv na-hna gv-wa-ga-ti-ya u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv u-tli-hi-yu u-ne-quo-tsi-de-gv-gi;

060521.english: That as sin hath reigned unto death, even so might grace reign through righteousness unto eternal life by Jesus Christ our Lord.
060521.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎠᏍᎦᏂ ᏧᎬᏫᏳᏌᏕᎬᎩ ᎠᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎦᎾᏄᎪᏫᏍᎬᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᏌᏕᎩ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎬᏂᏛ ᎦᎾᏄᎪᏫᏍᎬ ᎬᏔᏅᎯ ᎠᏚᏓᎴᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎢᎦᏤᎵ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ.
060521.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no a-s-ga-ni tsu-gv-wi-yu-sa-de-gv-gi a-yo-hu-hi-s-di ge-sv ga-na-nu-go-wi-s-gv-i, na-s-gi-ya na-s-quo gv-wa-ga-ti-ya u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv u-gv-wi-yu-sa-de-gi i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi gv-ni-dv ga-na-nu-go-wi-s-gv gv-ta-nv-hi a-du-da-le-s-do-di ge-sv Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv U-gv-wi-yu-hi i-ga-tse-li i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv.

060601.english: What shall we say then? Shall we continue in sin, that grace may abound?
060601.cherokee: ᎦᏙᎨᏃ ᏓᏓᏛᏂ?  ᏥᎪ ᎠᏏᏉ ᎨᏗᏍᎦᏅᎨᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏐᏗᏱ ᎤᏁᏉᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ?
060601.phonetic: Ga-do-ge-no da-da-dv-ni?  Tsi-go a-si-quo ge-di-s-ga-nv-ge-s-di na-s-gi i-yu-wa-ni-so-di-yi u-ne-quo-i-s-di-yi gv-wa-ga-ti-ya u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv-i?

060602.english: God forbid. How shall we, that are dead to sin, live any longer therein?
060602.cherokee: ᎬᏩᏟᏍᏗ.  ᎠᏴ ᏗᎩᏲᎱᏒᎯ ᎠᏍᎦᏅᎢᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ, ᎦᏙ ᏱᏚᎵᏍᏙᏓ ᏰᎵ ᎠᏏ ᎾᎿᎭᏴᏓᎴᏂᏓ?
060602.phonetic: Gv-wa-tli-s-di.  A-yv di-gi-yo-hu-sv-hi a-s-ga-nv-i-s-di ge-sv u-gv-wa-li, ga-do yi-du-li-s-do-da ye-li a-si na-hna yv-da-le-ni-da?

060603.english: Know ye not, that so many of us as were baptized into Jesus Christ were baptized into his death?
060603.cherokee: ᏝᏍᎪ ᏱᏥᎦᏔᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᏗᎥ ᏤᎦᏬᎥᎯ ᎨᏒ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏕᏓᏓᏲᎯᏎᎲᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏲᎱᏒ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ ᏕᎦᏬᎥᎢ?
060603.phonetic: Tla-s-go yi-tsi-ga-ta-ha, na-s-gi ni-di-v tse-ga-wo-v-hi ge-sv Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv de-da-da-yo-hi-se-hv-i, na-s-gi u-yo-hu-sv u-gv-wa-li de-ga-wo-v-i?

060604.english: Therefore we are buried with him by baptism into death: that like as Christ was raised up from the dead by the glory of the Father, even so we also should walk in newness of life.
060604.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏤᎦᏬᎥᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᏕᎩᏂᏌᏅᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᎩᏲᎱᏒᎯ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅᎩ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏲᎱᏒ ᏥᏓᎦᎴᏔᏁᎢ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎬᏔᏅᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᏴ ᎢᏓᎴᏂᏙᎲ ᎢᏤ ᏱᏓᎴᏂᏙᎭ.
060604.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di na-s-gi tse-ga-wo-v-hi tsi-gi, Ga-lo-ne-dv i-tsu-la-ha de-gi-ni-sa-nv-gi, a-le na-s-gi di-gi-yo-hu-sv-hi nu-li-s-ta-nv-gi; na-s-gi Ga-lo-ne-dv u-yo-hu-sv tsi-da-ga-le-ta-ne-i A-ga-yv-li-ge ga-lv-quo-di-yu ge-sv gv-ta-nv-hi, na-s-gi-ya na-s-quo a-yv i-da-le-ni-do-hv i-tse yi-da-le-ni-do-ha.

060605.english: For if we have been planted together in the likeness of his death, we shall be also in the likeness of his resurrection:
060605.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏲᎱᏒ ᏗᏓᏤᎵᏛ ᎢᏰᎬᏁᎸᎯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᏚᎴᎯᏌᏅ ᏗᏓᏤᎵᏛ ᎢᏰᎬᏁᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
060605.phonetic: I-yu-ye-no na-s-gi u-yo-hu-sv di-da-tse-li-dv i-ye-gv-ne-lv-hi ge-se-s-di, na-s-quo-s-gi-ni du-le-hi-sa-nv di-da-tse-li-dv i-ye-gv-ne-di ge-se-s-di.

060606.english: Knowing this, that our old man is crucified with him, that the body of sin might be destroyed, that henceforth we should not serve sin.
060606.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏗᎦᏔᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎦᏤᎵ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᏓᏓᎿᎭᏩᏍᏛ ᎠᎦᏛᏅ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ [ᎦᎶᏁᏛ] ᎠᎦᏛᏅᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏍᎦᏅᎢᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏰᎸ ᎡᎲ ᎤᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗᏱ, ᎪᎯ ᎢᏳᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎠᏍᎦᏂ ᏗᎩᎾᏢᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ.
060606.phonetic: Hi-a-ye-no na-s-gi i-di-ga-ta-ha, na-s-gi i-ga-tse-li u-we-tsi a-s-ga-ya da-da-hna-wa-s-dv a-ga-dv-nv i-tsu-la-ha na-s-gi [ga-lo-ne-dv] a-ga-dv-nv-i, na-s-gi a-s-ga-nv-i-s-di ge-sv a-ye-lv e-hv u-yo-hu-hi-s-di-yi, go-hi i-yu-da-le-nv-dv a-s-ga-ni di-gi-na-tlv-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na.

060607.english: For he that is dead is freed from sin.
060607.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ Ꮎ ᎤᏲᎱᏒᎯ ᎤᏚᏓᎳᎡᎸᎯ ᎨᏐ ᎠᏍᎦᏂ.
060607.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ye-no na u-yo-hu-sv-hi u-du-da-la-e-lv-hi ge-so a-s-ga-ni.

060608.english: Now if we be dead with Christ, we believe that we shall also live with him:
060608.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏰᏃ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᏗᎩᏲᎱᏒᎯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎢᏙᎯᏳᎲᏍᎦ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᏗᏛᏃᏛ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ;
060608.phonetic: I-yu-ye-no Ga-lo-ne-dv i-tsu-la-ha di-gi-yo-hu-sv-hi ge-se-s-di, i-do-hi-yu-hv-s-ga i-tsu-la-ha di-dv-no-dv i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi;

060609.english: Knowing that Christ being raised from the dead dieth no more; death hath no more dominion over him.
060609.cherokee: ᎢᏗᎦᏔᎭᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏲᎱᏒ ᏣᎦᎴᏔᏅᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᏔᎵᏁ ᎤᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗ ᏱᎩ; ᎠᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎥᏝ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎤᏓᎵᏁᎯᏕᎯ ᏱᎩ.
060609.phonetic: I-di-ga-ta-ha-ye-no na-s-gi Ga-lo-ne-dv u-yo-hu-sv tsa-ga-le-ta-nv-hi ge-sv-i, v-tla ta-li-ne u-yo-hu-hi-s-di yi-gi; a-yo-hu-hi-s-di ge-sv v-tla hna-quo u-da-li-ne-hi-de-hi yi-gi.

060610.english: For in that he died, he died unto sin once: but in that he liveth, he liveth unto God.
060610.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᎤᏲᎱᏒᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᎠᏍᎦᏂ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ ᏌᏉ ᏄᏲᎱᏒᎩ; ᎠᏍᎩᏂ ᎬᏃᏛ ᏥᎩ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ ᎬᏃᏛ.
060610.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ye-no u-yo-hu-sv-hi tsi-gi, a-s-ga-ni u-gv-wa-li sa-quo nu-yo-hu-sv-gi; a-s-gi-ni gv-no-dv tsi-gi, U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li u-gv-wa-li gv-no-dv.

060611.english: Likewise reckon ye also yourselves to be dead indeed unto sin, but alive unto God through Jesus Christ our Lord.
060611.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏂᎯ ᎢᏨᏒ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯ ᏗᏥᏲᎱᏒᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏣᏓᏓᏅᏖᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎠᏍᎦᏂ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ ᏗᏨᏃᏛ ᎨᏒ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎢᎦᏤᎵ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ.
060611.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ya na-s-quo ni-hi i-tsv-sv ge-sv u-do-hi-yu-hi di-tsi-yo-hu-sv-hi ge-sv i-tsa-da-da-nv-te-s-ge-s-di a-s-ga-ni u-gv-wa-li, U-ne-la-nv-hi-s-gi-ni u-tse-li u-gv-wa-li di-tsv-no-dv ge-sv Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv i-ga-tse-li U-gv-wi-yu-hi i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv.

060612.english: Let not sin therefore reign in your mortal body, that ye should obey it in the lusts thereof.
060612.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏞᏍᏗ ᎠᏍᎦᏂ ᏳᎬᏫᏳᏌᏕᎨᏍᏗ ᏗᏲᎩ ᏗᏥᏰᎸᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ [ᎠᏍᎦᏂ] ᎢᏦᎯᏳᏗᏱ ᎾᎿᎭ[ᏗᏥᏰᎸ] ᎤᏚᎸᏅᎥᏍᎬᎢ.
060612.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di tle-s-di a-s-ga-ni yu-gv-wi-yu-sa-de-ge-s-di di-yo-gi di-tsi-ye-lv-i, na-s-gi [a-s-ga-ni] i-tso-hi-yu-di-yi na-hna [di-tsi-ye-lv] u-du-lv-nv-v-s-gv-i.

060613.english: Neither yield ye your members as instruments of unrighteousness unto sin: but yield yourselves unto God, as those that are alive from the dead, and your members as instruments of righteousness unto God.
060613.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏞᏍᏗ ᎠᏍᎦᏂ ᏤᏥᏲᎯᏎᎸᎩ ᏗᏥᏰᎸ ᎤᏚᏓᏕᏫᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᏨᏙᏗᏱ ᏂᏚᏳᎪᏛᎾ ᏗᏥᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗᏱ; ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎢᏨᏒ ᏤᏣᏓᏲᎯᏏ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᎾᏛᏁᏗ ᎤᎾᏛᏂᏛᎯ ᏧᏂᏲᎱᏒᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᏗᏥᏰᎸ ᎤᏚᏓᏕᏫᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏕᏥᏲᎯᏎᎸᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᏨᏙᏗᏱ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᏗᏥᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗᏱ,
060613.phonetic: A-le tle-s-di a-s-ga-ni tse-tsi-yo-hi-se-lv-gi di-tsi-ye-lv u-du-da-de-wi-sv-i, na-s-gi di-tsv-do-di-yi ni-du-yu-go-dv-na di-tsi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di-yi; U-ne-la-nv-hi-s-gi-ni i-tsv-sv tse-tsa-da-yo-hi-si, na-s-gi i-yu-na-dv-ne-di u-na-dv-ni-dv-hi tsu-ni-yo-hu-sv-hi ge-sv a-le di-tsi-ye-lv u-du-da-de-wi-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi de-tsi-yo-hi-se-lv-gi na-s-gi di-tsv-do-di-yi du-yu-go-dv di-tsi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di-yi,

060614.english: For sin shall not have dominion over you: for ye are not under the law, but under grace.
060614.cherokee: ᎠᏍᎦᏂᏰᏃ ᎥᏝ ᏱᎨᏣᏓᎵᏁᎯᏕᎮᏍᏗ; ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗᏱ ᏱᏣᏓᏄᏴᏗ, ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏣᏓᏄᏴᏗ.
060614.phonetic: A-s-ga-ni-ye-no v-tla yi-ge-tsa-da-li-ne-hi-de-he-s-di; v-tla-ye-no di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di-yi yi-tsa-da-nu-yv-di, gv-wa-ga-ti-ya-s-gi-ni u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv i-tsa-da-nu-yv-di.

060615.english: What then? shall we sin, because we are not under the law, but under grace? God forbid.
060615.cherokee: ᎦᏙᏃ?  ᎢᏗᏍᎦᏅᎨᏍᏗᏍᎪ, ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗᏱ ᏂᎦᏓᏄᏴᏛᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎢᎦᏓᏄᏴᏛᎢ?  ᎬᏩᏟᏍᏗ.
060615.phonetic: Ga-do-no?  i-di-s-ga-nv-ge-s-di-s-go, nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge-s-di di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di-yi ni-ga-da-nu-yv-dv-na ge-sv-i, gv-wa-ga-ti-ya-s-gi-ni u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv i-ga-da-nu-yv-dv-i?  gv-wa-tli-s-di.

060616.english: Know ye not, that to whom ye yield yourselves servants to obey, his servants ye are to whom ye obey; whether of sin unto death, or of obedience unto righteousness?
060616.cherokee: ᏝᏍᎪ ᏱᏥᎦᏔᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎩᎶ ᏱᏕᏣᏓᏲᎯᏎᎸ ᎢᏥᏅᏏᏙᎲ ᎡᏦᎢᏳᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏥᎾᏝᎢ ᎨᏒ ᎡᏦᎢᏳᎲᏍᎩ; ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᏍᎦᏂ ᏱᎩ ᎠᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎬᏗᏍᎩ ᏱᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏱᎩ, ᎠᏚᏓᎴᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎬᏗᏍᎩ?
060616.phonetic: Tla-s-go yi-tsi-ga-ta-ha, na-s-gi gi-lo yi-de-tsa-da-yo-hi-se-lv i-tsi-nv-si-do-hv e-tso-i-yu-di-yi, na-s-gi i-tsi-na-tla-i ge-sv e-tso-i-yu-hv-s-gi; na-s-quo a-s-ga-ni yi-gi a-yo-hu-hi-s-di ge-sv gv-di-s-gi yi-gi, a-le go-hi-yu-di ge-sv yi-gi, a-du-da-le-s-di ge-sv gv-di-s-gi?

060617.english: But God be thanked, that ye were the servants of sin, but ye have obeyed from the heart that form of doctrine which was delivered you.
060617.cherokee: ᎠᏗᎾ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎵᎮᎵᏤᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯ ᎠᏍᎦᏂ ᏗᏥᎾᏝᎢ ᏥᎨᏒᎩ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᏗᏥᎾᏫ ᎬᏗ ᎢᏦᎯᏳᏅ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᏍᏛ ᏗᏕᏲᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏤᏥᏲᎯᏎᎸᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ.
060617.phonetic: A-di-na U-ne-la-nv-hi a-li-he-li-tse-di ge-se-s-di, na-s-gi u-do-hi-yu-hi a-s-ga-ni di-tsi-na-tla-i tsi-ge-sv-gi, a-se-no di-tsi-na-wi gv-di i-tso-hi-yu-nv na-s-gi nu-s-dv di-de-yo-di ge-sv na-s-gi tse-tsi-yo-hi-se-lv-hi ge-sv-i.

060618.english: Being then made free from sin, ye became the servants of righteousness.
060618.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎠᏍᎦᏂ ᎨᏒ ᏂᏗᏥᎾᏝᎥᎾ ᏥᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅ, ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎨᏒ ᏗᏥᎾᏝᎢ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅᎩ.
060618.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no a-s-ga-ni ge-sv ni-di-tsi-na-tla-v-na tsi-nu-li-s-ta-nv, du-yu-go-dv ge-sv di-tsi-na-tla-i nu-li-s-ta-nv-gi.

060619.english: I speak after the manner of men because of the infirmity of your flesh: for as ye have yielded your members servants to uncleanness and to iniquity unto iniquity; even so now yield your members servants to righteousness unto holiness.
060619.cherokee: ᏴᏫ ᎢᏳᏂᏪᏍᏗ ᏂᏥᏪᎭ, ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎢᏥᏇᏓᎸ ᏩᎾᎦᎳᎯᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᏗᏥᏰᎸᏰᏃ ᎢᏣᏚᏓᏕᏫᏒ ᏥᏕᏥᏲᏒᎩ ᎦᏓᎭ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏲ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏂᎾᏝᎢ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏲ ᏗᏥᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗᏱ; ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎪᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏗᏥᏰᎸ ᎢᏣᏚᏓᏕᏫᏒ ᏗᏥᏲᎯ ᎤᏂᎾᏝᎢ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏥᏍᎦᎾ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ.
060619.phonetic: Yv-wi i-yu-ni-we-s-di ni-tsi-we-ha, nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha i-tsi-que-da-lv wa-na-ga-la-hi-yu ge-sv-i; di-tsi-ye-lv-ye-no i-tsa-du-da-de-wi-sv tsi-de-tsi-yo-sv-gi ga-da-ha a-le u-yo ge-sv u-ni-na-tla-i i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi, na-s-gi u-yo di-tsi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di-yi; na-s-gi-ya na-s-quo go-hi ge-sv-i, di-tsi-ye-lv i-tsa-du-da-de-wi-sv di-tsi-yo-hi u-ni-na-tla-i i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi, na-s-gi i-tsi-s-ga-na ni-ge-sv-na i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi.

060620.english: For when ye were the servants of sin, ye were free from righteousness.
060620.cherokee: ᎾᎯᏳᏰᏃ ᎠᏍᎦᏂ ᏗᏥᎾᏝᎢ ᏥᎨᏒᎩ, ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎨᏒ ᏂᏗᏥᎾᏝᎥᎾ ᎨᏒᎩ.
060620.phonetic: Na-hi-yu-ye-no a-s-ga-ni di-tsi-na-tla-i tsi-ge-sv-gi, du-yu-go-dv ge-sv ni-di-tsi-na-tla-v-na ge-sv-gi.

060621.english: What fruit had ye then in those things whereof ye are now ashamed? for the end of those things is death.
060621.cherokee: ᎾᎯᏳᏃ ᏥᎨᏒᎩ ᎦᏙ ᎤᏍᏗ ᎢᏥᏁᏉᏤᎮ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎪᎯ ᏥᏣᏕᎰᏍᎦ?  ᎠᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗᏰᏃ ᎨᏒ ᏭᎵᏰᎢᎶᎯᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ.
060621.phonetic: Na-hi-yu-no tsi-ge-sv-gi ga-do u-s-di i-tsi-ne-quo-tse-he na-s-gi go-hi tsi-tsa-de-ho-s-ga?  a-yo-hu-hi-s-di-ye-no ge-sv wu-li-ye-i-lo-hi-s-di na-s-gi.

060622.english: But now being made free from sin, and become servants to God, ye have your fruit unto holiness, and the end everlasting life.
060622.cherokee: ᎪᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏍᎦᏂ ᏂᏗᏥᎾᏝᎥᎾ ᏥᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏗᏥᎾᏝᎢ ᏥᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅ, ᎢᏥᏁᏉᎥᎯ ᎢᏥᎭ ᏂᏥᏍᎦᏅᎾ ᎢᏨᏁᎯ, ᏩᎵᏍᏆᏗᎯᎲᏃ ᏭᏍᏗᏥᎯᏍᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎬᏂᏛ.
060622.phonetic: Go-hi-s-gi-ni ge-sv a-s-ga-ni ni-di-tsi-na-tla-v-na tsi-gi, a-le U-ne-la-nv-hi di-tsi-na-tla-i tsi-nu-li-s-ta-nv, i-tsi-ne-quo-v-hi i-tsi-ha ni-tsi-s-ga-nv-na i-tsv-ne-hi, wa-li-s-qua-di-hi-hv-no wu-s-di-tsi-hi-s-di ni-ge-sv-na gv-ni-dv.

060623.english: For the wages of sin is death; but the gift of God is eternal life through Jesus Christ our Lord.
060623.cherokee: ᎠᏍᎦᏂᏰᏃ ᎤᏓᎫᏴᎡᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎢᎩ; ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎤᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎬᏂᏛ ᏭᏍᏗᏥᎯᏍᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ, ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎢᎦᏤᎵᎦ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ.
060623.phonetic: A-s-ga-ni-ye-no u-da-gu-yv-e-di ge-sv a-yo-hu-hi-s-di ge-sv i-gi; U-ne-la-nv-hi-s-gi-ni gv-wa-ga-ti-ya u-da-ne-di ge-sv gv-ni-dv wu-s-di-tsi-hi-s-di ni-ge-sv-na, Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv U-gv-wi-yu-hi i-ga-tse-li-ga i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv.

060701.english: Know ye not, brethren, (for I speak to them that know the law,) how that the law hath dominion over a man as long as he liveth?
060701.cherokee: ᏝᏍᎪ ᏱᏥᎦᏔᎭ, ᎠᏓᎵᏅᏟ, (ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗᏰᏃ ᎠᏂᎦᏔᎯ ᎦᏥᏬᏁᏗᎭ,) ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎤᎾᏝᎥ ᏴᏫ ᏂᎪᎯᎸ ᎡᎲᎢ?
060701.phonetic: Tla-s-go yi-tsi-ga-ta-ha, a-da-li-nv-tli, (di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di-ye-no a-ni-ga-ta-hi ga-tsi-wo-ne-di-ha,) na-s-gi di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di u-na-tla-v yv-wi ni-go-hi-lv e-hv-i?

060702.english: For the woman which hath an husband is bound by the law to her husband so long as he liveth; but if the husband be dead, she is loosed from the law of her husband.
060702.cherokee: ᎠᎨᏴᏰᏃ ᏥᏓᏤᎰᎢ, ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎤᏚᏓᎸᏙ ᎤᏰᎯ ᎤᎾᏁᎳᏗᏍᏗᏱ ᎢᎪᎯᏛ ᎠᎴᏂᏙᎲ ᎤᏰᎯ; ᎤᏰᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏲᎱᏒᎯ ᏱᎩ, ᎤᏚᏓᎴᏛ ᎨᏐ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎤᏚᏓᎸᏛ ᎤᏰᎯ ᎤᎾᏁᎳᏗᏍᏗᏱ.
060702.phonetic: A-ge-yv-ye-no tsi-da-tse-ho-i, di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di u-du-da-lv-do u-ye-hi u-na-ne-la-di-s-di-yi i-go-hi-dv a-le-ni-do-hv u-ye-hi; u-ye-hi-s-gi-ni u-yo-hu-sv-hi yi-gi, u-du-da-le-dv ge-so di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di u-du-da-lv-dv u-ye-hi u-na-ne-la-di-s-di-yi.

060703.english: So then if, while her husband liveth, she be married to another man, she shall be called an adulteress: but if her husband be dead, she is free from that law; so that she is no adulteress, though she be married to another man.
060703.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᎠᏏᏉ ᎡᎲ ᎤᏰᎯ, ᏅᏩᏓᎴ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᏱᏚᎾᏤᏅ, ᎠᏓᏲᏁᎯ ᎠᎪᏎᎮᏍᏗ; ᎢᏳᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏰᎯ ᎤᏲᎱᏒᎯ ᏱᎩ, ᎤᏚᏓᎴᏛ ᎨᏐ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎤᏚᏓᎸᏛᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎥᏝ ᎠᏓᏲᏁᎯ ᏱᎩ, ᎤᏁᎳᎩ ᏅᏩᏓᎴ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᏱᏓᎾᏤᎭ.
060703.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di, i-yu-no a-si-quo e-hv u-ye-hi, nv-wa-da-le a-s-ga-ya yi-du-na-tse-nv, a-da-yo-ne-hi a-go-se-he-s-di; i-yu-s-gi-ni u-ye-hi u-yo-hu-sv-hi yi-gi, u-du-da-le-dv ge-so di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di u-du-da-lv-dv-i; na-s-gi-no v-tla a-da-yo-ne-hi yi-gi, u-ne-la-gi nv-wa-da-le a-s-ga-ya yi-da-na-tse-ha.

060704.english: Wherefore, my brethren, ye also are become dead to the law by the body of Christ; that ye should be married to another, even to him who is raised from the dead, that we should bring forth fruit unto God.
060704.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎢᏓᎵᏅᏟ ᏂᎯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏗᏥᏲᎱᏒᎯ ᏂᏣᎵᏍᏔᏅ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ, ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎠᏰᎸ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᏅᏩᏓᎴ ᏗᏣᏨᏍᏗᏱ ᎠᏰᎸᏒᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏲᎱᏒ ᏣᎦᎴᏔᏅᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎦᏔᏔᏅᎯ ᎡᏗᎾᏄᎪᏫᏎᏗᏱ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ.
060704.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di i-da-li-nv-tli ni-hi na-s-quo di-tsi-yo-hu-sv-hi ni-tsa-li-s-ta-nv di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di u-gv-wa-li, Ga-lo-ne-dv a-ye-lv i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv; na-s-gi nv-wa-da-le di-tsa-tsv-s-di-yi a-ye-lv-sv-gi, na-s-gi a-yo-hu-sv tsa-ga-le-ta-nv-hi ge-sv-i, na-s-gi u-ga-ta-ta-nv-hi e-di-na-nu-go-wi-se-di-yi U-ne-la-nv-hi.

060705.english: For when we were in the flesh, the motions of sins, which were by the law, did work in our members to bring forth fruit unto death.
060705.cherokee: ᎤᏇᏓᎸᏉᏰᏃ ᎠᏏ ᏥᏕᎲᎢ, ᎠᏍᎦᏅᎢᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏚᎸᏅᎥᏍᎬᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏚᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲᎩ ᏗᏗᏰᎸ ᎤᏚᏓᏕᏫᏒᎢ ᎤᎦᏔᏔᏅᎯ ᎠᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎡᏗᎾᏄᎪᏫᏎᏗᏱ.
060705.phonetic: U-que-da-lv-quo-ye-no a-si tsi-de-hv-i, a-s-ga-nv-i-s-di ge-sv u-du-lv-nv-v-s-gv-i, na-s-gi di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv ge-sv-i, na-s-gi du-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv-gi di-di-ye-lv u-du-da-de-wi-sv-i u-ga-ta-ta-nv-hi a-yo-hu-hi-s-di ge-sv e-di-na-nu-go-wi-se-di-yi.

060706.english: But now we are delivered from the law, that being dead wherein we were held; that we should serve in newness of spirit, and not in the oldness of the letter.
060706.cherokee: ᎪᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎨᏒ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎡᏓᏚᏓᎳᎡᎸ, ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎤᏲᎱᏒᎯ ᎨᏒ ᏗᎩᎾᏢᏅᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏤ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎢᎬᏙᏗᏱ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎡᏓᏛᏁᏗᏱ, ᎥᏝᏃ ᎪᏪᎸᏉ ᎢᎬᏙᏗᏱ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏂᎦᏛᏁᎸ ᏧᏩᎫᏔᏅᏒᎢ.
060706.phonetic: Go-hi-s-gi-ni ge-sv di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di e-da-du-da-la-e-lv, nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha u-yo-hu-sv-hi ge-sv di-gi-na-tlv-nv-hi ge-sv-i; na-s-gi i-tse a-da-nv-do i-gv-do-di-yi go-hu-s-di e-da-dv-ne-di-yi, v-tla-no go-we-lv-quo i-gv-do-di-yi na-s-gi-ya ni-ga-dv-ne-lv tsu-wa-gu-ta-nv-sv-i.

060707.english: What shall we say then? Is the law sin? God forbid. Nay, I had not known sin, but by the law: for I had not known lust, except the law had said, Thou shalt not covet.
060707.cherokee: ᎦᏙᎨᏃ ᏓᏓᏛᏂ?  ᏥᎪ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎠᏍᎦᏂᏉ?  ᎬᏩᏟᏍᏗ.  ᎥᏝᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᏍᎦᏂ ᏱᎬᎩᎦᏙᎥᏎ ᎥᏝ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ; ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᏱᎦᏥᎦᏔᎮ ᎤᏲ ᎠᏚᎸᏅᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏒᎾ ᏱᎨᏎᎢ, ᏞᏍᏗ ᏣᏓᏚᎸᎡᎸᎩ.
060707.phonetic: Ga-do-ge-no da-da-dv-ni?  Tsi-go di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di a-s-ga-ni-quo?  gv-wa-tli-s-di.  V-tla-s-gi-ni a-s-ga-ni yi-gv-gi-ga-do-v-se v-tla di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di; V-tla-ye-no yi-ga-tsi-ga-ta-he u-yo a-du-lv-nv-di ge-sv-i, i-yu-no di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di hi-a nu-we-sv-na yi-ge-se-i, Tle-s-di tsa-da-du-lv-e-lv-gi.

060708.english: But sin, taking occasion by the commandment, wrought in me all manner of concupiscence. For without the law sin was dead.
060708.cherokee: ᎠᏍᎦᏂᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᎵᏁᏨ ᎬᏗᏍᎬᎢ ᏄᏓᎴᏒ ᎤᏲ ᎠᏆᏚᎸᏅᏗᏱ ᎾᏋᏁᎸᎩ.  ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎠᏍᎦᏂ ᎤᏲᎱᏒᎯ ᏱᎩ.
060708.phonetic: A-s-ga-ni-s-gi-ni u-li-ne-tsv gv-di-s-gv-i nu-da-le-sv u-yo a-qua-du-lv-nv-di-yi na-quv-ne-lv-gi.  V-tla-ye-no di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di a-s-ga-ni u-yo-hu-sv-hi yi-gi.

060709.english: For I was alive without the law once: but when the commandment came, sin revived, and I died.
060709.cherokee: ᎢᎸᎯᏳᏰᏃ ᏥᎨᏒ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᏂᏓᏆᏁᎶᏛᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᎢ ᎬᏃᏛ ᎨᏒᎩ; ᎤᎵᏁᏨᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᎷᏨ, ᎠᏍᎦᏂ ᎤᏛᏂᏛᎩ, ᎠᏴᏃ ᎠᎩᏲᎱᏒᎩ.
060709.phonetic: I-lv-hi-yu-ye-no tsi-ge-sv di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di ni-da-qua-ne-lo-dv-na ge-sv i-yu-i gv-no-dv ge-sv-gi; u-li-ne-tsv-s-gi-ni u-lu-tsv, a-s-ga-ni u-dv-ni-dv-gi, a-yv-no a-gi-yo-hu-sv-gi.

060710.english: And the commandment, which was ordained to life, I found to be unto death.
060710.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎵᏁᏨ ᎬᏂᏛ ᎠᏓᏁᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏓᎯᎯᏉ ᎾᏆᎵᏍᏓᏁᎸᎩ ᎠᏴ.
060710.phonetic: A-le na-s-gi u-li-ne-tsv gv-ni-dv a-da-ne-hi ge-sv a-da-hi-hi-quo na-qua-li-s-da-ne-lv-gi a-yv.

060711.english: For sin, taking occasion by the commandment, deceived me, and by it slew me.
060711.cherokee: ᎠᏍᎦᏂᏰᏃ ᎤᎵᏁᏨ ᎬᏗᏍᎬ ᎠᎩᎶᏄᎮᎸᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎩᎯᏍᏔᏅᎩ.
060711.phonetic: A-s-ga-ni-ye-no u-li-ne-tsv gv-di-s-gv a-gi-lo-nu-he-lv-gi, a-le na-s-gi a-gi-hi-s-ta-nv-gi.

060712.english: Wherefore the law is holy, and the commandment holy, and just, and good.
060712.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎦᏅᎾ; ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎵᏁᏨ ᎾᏍᎦᏅᎾ, ᎠᎴ ᏚᏳᎪᏛᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎣᏏᏳ.
060712.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di na-s-ga-nv-na; a-le na-s-gi u-li-ne-tsv na-s-ga-nv-na, a-le du-yu-go-dv-i, a-le o-si-yu.
