061313.cherokee: ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎢᏕᎲᎢ, ᎢᎦ ᏂᎨᏐ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ; ᎥᏝᏍᏗᏃ ᎠᎵᏍᎦᎾᏩᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏓᏴᏍᏕᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏕᎵᏛ ᏗᏂᏏᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏃᎵᏏᎾᎯᏍᏛᎾ ᎠᎴᏂᏓᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎥᏞᏍᏗᏃ ᎠᏗᏒᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ ᎠᎴ ᏗᏓᏛᏳᏤᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
061313.phonetic: Du-yu-go-dv ge-se-s-di i-de-hv-i, i-ga ni-ge-so na-s-gi-ya-i; v-tla-s-di-no a-li-s-ga-na-wa-s-di ge-sv-i, a-le u-da-yv-s-de-s-di ge-sv-i, a-le u-de-li-dv di-ni-si-di ge-sv-i, a-le no-li-si-na-hi-s-dv-na a-le-ni-da-s-di ge-sv-i, v-tle-s-di-no a-di-sv-s-di ge-sv-i a-le di-da-dv-yu-tse-di ge-sv-i.

061314.english: But put ye on the Lord Jesus Christ, and make not provision for the flesh, to fulfill the lusts thereof.
061314.cherokee: ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎡᏣᏄᏬᏍᏓ, ᎠᎴ ᏞᏍᏗ ᏱᏣᏛᏅᎢᏍᏓᏁᎴᏍᏗ ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎬᎥᏍᎬ ᎢᏣᏛᏁᏗᏱ.
061314.phonetic: U-gv-wi-yu-hi-s-gi-ni Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv e-tsa-nu-wo-s-da, a-le tle-s-di yi-tsa-dv-nv-i-s-da-ne-le-s-di u-que-da-li ge-sv-i, na-s-gi u-gv-v-s-gv i-tsa-dv-ne-di-yi.

061401.english: Him that is weak in the faith receive ye, but not to doubtful disputations.
061401.cherokee: ᎩᎶ ᏩᎾᎦᎳ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎤᏬᎯᏳᏒᎢ ᏕᏣᏓᏂᎸᎨᏍᏗ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᏗᎾ ᏗᏧᎪᏙᏗᏱᏉ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎠᏓᏅᏕᏍᎬᎢ.
061401.phonetic: Gi-lo wa-na-ga-la ge-se-s-di u-wo-hi-yu-sv-i de-tsa-da-ni-lv-ge-s-di, v-tla a-di-na di-tsu-go-do-di-yi-quo nu-s-dv a-da-nv-de-s-gv-i.

061402.english: For one believeth that he may eat all things: another, who is weak, eateth herbs.
061402.cherokee: ᎠᏏᏴᏫ ᏂᎦᎥᏉ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎬᏩᎵᏍᏓᏴᏙᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏬᎯᏳᏐᎢ; ᎩᎶᏃ ᎠᏩᎾᎦᎳ ᎠᏛᏒᎥᏍᎩᏉ ᎠᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏍᎪᎢ.
061402.phonetic: A-si-yv-wi ni-ga-v-quo go-hu-s-di gv-wa-li-s-da-yv-do-di ge-sv u-wo-hi-yu-so-i; gi-lo-no a-wa-na-ga-la a-dv-sv-v-s-gi-quo a-li-s-da-yv-di-s-go-i.

061403.english: Let not him that eateth despise him that eateth not; and let not him which eateth not judge him that eateth: for God hath received him.
061403.cherokee: ᏞᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎠᎵᏍᏓᏴᎲᏍᎩ ᏅᎵᏌᎵᏉ ᏳᏰᎸᏁᏍᏗ Ꮎ ᎾᎵᏍᏓᏴᎲᏍᎬᎾ; ᎠᎴ ᏞᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎾᎵᏍᏓᏴᎲᏍᎬᎾ ᏱᏚᏭᎪᏓᏁᎴᏍᏗ Ꮎ ᎠᎵᏍᏓᏴᎲᏍᎩ; ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏰᏃ ᏚᏓᏂᎸᏨ.
061403.phonetic: Tle-s-di na-s-gi na a-li-s-da-yv-hv-s-gi nv-li-sa-li-quo yu-ye-lv-ne-s-di na na-li-s-da-yv-hv-s-gv-na; a-le tle-s-di na-s-gi na na-li-s-da-yv-hv-s-gv-na yi-du-wu-go-da-ne-le-s-di na a-li-s-da-yv-hv-s-gi; U-ne-la-nv-hi-ye-no du-da-ni-lv-tsv.

061404.english: Who art thou that judgest another man's servant? to his own master he standeth or falleth. Yea, he shall be holden up: for God is able to make him stand.
061404.cherokee: ᎦᎪ ᏂᎯ ᏥᏕᎯᏳᎪᏓᏁ ᏅᏩᏓᎴ ᎤᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ?  ᎤᏩᏒᏉ ᎤᏅᏏᏙᎯ ᎤᎵᏍᎦᏍᏙᏗ ᎦᏙᎬ ᎠᎴ ᎦᏅᎬᎢ.  ᎥᎥ, ᎠᏥᏲᏍᏙᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎤᏅᎢᏍᏗᏱ; ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏰᏃ ᏰᎵᏉ ᎤᎴᏗᏱ ᎢᎬᏩᏁᏗ.
061404.phonetic: Ga-go ni-hi tsi-de-hi-yu-go-da-ne nv-wa-da-le u-nv-si-da-s-di?  u-wa-sv-quo u-nv-si-do-hi u-li-s-ga-s-do-di ga-do-gv a-le ga-nv-gv-i.  V-v, a-tsi-yo-s-do-da-ne-di ge-se-s-di u-nv-i-s-di-yi; U-ne-la-nv-hi-ye-no ye-li-quo u-le-di-yi i-gv-wa-ne-di.

061405.english: One man esteemeth one day above another: another esteemeth every day alike. Let every man be fully persuaded in his own mind.
061405.cherokee: ᎩᎶ ᎤᏟ ᏄᎸᏉᏙ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎤᏍᏗ ᎢᎦ ᎡᏍᎦᏉ ᏅᏩᏓᎴ ᎢᎦ; ᎩᎶᏃ ᏂᎦᎥᏉ ᎢᎦ ᏚᎸᏉᏙᎢ.  ᎾᏂᎥ ᎩᎶ ᎠᎧᎵᎢ ᎤᏃᎯᏳᏎᏍᏗ ᎤᏅᏒ ᏙᏧᎾᏓᏅᏛᎢ.
061405.phonetic: Gi-lo u-tli nu-lv-quo-do go-hu-s-di u-s-di i-ga e-s-ga-quo nv-wa-da-le i-ga; gi-lo-no ni-ga-v-quo i-ga du-lv-quo-do-i.  Na-ni-v gi-lo a-ka-li-i u-no-hi-yu-se-s-di u-nv-sv do-tsu-na-da-nv-dv-i.

061406.english: He that regardeth the day, regardeth it unto the Lord; and he that regardeth not the day, to the Lord he doth not regard it. He that eateth, eateth to the Lord, for he giveth God thanks; and he that eateth not, to the Lord he eateth not, and giveth God thanks.
061406.cherokee: ᎩᎶ ᏧᎸᏉᏙ ᎢᎦ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎦᎸᏉᏓᏁᎰᎢ; ᎩᎶᏃ ᏄᎸᏉᏛᎾ ᏥᎨᏐ ᎢᎦ, ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏍᎪ ᏄᎸᏉᏛᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ.  ᎩᎶ ᏣᎵᏍᏓᏴᎲᏍᎪᎢ, ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎠᎵᏍᏓᏴᎾᏁᎰᎢ; ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏰᏃ ᎠᎵᎮᎵᏤᎰᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᎩᎶ ᎾᎵᏍᏓᏴᎲᏍᎬᎾ ᏥᎨᏐᎢ, ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎦᎸᏉᏙᏗᏍᎪ ᎾᎵᏍᏓᏴᎲᏍᎬᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎵᎮᎵᏤᎰᎢ.
061406.phonetic: Gi-lo tsu-lv-quo-do i-ga U-gv-wi-yu-hi ga-lv-quo-da-ne-ho-i; gi-lo-no nu-lv-quo-dv-na tsi-ge-so i-ga, U-gv-wi-yu-hi ga-lv-quo-di-s-go nu-lv-quo-dv-na ge-sv-i.  Gi-lo tsa-li-s-da-yv-hv-s-go-i, U-gv-wi-yu-hi a-li-s-da-yv-na-ne-ho-i; U-ne-la-nv-hi-ye-no a-li-he-li-tse-ho-i; a-le gi-lo na-li-s-da-yv-hv-s-gv-na tsi-ge-so-i, U-gv-wi-yu-hi ga-lv-quo-do-di-s-go na-li-s-da-yv-hv-s-gv-na ge-sv-i, a-le U-ne-la-nv-hi a-li-he-li-tse-ho-i.

061407.english: For none of us liveth to himself, and no man dieth to himself.
061407.cherokee: ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᎩᎶ ᎢᎦᏁᎳᎩᏯ ᏱᎩ ᎢᏕᎲᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᎩᎶ ᎤᏁᎳᎩᏯ ᏱᎩ ᎠᏲᎱᏍᎬᎢ.
061407.phonetic: V-tla-ye-no gi-lo i-ga-ne-la-gi-ya yi-gi i-de-hv-i, v-tla a-le gi-lo u-ne-la-gi-ya yi-gi a-yo-hu-s-gv-i.

061408.english: For whether we live, we live unto the Lord; and whether we die, we die unto the Lord: whether we live therefore, or die, we are the Lord's.
061408.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏰᏃ ᏱᏓᎴᏂᏙᎭ, ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎡᏓᎴᏂᏕᎭ; ᎠᎴ ᎢᏳ ᏱᏗᏗᏲᎱᏍᎦ, ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎡᏗᏲᎱᎯᏎᎭ; ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎢᏳᏃ ᏱᏓᎴᏂᏙᎭ, ᎠᎴ ᏱᏗᏗᏲᎱᏍᎦ, ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎡᏓᏤᎵᎦ.
061408.phonetic: I-yu-ye-no yi-da-le-ni-do-ha, U-gv-wi-yu-hi e-da-le-ni-de-ha; a-le i-yu yi-di-di-yo-hu-s-ga, U-gv-wi-yu-hi e-di-yo-hu-hi-se-ha; na-s-gi-no i-yu-s-di i-yu-no yi-da-le-ni-do-ha, a-le yi-di-di-yo-hu-s-ga, U-gv-wi-yu-hi e-da-tse-li-ga.

061409.english: For to this end Christ both died, and rose, and revived, that he might be Lord both of the dead and living.
061409.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᎯᎠ ᎤᎬᏩᎴ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏧᏲᎱᏎᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏥᏚᎴᎯᏌᏁᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏧᏩᏃᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᏧᏂᏲᎱᏒᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏗᏅᏃᏛ ᎤᎾᏤᎵᎦ.
061409.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ye-no hi-a u-gv-wa-le Ga-lo-ne-dv tsu-yo-hu-se-i, a-le tsi-du-le-hi-sa-ne-i, a-le tsu-wa-no-se-i, na-s-gi U-gv-wi-yu-hi i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi tsu-ni-yo-hu-sv-hi a-le na-s-quo di-nv-no-dv u-na-tse-li-ga.

061410.english: But why dost thou judge thy brother? or why dost thou set at nought thy brother? for we shall all stand before the judgment seat of Christ.
061410.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏂᎯ, ᎦᏙᏃ ᏙᎯᏳᎪᏓᏁᎭ ᎢᏍᏓᎵᏅᏟ?  ᎠᎴ ᏂᎯ ᎾᏍᏉ, ᎦᏙᏃ ᏅᎵᏌᎵᏉ ᎢᎯᏰᎸᏍᎦ ᎢᏍᏓᎵᏅᏟ?  ᏂᎦᏗᏳᏰᏃ ᎢᎬᏱᏗᏢ ᏫᎦᎴᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏧᏭᎪᏙᏗᏱ ᎤᏪᏍᎩᎸᎢ.
061410.phonetic: A-le ni-hi, ga-do-no do-hi-yu-go-da-ne-ha i-s-da-li-nv-tli?  a-le ni-hi na-s-quo, ga-do-no nv-li-sa-li-quo i-hi-ye-lv-s-ga i-s-da-li-nv-tli?  ni-ga-di-yu-ye-no i-gv-yi-di-tlv wi-ga-le-di ge-se-s-di Ga-lo-ne-dv tsu-wu-go-do-di-yi u-we-s-gi-lv-i.

061411.english: For it is written, As I live, saith the Lord, every knee shall bow to me, and every tongue shall confess to God.
061411.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏰᏃ ᏂᎬᏅ ᎪᏪᎳ, ᎨᎥ ᏄᏙᎯᏳᏒᎢ, ᎠᏗᎭ ᏱᎰᏩ, ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᏙᏓᎬᏆᎵᏂᏆᏅᏁᎵ ᎠᏴ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏅᏓᎬᏩᏁᎵ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ.
061411.phonetic: Hi-a-ye-no ni-gv-nv go-we-la, Ge-v nu-do-hi-yu-sv-i, a-di-ha Yi-ho-wa, ni-ga-di-yu do-da-gv-qua-li-ni-qua-nv-ne-li a-yv, a-le ni-ga-di-yu gv-ni-ge-sv nv-da-gv-wa-ne-li U-ne-la-nv-hi.

061412.english: So then every one of us shall give account of himself to God.
061412.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏥᏄᏍᏗ ᏂᏗᎥ ᎢᏗᏏᏴᏫᎭ ᎨᏒ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᏰᏛᏁᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏂᎦᏛᏁᎵᏙᎸᎢ.
061412.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no tsi-nu-s-di ni-di-v i-di-si-yv-wi-ha ge-sv gv-ni-ge-sv i-ye-dv-ne-di ge-se-s-di U-ne-la-nv-hi ni-ga-dv-ne-li-do-lv-i.

061413.english: Let us not therefore judge one another any more: but judge this rather, that no man put a stumblingblock or an occasion to fall in his brother's way.
061413.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏞᏍᏗ ᎪᎯ ᎢᏳᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏱᏗᏓᏓᏚᎪᏓᏁᎮᏍᏗ; ᎯᎠᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᏎᏍᏗ ᏕᏧᎪᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏓᏙᏕᏍᏗᏍᎩ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏍᏢᏂᏍᏗᏍᎩ ᎢᏥᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎢᏣᎵᏅᏟ ᎤᎶᎯᏍᏗᏱ.
061413.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di tle-s-di go-hi i-yu-da-le-nv-dv yi-di-da-da-du-go-da-ne-he-s-di; hi-a-s-gi-ni u-gv-wi-yu-se-s-di de-tsu-go-di-s-ge-s-di, na-s-gi a-da-do-de-s-di-s-gi a-le u-s-tlv-ni-s-di-s-gi i-tsi-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na i-tsa-li-nv-tli u-lo-hi-s-di-yi.

061414.english: I know, and am persuaded by the Lord Jesus, that there is nothing unclean of itself: but to him that esteemeth any thing to be unclean, to him it is unclean.
061414.cherokee: ᏥᎦᏔᎭ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏉᎯᏳᏗ ᎾᏋᏁᎸ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏥᏌ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎤᏩᏒᏉ ᎨᏒ ᎦᏓᎭ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎩᎶᏍᎩᏂ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎦᏓᎭ ᎠᏰᎸᏍᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᏓᎭ ᏄᎵᏍᏓᏁᎰᎢ.
061414.phonetic: Tsi-ga-ta-ha, a-le a-quo-hi-yu-di na-quv-ne-lv U-gv-wi-yu-hi Tsi-sa, na-s-gi go-hu-s-di u-wa-sv-quo ge-sv ga-da-ha ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv-i; gi-lo-s-gi-ni go-hu-s-di ga-da-ha a-ye-lv-s-gi, na-s-gi ga-da-ha nu-li-s-da-ne-ho-i.

061415.english: But if thy brother be grieved with thy meat, now walkest thou not charitably. Destroy not him with thy meat, for whom Christ died.
061415.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏍᎩᏂ ᏗᏍᏓᏓᏅᏟ ᎠᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗ ᏱᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎡᎯᏍᏗ ᏱᏯᏓᏅᏓᏗᏍᏔᏅ, ᎿᎭᏉ ᎥᏝ ᎠᏓᎨᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏴᏗᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎿᎭᏛᏁᎲᎢ.  ᏞᏍᏗ ᎭᎵᏍᏓᏴᎲᏍᎬ ᎯᏛᏙᏔᏅᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏲᎱᎯᏎᎸᎯ.
061415.phonetic: I-yu-s-gi-ni di-s-da-da-nv-tli a-li-s-da-yv-di yi-nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha e-hi-s-di yi-ya-da-nv-da-di-s-ta-nv, hna-quo v-tla a-da-ge-yu-di ge-sv yv-di-ha na-s-gi hna-dv-ne-hv-i.  Tle-s-di ha-li-s-da-yv-hv-s-gv hi-dv-do-ta-nv-gi na-s-gi na Ga-lo-ne-dv u-yo-hu-hi-se-lv-hi.

061416.english: Let not then your good be evil spoken of:
061416.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏞᏍᏗ ᎣᏏᏳ ᏂᏣᏛᏁᎲ ᎤᏐᏅ ᏳᏂᏃᎮᎴᏍᏗ.
061416.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no tle-s-di o-si-yu ni-tsa-dv-ne-hv u-so-nv yu-ni-no-he-le-s-di.

061417.english: For the kingdom of God is not meat and drink; but righteousness, and peace, and joy in the Holy Ghost.
061417.cherokee: ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏰᏃ ᎤᏤᎵᎪᎯ ᎥᏝ ᎠᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏉ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏗᏔᏍᏗᏉ ᎨᏒ ᏱᎩ; ᏚᏳᎪᏛᏍᎩᏂ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏅᏩᏙᎯᏯᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎵᎮᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ.
061417.phonetic: U-ne-la-nv-hi-ye-no u-tse-li-go-hi v-tla a-li-s-da-yv-di-quo a-le a-di-ta-s-di-quo ge-sv yi-gi; du-yu-go-dv-s-gi-ni ge-sv-i, a-le nv-wa-do-hi-ya-dv ge-sv-i, a-le a-li-he-li-s-di ge-sv-i ga-lv-quo-di-yu A-da-nv-do i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv.

061418.english: For he that in these things serveth Christ is acceptable to God, and approved of men.
061418.cherokee: ᎩᎶᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᎤᏮᏗᏕᎬ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎠᏛᏁᎮᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏗᎬᏩᏓᏂᎸᎢᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎦᎬᏩᏰᎸᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏴᏫ.
061418.phonetic: Gi-lo-ye-no na-s-gi hi-a u-wv-di-de-gv Ga-lo-ne-dv go-hu-s-di a-dv-ne-he-s-di, na-s-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi di-gv-wa-da-ni-lv-i-s-di ge-se-s-di, a-le o-si-yu ga-gv-wa-ye-lv-di ge-se-s-di yv-wi.

061419.english: Let us therefore follow after the things which make for peace, and things wherewith one may edify another.
061419.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎢᏗᏍᏓᏩᏗᏎᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏙᎯ ᎢᎬᏁᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᎨᎦᏓᎵᏂᎪᎯᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
061419.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di i-di-s-da-wa-di-se-s-di na-s-gi do-hi i-gv-ne-hi ge-sv-i, a-le na-s-gi di-ge-ga-da-li-ni-go-hi-s-do-di ge-sv-i.

061420.english: For meat destroy not the work of God. All things indeed are pure; but it is evil for that man who eateth with offence.
061420.cherokee: ᏞᏍᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵ ᏗᎦᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏱᏣᏲᏍᏔᏁᏍᏗ ᎠᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏉ ᏱᏅᏧᎵᏍᏙᏔᏁᏍᏗ.  ᏄᏓᎴᏒᏰᏃ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯ ᎦᏓᎭ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ; ᎤᏲᏍᎩᏂ ᎾᏛᏁᎰ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏴᏫ ᎠᎵᏍᏓᏴᎲᏍᎬ ᎩᎶ ᏱᏗᎪᏕᏍᏗᎭ.
061420.phonetic: Tle-s-di U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li di-ga-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di ge-sv yi-tsa-yo-s-ta-ne-s-di a-li-s-da-yv-di-quo yi-nv-tsu-li-s-do-ta-ne-s-di.  Nu-da-le-sv-ye-no go-hu-s-di u-do-hi-yu-hi ga-da-ha ni-ge-sv-na; u-yo-s-gi-ni na-dv-ne-ho na-s-gi na yv-wi a-li-s-da-yv-hv-s-gv gi-lo yi-di-go-de-s-di-ha.

061421.english: It is good neither to eat flesh, nor to drink wine, nor any thing whereby thy brother stumbleth, or is offended, or is made weak.
061421.cherokee: ᎤᏟ ᎤᏏᏳ ᎭᏫᏯ ᎠᎩᏍᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ, ᎠᎴ ᎩᎦᎨ-ᎠᏗᏔᏍᏗ ᎠᏗᏔᏍᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ, ᎠᎴ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎠᏛᏁᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᏍᏓᏓᏅᏟ ᏧᏬᏕᏍᏗᏍᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏍᏢᏂᏍᏗᏍᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏩᎾᎦᎳ ᎢᏳᏩᏁᎯ.
061421.phonetic: U-tli u-si-yu ha-wi-ya a-gi-s-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na, a-le gi-ga-ge--a-di-ta-s-di a-di-ta-s-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na, a-le go-hu-s-di a-dv-ne-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na, na-s-gi di-s-da-da-nv-tli tsu-wo-de-s-di-s-gi, a-le u-s-tlv-ni-s-di-s-gi, a-le a-wa-na-ga-la i-yu-wa-ne-hi.

061422.english: Hast thou faith? have it to thyself before God. Happy is he that condemneth not himself in that thing which he alloweth.
061422.cherokee: ᎪᎯᏳᏗᏍᎪ ᎨᏒ ᏤᎭ?  ᏣᏤᎵᏛ ᏦᎯᏳᏎᏍᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎦᏔᎲᎢ.  ᏅᏩᏙᎯᏍᏛ ᎤᏓᏅᏖᏍᏗ ᎩᎶ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎤᏰᎸᏒ ᎬᏗᏍᎬ ᎤᏩᏒ ᏂᏓᏓᏚᎪᏓᏁᎲᎾ ᎢᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
061422.phonetic: Go-hi-yu-di-s-go ge-sv tse-ha?  tsa-tse-li-dv tso-hi-yu-se-s-di U-ne-la-nv-hi a-ga-ta-hv-i.  Nv-wa-do-hi-s-dv u-da-nv-te-s-di gi-lo nu-s-dv o-si-yu u-ye-lv-sv gv-di-s-gv u-wa-sv ni-da-da-du-go-da-ne-hv-na i-ge-se-s-di.

061423.english: And he that doubteth is damned if he eat, because he eateth not of faith: for whatsoever is not of faith is sin.
061423.cherokee: ᎩᎶᏍᎩᏂ ᏧᏢᏫᏎᎯ ᏕᎫᎪᏗᏍᎪ ᎤᏍᎦᏅᏨ ᎢᏳᏃ ᏳᎵᏍᏓᏴᏅ, ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎪ ᏄᏬᎯᏳᏒᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎵᏍᏓᏴᎲᏍᎬᎢ; ᏂᎦᎥᏰᏃ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏅᏗᏓᎴᎲᏍᎬᎾ ᏱᎩ ᎠᏍᎦᏂ ᎨᏐᎢ.
061423.phonetic: Gi-lo-s-gi-ni tsu-tlv-wi-se-hi de-gu-go-di-s-go u-s-ga-nv-tsv i-yu-no yu-li-s-da-yv-nv, nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-go nu-wo-hi-yu-sv-na ge-sv a-li-s-da-yv-hv-s-gv-i; ni-ga-v-ye-no go-hu-s-di go-hi-yu-di ge-sv nv-di-da-le-hv-s-gv-na yi-gi a-s-ga-ni ge-so-i.

061501.english: We then that are strong ought to bear the infirmities of the weak, and not to please ourselves.
061501.cherokee: ᎠᏴᏃ ᏗᎦᎵᏂᎩᏛ ᏥᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᎩ ᏱᏗᏕᎵᏎᎭ ᏓᏂᏩᎾᎦᎸ ᏗᏂᏩᎾᎦᎳᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎥᏝ ᎢᎬᏒᏉ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎢᎩᏰᎸᏗ ᏱᏂᎨᏓᏛᏁᎵᏙᎭ.
061501.phonetic: A-yv-no di-ga-li-ni-gi-dv tsi-gi u-ne-la-gi yi-di-de-li-se-ha da-ni-wa-na-ga-lv di-ni-wa-na-ga-la-i, a-le v-tla i-gv-sv-quo o-s-dv i-gi-ye-lv-di yi-ni-ge-da-dv-ne-li-do-ha.

061502.english: Let every one of us please his neighbour for his good to edification.
061502.cherokee: ᏂᏗᎥ ᎢᏗᏏᏴᏫᎭ ᎨᏒ ᎾᎥ ᎢᎦᏓᎳ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎤᏰᎸᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏂᏓᏛᏁᎮᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎵᏂᎪᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ.
061502.phonetic: Ni-di-v i-di-si-yv-wi-ha ge-sv na-v i-ga-da-la o-s-dv u-ye-lv-di ge-sv ni-da-dv-ne-he-s-di na-s-gi o-s-dv ge-sv u-li-ni-go-hi-s-di-yi u-gv-wa-li.

061503.english: For even Christ pleased not himself; but, as it is written, The reproaches of them that reproached thee fell on me.
061503.cherokee: ᎦᎶᏁᏛᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎥᏝ ᎤᏩᏒᏉ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎤᏰᎸᏗ ᏱᎾᏛᏁᎮᎢ; ᎯᎠᏍᎩᏂ ᏥᏂᎬᏅ ᏥᎪᏪᎳ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ [ᏄᎵᏍᏓᏁᎴᎢ,] ᎦᎬᏩᎾᏓᏐᏢᏛ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎦᎨᏣᏐᏢᏔᏅᎢ ᎠᏴ ᎠᎩᎷᏤᎸᎩ.
061503.phonetic: Ga-lo-ne-dv-ye-no na-s-quo v-tla u-wa-sv-quo o-si-yu u-ye-lv-di yi-na-dv-ne-he-i; Hi-a-s-gi-ni tsi-ni-gv-nv tsi-go-we-la na-s-gi-ya [nu-li-s-da-ne-le-i,] ga-gv-wa-na-da-so-tlv-dv na-s-gi na ga-ge-tsa-so-tlv-ta-nv-i a-yv a-gi-lu-tse-lv-gi.

061504.english: For whatsoever things were written aforetime were written for our learning, that we through patience and comfort of the scriptures might have hope.
061504.cherokee: ᏄᏓᎴᏒᏰᏃ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎡᏘ ᎪᏪᎳᏅᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏴ ᎢᎦᏕᎶᏆᏍᏗ ᎠᏰᎸᏎ ᎪᏪᎳᏁᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᏛᏂᏗᏳ ᏂᎬᏁᎲ ᎠᎴ ᎤᎦᎵᏍᏗ ᎢᎦᏓᏅᏓᏗᏍᏗᏍᎬ ᎪᏪᎵ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏚᎩ ᎢᎬᎯ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ.
061504.phonetic: Nu-da-le-sv-ye-no go-hu-s-di e-ti go-we-la-nv-hi ge-sv a-yv i-ga-de-lo-qua-s-di a-ye-lv-se go-we-la-ne-i, na-s-gi di-dv-ni-di-yu ni-gv-ne-hv a-le u-ga-li-s-di i-ga-da-nv-da-di-s-di-s-gv go-we-li na-s-gi u-du-gi i-gv-hi i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi.

061505.english: Now the God of patience and consolation grant you to be likeminded one toward another according to Christ Jesus:
061505.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎬᏂᏗᏳ ᎠᎴ ᎤᎦᎵᏍᏗ ᎢᏯᏓᏛᏁᎯ ᎢᏥᏁᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎤᏠᏱᏉ ᎢᏣᏓᏅᏓᏗᏍᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏥᏌ ᎠᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬᎢ;
061505.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no U-ne-la-nv-hi a-gv-ni-di-yu a-le u-ga-li-s-di i-ya-da-dv-ne-hi i-tsi-ne-di ge-se-s-di u-tlo-yi-quo i-tsa-da-nv-da-di-s-di-yi, na-s-gi-ya Ga-lo-ne-dv Tsi-sa a-da-nv-te-s-gv-i;

061506.english: That ye may with one mind and one mouth glorify God, even the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ.
061506.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏌᏉ ᏕᏣᏓᏅᏛᎢ ᎠᎴ ᏌᏉ ᎢᏥᎰᎵ ᎢᏨᏙᏗᏱ ᎡᏥᎸᏉᏙᏗᏱ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎤᏙᏓ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎢᎦᏤᎵ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ.
061506.phonetic: Na-s-gi sa-quo de-tsa-da-nv-dv-i a-le sa-quo i-tsi-ho-li i-tsv-do-di-yi e-tsi-lv-quo-do-di-yi U-ne-la-nv-hi na-s-gi na U-do-da U-gv-wi-yu-hi i-ga-tse-li Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv.

061507.english: Wherefore receive ye one another, as Christ also received us to the glory of God.
061507.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏕᏣᏓᏓᏂᎸᎨᏍᏗᏉ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏕᎦᏓᏂᎸᏨ ᎠᏴ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎢᏯᎬᏁᏗᏱ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ.
061507.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di de-tsa-da-da-ni-lv-ge-s-di-quo, na-s-gi-ya na-s-quo Ga-lo-ne-dv de-ga-da-ni-lv-tsv a-yv, na-s-gi ga-lv-quo-di-yu i-ya-gv-ne-di-yi U-ne-la-nv-hi.

061508.english: Now I say that Jesus Christ was a minister of the circumcision for the truth of God, to confirm the promises made unto the fathers:
061508.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏥᏪᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏗᎨᏥᎤᏍᏕᏎᎸᎯ ᎤᏂᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅᎩ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏩᏁᏗᏱ ᎦᏰᎪᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ, ᏧᏍᏓᏱᏗᏍᏗᏱ ᎨᏥᏚᎢᏍᏓᏁᎸᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏂᎦᏴᎵᎨᎢ.
061508.phonetic: A-le hi-a ni-tsi-we-ha, na-s-gi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv di-ge-tsi-u-s-de-se-lv-hi u-ni-nv-si-da-s-di nu-li-s-ta-nv-gi gv-ni-ge-sv i-yu-wa-ne-di-yi ga-ye-go-gi ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi, tsu-s-da-yi-di-s-di-yi ge-tsi-du-i-s-da-ne-lv-hi ge-sv a-ni-ga-yv-li-ge-i.

061509.english: And that the Gentiles might glorify God for his mercy; as it is written, For this cause I will confess to thee among the Gentiles, and sing unto thy name.
061509.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ ᎤᏂᎸᏉᏙᏗᏱ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ; ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏂᎬᏅ ᏥᎪᏪᎳ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏓᎬᏁᎢᏍᏔᏂ ᎠᏁᎲ ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ, ᎠᎴ ᏙᏓᏥᏃᎩᏍᏔᏂ ᏕᏣᏙᎥᎢ.
061509.phonetic: A-le na-s-gi tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv yv-wi u-ni-lv-quo-do-di-yi U-ne-la-nv-hi u-da-do-li-s-di-yu ge-sv i-yu-s-di; na-s-gi-ya hi-a tsi-ni-gv-nv tsi-go-we-la, Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di da-gv-ne-i-s-ta-ni a-ne-hv tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv yv-wi, a-le do-da-tsi-no-gi-s-ta-ni de-tsa-do-v-i.

061510.english: And again he saith, Rejoice, ye Gentiles, with his people.
061510.cherokee: ᏔᎵᏁᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏪᎭ, ᎢᏣᎵᎮᎵᎩ ᏗᏣᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ, ᏗᏣᎵᎪᎲᏏ ᏧᏤᎵ ᏴᏫ.
061510.phonetic: Ta-li-ne-no hi-a ni-ga-we-ha, I-tsa-li-he-li-gi di-tsa-da-le-nv-dv yv-wi, di-tsa-li-go-hv-si tsu-tse-li yv-wi.

061511.english: And again, Praise the Lord, all ye Gentiles; and laud him, all ye people.
061511.cherokee: ᏔᎵᏁᏃ, ᎡᏥᎸᏉᏓ ᏱᎰᏩ, ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᏗᏣᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ; ᎠᎴ ᎡᏥᎸᏉᏓ, ᏂᏥᎥᏉ ᏴᏫ.
061511.phonetic: Ta-li-ne-no, E-tsi-lv-quo-da Yi-ho-wa, ni-ga-di-yu di-tsa-da-le-nv-dv yv-wi; a-le e-tsi-lv-quo-da, ni-tsi-v-quo yv-wi.

061512.english: And again, Esaias saith, There shall be a root of Jesse, and he that shall rise to reign over the Gentiles; in him shall the Gentiles trust.
061512.cherokee: ᏔᎵᏁᏃ ᎢᏌᏯ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏪᎭ; ᎤᎿᎭᏍᏕᏢ ᎦᎾᏄᎪᎨᏍᏗ ᏤᏏᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏏᏴᏫ ᏙᏛᎴᏂ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᏌᏕᎩ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ ᎠᏁᎲᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ ᏓᎬᏩᎵᏍᎦᏍᏙᏔᏂ.
061512.phonetic: Ta-li-ne-no I-sa-ya hi-a ni-ga-we-ha; U-hna-s-de-tlv ga-na-nu-go-ge-s-di Tse-si-yi, a-le a-si-yv-wi do-dv-le-ni u-gv-wi-yu-sa-de-gi i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv yv-wi a-ne-hv-i; na-s-gi tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv yv-wi da-gv-wa-li-s-ga-s-do-ta-ni.

061513.english: Now the God of hope fill you with all joy and peace in believing, that ye may abound in hope, through the power of the Holy Ghost.
061513.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏚᎩ ᎬᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏓᏁᎯ ᎢᏥᎧᎵᎢᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏄᏓᎴᏒ ᎤᎵᎮᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᏅᏩᏙᎯᏯᏛ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏦᎯᏳᏒ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏣᏔᏅᎯ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎤᏚᎩ ᎢᏨᏒᎢ, ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎤᎵᏂᎬᎬ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ.
061513.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no U-ne-la-nv-hi u-du-gi gv-di ge-sv a-da-ne-hi i-tsi-ka-li-i-s-di ge-se-s-di nu-da-le-sv u-li-he-li-s-di ge-sv a-le nv-wa-do-hi-ya-dv ge-sv i-tso-hi-yu-sv i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv, na-s-gi u-tsa-ta-nv-hi i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi u-du-gi i-tsv-sv-i, ga-lv-quo-di-yu A-da-nv-do u-li-ni-gv-gv i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv.

061514.english: And I myself also am persuaded of you, my brethren, that ye also are full of goodness, filled with all knowledge, able also to admonish one another.
061514.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎠᏋᏒ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᏉᎯᏳᎭ ᏂᎯ ᎢᏨᏯᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬᎢ, ᎢᏓᎵᏅᏟ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏥᎧᎵᎢ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏄᏓᎴᏒ ᎠᎦᏙᎥᎯᏍᏗᎨᏒ ᎢᏥᎧᎵᎥᎢ, ᏰᎵᏉ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏗᎨᏣᏓᎬᏍᎪᎸᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
061514.phonetic: A-le a-quv-sv na-s-quo a-quo-hi-yu-ha ni-hi i-tsv-ya-da-nv-te-s-gv-i, i-da-li-nv-tli, na-s-gi ni-hi na-s-quo o-s-dv ge-sv i-tsi-ka-li-i ge-sv-i, a-le nu-da-le-sv a-ga-do-v-hi-s-di-ge-sv i-tsi-ka-li-v-i, ye-li-quo na-s-quo di-ge-tsa-da-gv-s-go-lv-di ge-sv-i.

061515.english: Nevertheless, brethren, I have written the more boldly unto you in some sort, as putting you in mind, because of the grace that is given to me of God,
061515.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎢᏓᎵᏅᏟ, ᎤᏟ ᎢᎦᎢ ᏂᏥᎾᏰᏍᎬᎾ ᏫᏨᏲᏪᎳᏏ ᎢᏨᏯᏅᏓᏗᏍᏗᏍᎬᎢ, ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎩᏁᎸ ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ,
061515.phonetic: A-se-no i-da-li-nv-tli, u-tli i-ga-i ni-tsi-na-ye-s-gv-na wi-tsv-yo-we-la-si i-tsv-ya-nv-da-di-s-di-s-gv-i, nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha U-ne-la-nv-hi a-gi-ne-lv gv-wa-ga-ti-ya u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv-i,

061516.english: That I should be the minister of Jesus Christ to the Gentiles, ministering the gospel of God, that the offering up of the Gentiles might be acceptable, being sanctified by the Holy Ghost.
061516.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎠᎩᏅᏏᏙᎯ ᎢᏯᏆᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ ᎠᏁᎲᎢ, ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᏓᎩᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ ᎬᏗᏍᎬᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎵᏍᎪᎸᏗᏍᎬ ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ ᎦᏥᏯᎵᏍᎪᎸᏗᏍᎬᎢ ᏧᏓᏂᎸᎢᏍᏗ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ, ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎢᏳᏩᏁᎸᎯ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ.
061516.phonetic: Na-s-gi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv a-gi-nv-si-do-hi i-ya-qua-li-s-do-di-yi tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv yv-wi a-ne-hv-i, ga-lv-quo-di-yu da-gi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li-ga gv-di-s-gv-i, na-s-gi ga-li-s-go-lv-di-s-gv tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv yv-wi ga-tsi-ya-li-s-go-lv-di-s-gv-i tsu-da-ni-lv-i-s-di i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi, ga-lv-quo-di-yu i-yu-wa-ne-lv-hi ga-lv-quo-di-yu A-da-nv-do.

061517.english: I have therefore whereof I may glory through Jesus Christ in those things which pertain to God.
061517.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎠᎩᎭ ᎠᏆᏢᏉᏙᏗ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᎿᎭᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ ᎨᏒᎢ.
061517.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di a-gi-ha a-qua-tlv-quo-do-di Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv, na-s-gi na-hna U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li u-gv-wa-li ge-sv-i.

061518.english: For I will not dare to speak of any of those things which Christ hath not wrought by me, to make the Gentiles obedient, by word and deed,
061518.cherokee: ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᏰᎵ ᏴᎦᏥᏁᎢᏍᏓ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏄᏛᏁᎸᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏴ ᎠᏋᏗᏍᎬᎢ, ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ ᎬᏩᏃᎯᏳᏗ ᏂᏕᎬᏁᎲᎢ, ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎠᎴ ᏗᎦᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎬᏗᏍᎬᎢ,
061518.phonetic: V-tla-ye-no ye-li yv-ga-tsi-ne-i-s-da na-s-gi Ga-lo-ne-dv nu-dv-ne-lv-na ge-sv a-yv a-quv-di-s-gv-i, tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv yv-wi gv-wa-no-hi-yu-di ni-de-gv-ne-hv-i, ka-no-he-dv a-le di-ga-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di ge-sv gv-di-s-gv-i,

061519.english: Through mighty signs and wonders, by the power of the Spirit of God; so that from Jerusalem, and round about unto Illyricum, I have fully preached the gospel of Christ.
061519.cherokee: [ᎠᎴ] ᎬᏗᏍᎬ ᎤᏰᎸᏛᎢ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏓᏅᏙ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎬᏗᏍᎬᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻ ᎤᏓᎴᏅᏛ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏚᏫᏛ ᎢᎵᎵᎦᎻ ᏩᏍᏗ, ᎤᎧᎵᏨᎯ ᎠᏆᎵᏥᏙᏅ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ;
061519.phonetic: [A-le] gv-di-s-gv u-ye-lv-dv-i a-le u-s-qua-ni-go-di, U-ne-la-nv-hi U-da-nv-do u-li-ni-gi-di-yu ge-sv gv-di-s-gv-i; na-s-gi Tsi-lu-si-li-mi u-da-le-nv-dv, a-le u-du-wi-dv I-li-li-ga-mi wa-s-di, u-ka-li-tsv-hi a-qua-li-tsi-do-nv o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv Ga-lo-ne-dv u-tse-li-ga;

061520.english: Yea, so have I strived to preach the gospel, not where Christ was named, lest I should build upon another man's foundation:
061520.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏄᏍᏛᎩ ᎠᏆᏟᏂᎬᏁᎸᎩ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎠᏆᎵᏥᏙᏗᏱ, ᎥᏝ ᎾᎿᎭᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎠᏥᏁᎢᏍᏔᏅᎢ, ᎩᎶ ᎤᏅᎯ ᎦᎫᏍᏛᏗ ᎠᏆᏁᏍᎨᏍᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ;
061520.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no nu-s-dv-gi a-qua-tli-ni-gv-ne-lv-gi o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv a-qua-li-tsi-do-di-yi, v-tla na-hna Ga-lo-ne-dv a-tsi-ne-i-s-ta-nv-i, gi-lo u-nv-hi ga-gu-s-dv-di a-qua-ne-s-ge-s-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na;

061521.english: But as it is written, To whom he was not spoken of, they shall see: and they that have not heard shall understand.
061521.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏯᏍᎩᏂ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏂᎬᏅ ᏥᎪᏪᎳ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎨᏥᏁᎢᏍᏓᏁᎸᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏛᏂᎪᎯ; ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎤᎾᏛᎦᏅᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏛᏃᎵᏥ.
061521.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ya-s-gi-ni hi-a tsi-ni-gv-nv tsi-go-we-la, Na-s-gi ge-tsi-ne-i-s-da-ne-lv-hi ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv-i, na-s-gi dv-ni-go-hi; a-le na-s-gi na u-na-dv-ga-nv-hi ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv na-s-gi dv-no-li-tsi.

061522.english: For which cause also I have been much hindered from coming to you.
061522.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎤᏣᏘ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎠᎩᏲᏍᏙᏓᏏ ᏫᏨᎷᏤᏗᏱ;
061522.phonetic: Na-s-gi na-s-quo nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha u-tsa-ti tsu-da-le-nv-dv a-gi-yo-s-do-da-si wi-tsv-lu-tse-di-yi;

061523.english: But now having no more place in these parts, and having a great desire these many years to come unto you;
061523.cherokee: ᎪᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎢᎸᎯᏢ ᏄᏜᏓᏅᏛᎾ ᏥᎩ ᎠᏂ ᎤᏚᏫᏛ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᎸᏍᎩ ᎾᏕᏘᏴ ᎤᏣᏘ ᏥᏅᏆᏚᎵᏍᎪ ᏫᏨᎷᏤᏗᏱ;
061523.phonetic: Go-hi-s-gi-ni hna-quo i-lv-hi-tlv nu-dla-nv-dv-na tsi-gi a-ni u-du-wi-dv, a-le i-lv-s-gi na-de-ti-yv u-tsa-ti tsi-nv-qua-du-li-s-go wi-tsv-lu-tse-di-yi;

061524.english: Whensoever I take my journey into Spain, I will come to you: for I trust to see you in my journey, and to be brought on my way thitherward by you, if first I be somewhat filled with your company.
061524.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᏍᏆᏂᏱ ᎨᏒᎭ, ᏫᏨᎷᏤᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ; ᎤᏚᎩᏰᏃ ᎠᏋᎭ ᎢᏨᎪᏩᏛᏗᏱ ᎾᎿ ᎭᏫᏥᎦᏖᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᎿᎭᎢᏗᏢ ᏫᏍᎩᏯᎪᏗᏱ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᎢᎬᏱ ᎠᎴᏉ ᏰᎵ ᎾᎩᏰᎸᏁᏍᏗ ᎢᏨᏰᎳᏗᏙᎸᎢ.
061524.phonetic: I-yu-no S-qua-ni-yi ge-sv-ha, wi-tsv-lu-tse-di ge-se-s-di; u-du-gi-ye-no a-quv-ha i-tsv-go-wa-dv-di-yi na-hna wi-tsi-ga-te-s-di, a-le na-hna i-di-tlv wi-s-gi-ya-go-di-yi, i-yu-no i-gv-yi a-le-quo ye-li na-gi-ye-lv-ne-s-di i-tsv-ye-la-di-do-lv-i.

061525.english: But now I go unto Jerusalem to minister unto the saints.
061525.cherokee: ᎪᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᏥᎩ ᎠᏇᏏᏗ ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻ ᎦᏥᏍᏕᎸᎯ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏘ.
061525.phonetic: Go-hi-s-gi-ni tsi-gi a-que-si-di Tsi-lu-si-li-mi ga-tsi-s-de-lv-hi u-na-da-nv-ti.

061526.english: For it hath pleased them of Macedonia and Achaia to make a certain contribution for the poor saints which are at Jerusalem.
061526.cherokee: ᎣᏏᏳᏰᏃ ᎤᏂᏰᎸᏅ ᎹᏏᏙᏂ ᎠᎴ ᎡᎦᏯ ᎠᏁᎯ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎤᏂᏗᏱ ᏅᏲ ᎢᏳᎾᏛᎿᎭᏕᎩ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏘ ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻ ᎠᏁᎯ ᎤᎾᎵᏍᏕᎸᏙᏗ.
061526.phonetic: O-si-yu-ye-no u-ni-ye-lv-nv Ma-si-do-ni a-le E-ga-ya a-ne-hi go-hu-s-di u-ni-di-yi nv-yo i-yu-na-dv-hna-de-gi u-na-da-nv-ti Tsi-lu-si-li-mi a-ne-hi u-na-li-s-de-lv-do-di.

061527.english: It hath pleased them verily; and their debtors they are. For if the Gentiles have been made partakers of their spiritual things, their duty is also to minister unto them in carnal things.
061527.cherokee: ᎣᏏᏳ ᎤᏂᏰᎸᏅ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯ; ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᏩᏂᏚᎦ.  ᎢᏳᏰᏃ ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ ᎤᏁᎳᏗᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᏱᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎾᏤᎵ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎤᎵᏍᏕᎸᏙᏗ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ, ᎢᏳᎾᏛᏁᏗ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏄᎾᎵᏍᏓᏁᎲᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏂᏍᏕᎸᏗᏱ ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᎤᎵᏍᏕᎸᏙᏗ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ.
061527.phonetic: O-si-yu u-ni-ye-lv-nv u-do-hi-yu-hi; a-le na-s-gi gv-wa-ni-du-ga.  I-yu-ye-no tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv yv-wi u-ne-la-di-s-ta-nv-hi yi-gi na-s-gi u-na-tse-li tsu-da-le-nv-dv a-da-nv-do u-li-s-de-lv-do-di u-gv-wa-li, i-yu-na-dv-ne-di na-s-quo nu-na-li-s-da-ne-hv-gi na-s-gi tsu-ni-s-de-lv-di-yi u-que-da-li u-li-s-de-lv-do-di u-gv-wa-li.

061528.english: When therefore I have performed this, and have sealed to them this fruit, I will come by you into Spain.
061528.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏍᏆᏛᎭ, ᎠᎴ ᏄᏜᏓᏏᏛᏒᎾ ᏂᎦᏥᏴᏁᎸ ᎤᏂᎪᏩᏛᏗᏱ, ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏓᏔᏅᎯ, ᏫᏨᎶᎢᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏍᏆᏂᏱ ᏫᏥᎦᏖᏍᏗ.
061528.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no i-yu-s-di hna-quo na-s-gi hi-a tsi-s-qua-dv-ha, a-le nu-dla-si-dv-sv-na ni-ga-tsi-yv-ne-lv u-ni-go-wa-dv-di-yi, hi-a na-s-gi u-da-ta-nv-hi, wi-tsv-lo-i-s-da-ne-di ge-se-s-di S-qua-ni-yi wi-tsi-ga-te-s-di.

061529.english: And I am sure that, when I come unto you, I shall come in the fullness of the blessing of the gospel of Christ.
061529.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏥᎦᏔᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎿᎭᏉ ᏫᏨᎷᏤᎸᎭ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎤᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ ᏥᏰᎮᏍᏗ ᏫᏨᎷᏤᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
061529.phonetic: A-le tsi-ga-ta-ha, na-s-gi hna-quo wi-tsv-lu-tse-lv-ha ni-ga-v o-s-dv u-da-ne-di ge-sv o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv Ga-lo-ne-dv u-tse-li-ga tsi-ye-he-s-di wi-tsv-lu-tse-di ge-se-s-di.

061530.english: Now I beseech you, brethren, for the Lord Jesus Christ's sake, and for the love of the Spirit, that ye strive together with me in your prayers to God for me;
061530.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎢᏨᏍᏗᏰᏗᎭ ᎢᏓᎵᏅᏟ, ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ, ᎠᎴ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎠᏓᎨᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎤᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏍᎩᏯᎵᎪᏁᏗᏱ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎡᏓᏓᏙᎵᏍᏓᏁᎲ ᎠᏴ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ,
061530.phonetic: A-le i-tsv-s-di-ye-di-ha i-da-li-nv-tli, U-gv-wi-yu-hi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha, a-le nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha a-da-ge-yu-di ge-sv A-da-nv-do u-da-ne-di ge-sv-i, na-s-gi s-gi-ya-li-go-ne-di-yi U-ne-la-nv-hi e-da-da-do-li-s-da-ne-hv a-yv ge-sv u-gv-wa-li,

061531.english: That I may be delivered from them that do not believe in Judaea; and that my service which I have for Jerusalem may be accepted of the saints;
061531.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᏥᏯᏚᏓᎳᎡᏗᏱ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎠᏃᎯᏳᎲᏍᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏧᏗᏱ ᎠᏁᎯ; ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᏥᏴᎡᎲ ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻ ᎠᏁᎯ, ᏧᎾᏓᏂᎸᎢᏍᏗᏱᏉ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏘ;
061531.phonetic: Na-s-gi ga-tsi-ya-du-da-la-e-di-yi na-s-gi na a-no-hi-yu-hv-s-gi ni-ge-sv-na Tsu-di-yi a-ne-hi; a-le na-s-gi ga-tsi-yv-e-hv Tsi-lu-si-li-mi a-ne-hi, tsu-na-da-ni-lv-i-s-di-yi-quo u-na-da-nv-ti;

061532.english: That I may come unto you with joy by the will of God, and may with you be refreshed.
061532.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏴ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎤᏰᎸᏅᎯ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ, ᎤᎵᎮᎵᏍᏗ ᎠᏆᏓᏅᏛ ᏫᏨᎷᏤᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᏂᎯ ᏗᎩᎦᎵᏍᏙᎯᏍᏗᏱ.
061532.phonetic: A-le na-s-gi a-yv o-si-yu u-ye-lv-nv-hi U-ne-la-nv-hi, u-li-he-li-s-di a-qua-da-nv-dv wi-tsv-lu-tse-di-yi, a-le i-tsu-la-ha ni-hi di-gi-ga-li-s-do-hi-s-di-yi.

061533.english: Now the God of peace be with you all. Amen.
061533.cherokee: ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏃ ᏅᏩᏙᎯᏯᏛ ᎠᏓᏁᎯ ᏂᏥᎥ ᎢᏤᎳᏗᏙᎮᏍᏗ.  ᎡᎺᏅ
061533.phonetic: U-ne-la-nv-hi-no nv-wa-do-hi-ya-dv a-da-ne-hi ni-tsi-v i-tse-la-di-do-he-s-di.  E-me-nv

061601.english: I commend unto you Phebe our sister, which is a servant of the church which is at Cenchrea:
061601.cherokee: ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏂᏨᏴᏁᎭ ᎣᎩᏙ ᏈᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏯᏙᎯᎯ ᏧᎾᏁᎶᏗ ᎤᎾᏓᏡᎬ ᎡᏟᏯ;
061601.phonetic: Gv-ni-ge-sv ni-tsv-yv-ne-ha o-gi-do Qui-gi, na-s-gi a-ya-do-hi-hi tsu-na-ne-lo-di u-na-da-tlu-gv E-tli-ya;

061602.english: That ye receive her in the Lord, as becometh saints, and that ye assist her in whatsoever business she hath need of you: for she hath been a succourer of many, and of myself also.
061602.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏤᏣᏓᏂᎸᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒ ᏅᏓᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏥᏚᏳᎪᏗ ᎢᏳᎾᏛᏁᏗᏱ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏘ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎡᏥᏍᏕᎸᏗᏱ ᏂᎦᎥᏉ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎡᏥᏍᏕᎸᏗᏱ ᎤᏚᎵᏍᎬᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᎤᏂᏣᏘ ᏧᏍᏕᎸᏛ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᎩᏍᏕᎸᏛ.
061602.phonetic: Na-s-gi tse-tsa-da-ni-lv-i-s-di-yi U-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv nv-da-yu-li-s-do-di-yi, na-s-gi-ya tsi-du-yu-go-di i-yu-na-dv-ne-di-yi u-na-da-nv-ti, a-le na-s-gi e-tsi-s-de-lv-di-yi ni-ga-v-quo go-hu-s-di e-tsi-s-de-lv-di-yi u-du-li-s-gv-i; na-s-gi-ye-no u-ni-tsa-ti tsu-s-de-lv-dv, a-le a-yv na-s-quo a-gi-s-de-lv-dv.

061603.english: Greet Priscilla and Aquila my helpers in Christ Jesus:
061603.cherokee: ᏕᏥᏲᎵᎸᎭ ᏈᏏᎳ ᎠᎴ ᎡᏈᎳ, ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᏦᎩᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏤᎵ ᏗᎦᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
061603.phonetic: De-tsi-yo-li-lv-ha Qui-si-la a-le E-qui-la, i-tsu-la-ha tso-gi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi Ga-lo-ne-dv u-tse-li di-ga-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di ge-sv-i.

061604.english: Who have for my life laid down their own necks: unto whom not only I give thanks, but also all the churches of the Gentiles.
061604.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏴ ᎬᏅ ᎠᏂᏍᏕᎵᏍᎬᎢ, ᎤᏅᏒ ᏗᏂᏴᏤᏂ ᎡᎳᏗ ᏚᏂᏅᏅ; ᎾᏍᎩ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᏋᏒᏉ ᏱᎦᏥᏯᎵᎡᎵᏤᎭ, ᎾᏍᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏧᎾᏁᎶᏗ ᏚᎾᏓᏡᏩᏗᏒ ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ ᏓᏁᏩᏗᏒᎢ;
061604.phonetic: Na-s-gi a-yv gv-nv a-ni-s-de-li-s-gv-i, u-nv-sv di-ni-yv-tse-ni e-la-di du-ni-nv-nv; na-s-gi, v-tla a-quv-sv-quo yi-ga-tsi-ya-li-e-li-tse-ha, na-s-quo-s-gi-ni ni-ga-dv tsu-na-ne-lo-di du-na-da-tlu-wa-di-sv tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv yv-wi da-ne-wa-di-sv-i;

061605.english: Likewise greet the church that is in their house. Salute my wellbeloved Epaenetus, who is the firstfruits of Achaia unto Christ.
061605.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏕᏥᏲᎵᎸᎭ ᏧᎾᏁᎶᏗ ᎤᎾᏓᏡᎬ ᎾᎿᎭᎠᏂᏁᎸᎢ.  ᎡᏥᏲᎵᎸᎭ ᎤᏣᏘ ᏥᎨᏳᎢ ᎢᏈᏂᏓ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎬᏱᏱ ᎤᎦᏛᎾᏨᎯ ᏥᏂᎦᎵᏍᏗᎭ ᎡᎦᏯ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎠᎵᏍᎪᎸᏓᏁᏗ.
061605.phonetic: A-le na-s-quo de-tsi-yo-li-lv-ha tsu-na-ne-lo-di u-na-da-tlu-gv na-hna a-ni-ne-lv-i.  E-tsi-yo-li-lv-ha u-tsa-ti tsi-ge-yu-i I-qui-ni-da, na-s-gi i-gv-yi-yi u-ga-dv-na-tsv-hi tsi-ni-ga-li-s-di-ha E-ga-ya Ga-lo-ne-dv a-li-s-go-lv-da-ne-di.

061606.english: Greet Mary, who bestowed much labour on us.
061606.cherokee: ᎺᎵ ᎡᏥᏲᎵᎸᎭ, ᎤᏣᏘ ᏧᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎸᎯ ᏥᎩ ᎠᏴ ᎣᎩᏍᏕᎵᏍᎬᎢ.
061606.phonetic: Me-li e-tsi-yo-li-lv-ha, u-tsa-ti tsu-lv-wi-s-da-ne-lv-hi tsi-gi a-yv o-gi-s-de-li-s-gv-i.

061607.english: Salute Andronicus and Junia, my kinsmen, and my fellowprisoners, who are of note among the apostles, who also were in Christ before me.
061607.cherokee: ᎥᏠᏂᎦ ᎠᎴ ᏧᏂᏯ ᏕᏥᏲᎵᎸᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏗᏋᏅ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᏦᎩᏴᎩᏅᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎨᏥᎸᏉᏗ ᏥᎩ ᎨᏥᏅᏏᏛ ᎠᏁᎲᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎢᎬᏱ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏧᎾᏁᎶᏗ ᎢᏳᎾᎵᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᎠᏴ ᎣᏂ.
061607.phonetic: V-tlo-ni-ga a-le Tsu-ni-ya de-tsi-yo-li-lv-ha, na-s-gi go-hu-s-di di-quv-nv, a-le i-tsu-la-ha tso-gi-yv-gi-nv-hi, na-s-gi ge-tsi-lv-quo-di tsi-gi ge-tsi-nv-si-dv a-ne-hv-i; na-s-gi na-s-quo i-gv-yi Ga-lo-ne-dv tsu-na-ne-lo-di i-yu-na-li-s-ta-nv-hi a-yv o-ni.

061608.english: Greet Amplias my beloved in the Lord.
061608.cherokee: ᎠᎻᏟᏯ ᎡᏥᏲᎵᎸᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᎨᏳᎢ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᎣᏍᏙᎯᏳᎲᏍᎩ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ.
061608.phonetic: A-mi-tli-ya e-tsi-yo-li-lv-ha, na-s-gi tsi-ge-yu-i i-tsu-la-ha o-s-do-hi-yu-hv-s-gi U-gv-wi-yu-hi.

061609.english: Salute Urbane, our helper in Christ, and Stachys my beloved.
061609.cherokee: ᎠᏇᏂ ᎡᏥᏲᎵᎸᎭ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᏦᎩᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏤᎵ ᏗᎦᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᏍᏕᎩ ᏥᎨᏳᎢ.
061609.phonetic: A-que-ni e-tsi-yo-li-lv-ha i-tsu-la-ha tso-gi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi Ga-lo-ne-dv u-tse-li di-ga-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di ge-sv-i; a-le S-de-gi tsi-ge-yu-i.

061610.english: Salute Apelles approved in Christ. Salute them which are of Aristobulus' household.
061610.cherokee: ᎠᏇᎵ ᎡᏥᏲᎵᎸᎭ, ᏣᎦᏓᏂᎸᏨᎯ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎪᎯᏳᎲᏍᎩ ᎨᏒᎢ.  ᎡᎵᏍᏓᏊᎳ ᏚᏓᏘᎾᎥ ᎠᏁᎳ ᏕᏥᏲᎵᎸᎭ.
061610.phonetic: A-que-li e-tsi-yo-li-lv-ha, tsa-ga-da-ni-lv-tsv-hi Ga-lo-ne-dv go-hi-yu-hv-s-gi ge-sv-i.  E-li-s-da-quu-la du-da-ti-na-v a-ne-la de-tsi-yo-li-lv-ha.

061611.english: Salute Herodion my kinsman. Greet them that be of the household of Narcissus, which are in the Lord.
061611.cherokee: ᎡᎶᏓᏂ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎠᏋᏅ ᎡᏥᏲᎵᎸᎭ. ᎾᏏᏌ ᏚᏓᏘᎾᎥ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎠᏃᎯᏳᎲᏍᎩ ᎨᏒ ᏕᏥᏲᎵᎸᎭ.
061611.phonetic: E-lo-da-ni go-hu-s-di a-quv-nv e-tsi-yo-li-lv-ha. Na-si-sa du-da-ti-na-v na-s-gi U-gv-wi-yu-hi a-no-hi-yu-hv-s-gi ge-sv de-tsi-yo-li-lv-ha.

061612.english: Salute Tryphena and Tryphosa, who labour in the Lord. Salute the beloved Persis, which laboured much in the Lord.
061612.cherokee: ᏜᏓᏈᎾ ᎠᎴ ᏜᏓᏉᏏ ᏕᏥᏲᎵᎸᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎤᏤᎵ ᏧᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯ ᏥᎩ.  ᎡᏥᏲᎵᎸᎭ ᎠᏥᎨᏳᎢ ᏆᏏ, ᎤᏣᏘ ᏧᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎸᎯ ᏥᎩ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ.
061612.phonetic: Dla-qui-na a-le Dla-quo-si de-tsi-yo-li-lv-ha, na-s-gi U-gv-wi-yu-hi u-tse-li tsu-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi tsi-gi.  E-tsi-yo-li-lv-ha a-tsi-ge-yu-i Qua-si, u-tsa-ti tsu-lv-wi-s-da-ne-lv-hi tsi-gi U-gv-wi-yu-hi u-tse-li-ga.

061613.english: Salute Rufus chosen in the Lord, and his mother and mine.
061613.cherokee: ᎷᏆ ᎡᏥᏲᎵᎸᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎦᏑᏰᏛ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎪᎯᏳᎲᏍᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎣᎩᏂᏥ.
061613.phonetic: Lu-qua e-tsi-yo-li-lv-ha, na-s-gi a-ga-su-ye-dv U-gv-wi-yu-hi go-hi-yu-hv-s-gi, a-le na-s-gi o-gi-ni-tsi.

061614.english: Salute Asyncritus, Phlegon, Hermas, Patrobas, Hermes, and the brethren which are with them.
061614.cherokee: ᏕᏥᏲᎵᎸᎭ ᎠᏏᏂᏟᏓ, ᏈᎵᎦᏂ, ᎭᎹᏏ, ᏆᏠᏆᏏ, ᎭᎻᏏ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎾᎵᏅᏟ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᏣᏁᎭ.
061614.phonetic: De-tsi-yo-li-lv-ha A-si-ni-tli-da, Qui-li-ga-ni, Ha-ma-si, Qua-tlo-qua-si, Ha-mi-si, a-le a-na-li-nv-tli na-s-gi i-tsu-la-ha tsa-ne-ha.

061615.english: Salute Philologus, and Julia, Nereus, and his sister, and Olympas, and all the saints which are with them.
061615.cherokee: ᏕᏥᏲᎵᎸᎭ ᏆᎶᎳᎦ, ᎠᎴ ᏧᎵᎠ, ᏂᎵᎠ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏙ, ᎠᎴ ᎣᎵᎻᏆ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏂᎥᏉ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏘ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᏣᏁᎭ.
061615.phonetic: De-tsi-yo-li-lv-ha Qua-lo-la-ga, a-le Tsu-li-a, Ni-li-a, a-le na-s-gi u-do, a-le O-li-mi-qua, a-le na-ni-v-quo u-na-da-nv-ti na-s-gi i-tsu-la-ha tsa-ne-ha.

061616.english: Salute one another with an holy kiss. The churches of Christ salute you.
061616.cherokee: ᎢᏨᏒ ᎨᏒ ᏕᏣᏓᏲᎵᎮᏍᏗ ᎢᏨᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᏗᏓᏙᏪᏙᎥᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.  ᏧᎾᏁᎶᏗ ᏚᎾᏓᏡᏩᏗᏒ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏧᏤᎵᎦ ᏫᎨᏥᏲᎵᎭ.
061616.phonetic: I-tsv-sv ge-sv de-tsa-da-yo-li-he-s-di i-tsv-di-s-ge-s-di ga-lv-quo-di-yu di-da-do-we-do-v-hi-s-di ge-sv-i.  Tsu-na-ne-lo-di du-na-da-tlu-wa-di-sv Ga-lo-ne-dv tsu-tse-li-ga wi-ge-tsi-yo-li-ha.

061617.english: Now I beseech you, brethren, mark them which cause divisions and offences contrary to the doctrine which ye have learned; and avoid them.
061617.cherokee: ᎠᎴᏬ ᎢᏓᎵᏅᏟ, ᎢᏨᏍᏗᏰᏗᎭ ᏗᏣᎦᏌᏯᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᏗᎦᎴᏅᏗᏱ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏓᎿᎭᏍᏆᎶᏍᏗᏱ ᎢᏯᏅᏁᎯ, ᏗᎦᏘᎸᏍᏗᏱ ᏗᏕᏲᏅᎯ ᎨᏒ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎢᏣᏕᎶᏆᎥᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᏕᏣᏓᏅᎡᎮᏍᏗ.
061617.phonetic: A-le-wo i-da-li-nv-tli, i-tsv-s-di-ye-di-ha di-tsa-ga-sa-ya-s-do-di-yi di-ga-le-nv-di-yi a-le u-da-hna-s-qua-lo-s-di-yi i-ya-nv-ne-hi, di-ga-ti-lv-s-di-yi di-de-yo-nv-hi ge-sv nu-s-dv i-tsa-de-lo-qua-v-i; a-le de-tsa-da-nv-e-he-s-di.

061618.english: For they that are such serve not our Lord Jesus Christ, but their own belly; and by good words and fair speeches deceive the hearts of the simple.
061618.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᎢᏳᎾᏍᏗ ᎥᏝ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎢᎦᏤᎵ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏯᎾᏛᏁᎭ, ᎤᏅᏒᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏂᏍᏉᎵᏱ; ᎠᎴ ᎤᏬᏚᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎦᏬᏂᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏅᏗᏍᎬᎢ ᏓᏂᎶᏄᎮᏍᎪ ᏧᏂᎾᏫ ᎾᏁᏯᏔᎲᎾ.
061618.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ye-no i-yu-na-s-di v-tla U-gv-wi-yu-hi i-ga-tse-li Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv go-hu-s-di ya-na-dv-ne-ha, u-nv-sv-quo-s-gi-ni u-ni-s-quo-li-yi; a-le u-wo-du-hi a-le o-s-dv ga-wo-ni-hi-s-di ge-sv a-nv-di-s-gv-i da-ni-lo-nu-he-s-go tsu-ni-na-wi na-ne-ya-ta-hv-na.

061619.english: For your obedience is come abroad unto all men. I am glad therefore on your behalf: but yet I would have you wise unto that which is good, and simple concerning evil.
061619.cherokee: ᎢᏦᎯᏳᏒᏰᏃ ᏚᏃᏣᎶᏨ ᎾᏂᎥ ᏴᏫ ᎠᏁᎲᎢ.  ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎦᎵᎮᎵᎦ ᏂᎯ ᎨᏒ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ; ᎠᏎᏍᎩᏂᏃᏅ ᎠᏆᏚᎵᎭ ᎢᏥᎦᏔᎾᎢ ᎢᏣᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ, ᎠᏃ ᎤᏲ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ ᏂᏥᎦᏔᎾᎥᎾ.
061619.phonetic: I-tso-hi-yu-sv-ye-no du-no-tsa-lo-tsv na-ni-v yv-wi a-ne-hv-i.  Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di ga-li-he-li-ga ni-hi ge-sv nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha; a-se-s-gi-ni-no-nv a-qua-du-li-ha i-tsi-ga-ta-na-i i-tsa-li-s-do-di-yi o-s-dv ge-sv u-gv-wa-li, a-no u-yo ge-sv u-gv-wa-li ni-tsi-ga-ta-na-v-na.

061620.english: And the God of peace shall bruise Satan under your feet shortly. The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with you. Amen.
061620.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏅᏩᏙᎯᏯᏛ ᎠᏓᏁᎯ ᏂᎪᎯᎸᎾᏉ ᏎᏓᏂ ᎤᏪᏓᏫᏙᏗ ᏅᏓᎦᎵᏍᏓᏂ ᏗᏣᎳᏏᏕᏂ ᎭᏫᏂᏗᏢ.  ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎢᎦᏤᎵ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎢᏤᎳᏗᏙᎮᏍᏗ.  ᎡᎺᏅ.
061620.phonetic: A-le U-ne-la-nv-hi nv-wa-do-hi-ya-dv a-da-ne-hi ni-go-hi-lv-na-quo Se-da-ni u-we-da-wi-do-di nv-da-ga-li-s-da-ni di-tsa-la-si-de-ni ha-wi-ni-di-tlv.  Gv-wa-ga-ti-ya u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv i-ga-tse-li U-gv-wi-yu-hi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv i-tse-la-di-do-he-s-di.  E-me-nv.

061621.english: Timotheus my workfellow, and Lucius, and Jason, and Sosipater, my kinsmen, salute you.
061621.cherokee: ᏗᎹᏗ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᏦᎩᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎷᏏᏯ, ᎠᎴ ᏤᏌᏂ, ᎠᎴ ᏐᏏᏇᏓ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏗᏋᏅ, ᏫᎨᏥᏲᎵᎦ.
061621.phonetic: Di-ma-di i-tsu-la-ha tso-gi-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi, a-le Lu-si-ya, a-le Tse-sa-ni, a-le So-si-que-da go-hu-s-di di-quv-nv, wi-ge-tsi-yo-li-ga.

061622.english: I Tertius, who wrote this epistle, salute you in the Lord.
061622.cherokee: ᎠᏴ ᏓᏏᏯ, ᎯᎠ ᎪᏪᎵ ᎠᏆᏪᎳᏅᎯ ᏫᏨᏲᎵᎦ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ.
061622.phonetic: A-yv da-si-ya, hi-a go-we-li a-qua-we-la-nv-hi wi-tsv-yo-li-ga U-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha.

061623.english: Gaius mine host, and of the whole church, saluteth you. Erastus the chamberlain of the city saluteth you, and Quartus a brother.
061623.cherokee: ᎦᏯ ᎠᎩᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗᏍᎩ ᎠᎴ ᎾᏂᎥᏉ ᏧᎾᏁᎶᏗ ᎤᎾᏓᏡᎬ ᏗᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗᏍᎩ, ᏫᏥᏲᎵᎦ.  ᎢᎳᏍᏓ, ᎠᏰᎵ ᎡᎯ ᎦᏚᎲ ᎠᎲ ᎠᎦᏘᏯ, ᏫᏥᏲᎵᎦ, ᎠᎴ ᏉᏓ, ᎢᏓᎵᏅᏟ.
061623.phonetic: Ga-ya a-gi-s-qua-ni-go-di-s-gi a-le na-ni-v-quo tsu-na-ne-lo-di u-na-da-tlu-gv di-s-qua-ni-go-di-s-gi, wi-tsi-yo-li-ga.  I-la-s-da, a-ye-li e-hi ga-du-hv a-hv a-ga-ti-ya, wi-tsi-yo-li-ga, a-le Quo-da, i-da-li-nv-tli.

061624.english: The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with you all. Amen.
061624.cherokee: ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎤᏓᏙᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎢᎦᏤᎵ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎢᏤᎳᏗᏙᎮᏍᏗ ᏂᏥᎥᎢ.  ᎡᎺᏅ.
061624.phonetic: Gv-wa-ga-ti-ya u-da-do-s-di ge-sv i-ga-tse-li U-gv-wi-yu-hi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv i-tse-la-di-do-he-s-di ni-tsi-v-i.  E-me-nv.

061625.english: Now to him that is of power to stablish you according to my gospel, and the preaching of Jesus Christ, according to the revelation of the mystery, which was kept secret since the world began,
061625.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏰᎵᏉ ᏗᏣᎵᏂᎪᎯᏍᏙᏗ ᏥᎩ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏂᎦᏪᏍᎬ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎠᏆᏤᎵᎦ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎠᎦᎵᏥᏙᏅᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᎬᏁᎸᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏕᎵᏛ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎡᎶᎯ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᎲ ᏅᏓᎬᏩᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎠᏕᎵᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᏥᎨᏎᎢ,
061625.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no ye-li-quo di-tsa-li-ni-go-hi-s-do-di tsi-gi na-s-gi-ya ni-ga-we-s-gv o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv a-qua-tse-li-ga, a-le na-s-gi-ya Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv a-ga-li-tsi-do-nv-i, na-s-gi-ya gv-ni-ge-sv i-gv-ne-lv-hi ge-sv u-de-li-dv, na-s-gi e-lo-hi tsu-da-le-nv-hv nv-da-gv-wa-da-le-nv-dv a-de-li-s-ta-nv-hi tsi-ge-se-i,

061626.english: But now is made manifest, and by the scriptures of the prophets, according to the commandment of the everlasting God, made known to all nations for the obedience of faith:
061626.cherokee: ᎪᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᎬᏁᎸᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎾᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ ᏧᏃᏪᎳᏅᎯ ᏗᎬᏔᏅᎯ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎠᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬ ᎠᎵᏍᏆᏗᏍᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎡᎯ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᎨᎬᎸᎯ ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏃᎯᏳᏗᏱ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ^
061626.phonetic: Go-hi-s-gi-ni hna-quo gv-ni-ge-sv i-gv-ne-lv-hi, a-le a-na-do-le-ho-s-gi tsu-no-we-la-nv-hi di-gv-ta-nv-hi na-s-gi-ya a-da-nv-te-s-gv a-li-s-qua-di-s-gi ni-ge-sv-na e-hi U-ne-la-nv-hi gv-ni-ge-sv i-ge-gv-lv-hi ni-ga-di-yu tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv yv-wi, na-s-gi go-hi-yu-di ge-sv u-no-hi-yu-di-yi u-gv-wa-li^

061627.english: To God only wise, be glory through Jesus Christ for ever. Amen.
061627.cherokee: ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏩᏒᎯᏳ ᎠᎦᏔᎾᎢ ᏥᎩ, ᎦᎸᏉᏙᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ ᏂᎪᎯᎸᎢ.  ᎡᎺᏅ.
061627.phonetic: U-ne-la-nv-hi u-wa-sv-hi-yu a-ga-ta-na-i tsi-gi, ga-lv-quo-do-di ge-se-s-di Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv ni-go-hi-lv-i.  E-me-nv.
